SUBJECT: NA6 20,21inch PZS Audit
POINT_OUT: The extruder currently only manages the temperature. It is necessary to identify other process parameters (such as screw speed, etc.) and simultaneously update the FMEA and CP.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: During on-site operations, the weight of the rubber strips was ensured, and the speed was not set to the standard.
COUNTER_MEASURE: After discussions among the Technology Department, Production Department and Quality Management Department, the extruder will have its speed management added in addition to the temperature management. The FMEA and CP will be updated after the technical standards are issued.
POINT_OUT_KO: 현재 압출기는 온도만 관리합니다. 다른 공정 매개변수(예: 스크류 속도 등)를 식별하고 FMEA 및 CP를 동시에 업데이트해야 합니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: The extruder currently only manages the temperature. It is necessary to identify other process parameters (such as screw speed, etc.) and simultaneously update the FMEA and CP.
POINT_OUT_ZH: The extruder currently only manages the temperature. It is necessary to identify other process parameters (such as screw speed, etc.) and simultaneously update the FMEA and CP.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: During on-site operations, the weight of the rubber strips was ensured, and the speed was not set to the standard.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: During on-site operations, the weight of the rubber strips was ensured, and the speed was not set to the standard.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 现场作业时，保证了胶条的重量，速度没有设定到标准。
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 기술부, 생산부, 품질관리부 논의를 거쳐 압출기 온도 관리 외에 속도 관리도 추가할 예정이다. FMEA와 CP는 기술 표준이 발표된 후 업데이트될 예정입니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: After discussions among the Technology Department, Production Department and Quality Management Department, the extruder will have its speed management added in addition to the temperature management. The FMEA and CP will be updated after the technical standards are issued.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: After discussions among the Technology Department, Production Department and Quality Management Department, the extruder will have its speed management added in addition to the temperature management. The FMEA and CP will be updated after the technical standards are issued.

SUBJECT: 2025-BYD-SR-01
POINT_OUT: 管理评审输入策划不完善 查质量手册有策划管理评审输入“通过风险分析识别的潜在使用现场失效”，实际查《经营者审查规定》，标准代码:QAS-L43B-03-00，却无此输入要求，管理评审输入策划不完善，再查管理评审报告，实际有此输出内容，只是文件策划不完善
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: “通过风险分析识别的潜在使用现场失效”包含在4作业流程输入中，未更新4.1的管理评审流程，未对细部内容进行确认
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1.对于4 作业流程 输入全部按照标准的语言重新梳理一遍 2.对于 4.1 管理评审流程，细部评审的内容删除，参照4即可
POINT_OUT_KO: 경영 검토 입력 계획이 불완전합니다. 품질매뉴얼을 확인하면 기획관리검토 입력 "위험분석을 통해 파악된 현장실패 가능성"이 있습니다. 실제로 "운영자 검토 규정", 표준 코드: QAS-L43B-03-00을 확인하지만 그러한 입력 요구 사항은 없습니다. 경영 검토 입력 계획이 불완전합니다. 그런 다음 경영 검토 보고서를 확인하십시오. 사실 이런 출력 내용은 있는데 문서 기획이 미완성인 거죠.
POINT_OUT_EN: The management review input planning is incomplete. Check the quality manual and there is planning management review input "potential on-site failure identified through risk analysis". Actually check the "Operator Review Regulations", standard code: QAS-L43B-03-00, but there is no such input requirement. The management review input planning is incomplete. Then check the management review report. In fact, there is this output content, but the document planning is incomplete.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 管理评审输入策划不完善 查质量手册有策划管理评审输入“通过风险分析识别的潜在使用现场失效”，实际查《经营者审查规定》，标准代码:QAS-L43B-03-00，却无此输入要求，管理评审输入策划不完善，再查管理评审报告，实际有此输出内容，只是文件策划不完善
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 4대 운영프로세스 입력에는 "리스크 분석을 통해 파악된 현장 장애 가능성"이 포함되어 있습니다. 4.1의 경영검토 프로세스는 업데이트되지 않았으며, 세부 내용도 확정되지 않았습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: "Potential on-site failure identified through risk analysis" is included in the 4 operation process input. The management review process of 4.1 has not been updated, and the details have not been confirmed.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: “通过风险分析识别的潜在使用现场失效”包含在4作业流程输入中，未更新4.1的管理评审流程，未对细部内容进行确认
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1. 4. 작업 과정에서는 모든 입력을 표준 언어에 맞게 재구성해야 합니다. 2. 4.1 경영검토 과정은 세부검토 내용을 삭제하고 4.를 참고한다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1. For 4. Operation process, all input should be reorganized according to standard language. 2. For 4.1 management review process, delete the detailed review content and refer to 4.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1.对于4 作业流程 输入全部按照标准的语言重新梳理一遍 2.对于 4.1 管理评审流程，细部评审的内容删除，参照4即可

SUBJECT: 2025-BYD-SR-01
POINT_OUT: 内部质量审核规定策划不完善 查《内部质量审核规定》，标准代码:QAS-L43B-02-02中未明确审核员必备能力等级要求，如体系审核员体系标准知识要达到2等级，五大工具要达到1等级，而实际查内审员素质矩阵表却有这些要求，两者不一致，文件策划不完善
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 审核员能力满足矩阵图在日常中不断更新，但因在矩阵图中未作出提示而遗忘更新程序文件
COUNTER_MEASURE: 在 审核员能力满足矩阵图 封面中备注，一旦有样式等变更发生时，需要立即更新《内部质量审核规定》
POINT_OUT_KO: 내부 품질 감사 규정의 계획이 불완전합니다. "내부 품질 감사 규정"을 확인하세요. 표준 코드: QAS-L43B-02-02는 감사자에게 필요한 역량 수준 요구 사항을 지정하지 않습니다. 예를 들어, 시스템 감사인의 시스템 표준 지식은 레벨 2에 도달해야 하고, 5가지 주요 도구는 레벨 1에 도달해야 합니다. 그러나 실제 내부 감사인 품질 매트릭스 테이블에는 이러한 요구 사항이 있습니다. 두 가지가 일치하지 않으며 문서 계획이 불완전합니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: The planning of internal quality audit regulations is incomplete. Check the "Internal Quality Audit Regulations". The standard code: QAS-L43B-02-02 does not specify the required competency level requirements for auditors. For example, the system auditor's system standard knowledge must reach level 2 and the five major tools must reach level 1. However, the actual internal auditor quality matrix table has these requirements. The two are inconsistent and the document planning is incomplete.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 内部质量审核规定策划不完善 查《内部质量审核规定》，标准代码:QAS-L43B-02-02中未明确审核员必备能力等级要求，如体系审核员体系标准知识要达到2等级，五大工具要达到1等级，而实际查内审员素质矩阵表却有这些要求，两者不一致，文件策划不完善
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 감사자의 역량 만족도 매트릭스는 일상생활에서 지속적으로 업데이트되지만, 매트릭스에 프롬프트가 제공되지 않아 프로그램 문서는 잊혀집니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: The auditor's competency satisfaction matrix is constantly updated in daily life, but the program document is forgotten because no prompt is given in the matrix.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 审核员能力满足矩阵图在日常中不断更新，但因在矩阵图中未作出提示而遗忘更新程序文件
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 스타일 등의 변화가 발생하면 즉시 "내부 품질 감사 규정"을 업데이트해야 한다는 내용이 감사자 역량 만족도 매트릭스 표지에 명시되어 있습니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: It is noted on the cover of the Auditor Competency Satisfaction Matrix that once changes such as styles occur, the "Internal Quality Audit Regulations" need to be updated immediately
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 在 审核员能力满足矩阵图 封面中备注，一旦有样式等变更发生时，需要立即更新《内部质量审核规定》

SUBJECT: 2025-BYD-SR-01
POINT_OUT: 客户交付有效性不足
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 一汽大众装车订单要求轮胎750个（A车300个、B车450个），实际B车装车记录只有445个，低于客户要求，交付有效性不足
COUNTER_MEASURE: 人工手写笔误，实际装货轮胎和出库发货单一致
POINT_OUT_KO: 고객 전달 효율성이 부족함
POINT_OUT_EN: Insufficient customer delivery effectiveness
POINT_OUT_ZH: 客户交付有效性不足
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: FAW-Volkswagen의 차량 설치 주문에는 타이어 750개가 필요합니다(차량 A는 300개, 차량 B는 450개). B 차량의 실제 설치 실적은 445대에 불과해 고객 요구 사항에 비해 부족해 배송 효과도 미흡하다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: FAW-Volkswagen's vehicle installation order requires 750 tires (300 for vehicle A and 450 for vehicle B). The actual installation record for vehicle B is only 445, which is lower than the customer's requirements and the delivery effectiveness is insufficient.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 一汽大众装车订单要求轮胎750个（A车300个、B车450个），实际B车装车记录只有445个，低于客户要求，交付有效性不足
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 수동 필기 오류, 실제 장착된 타이어가 발송되는 배송 메모와 일치합니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Manual handwriting error, the actual loaded tires are consistent with the outgoing delivery note
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 人工手写笔误，实际装货轮胎和出库发货单一致

SUBJECT: 2025-BYD-SR-01
POINT_OUT: 设备的点检有效性不足，设备点检记录气压与实际不一致，实际现场无明确点检标准
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 点检员不明确压力标准，现场标准目视化不足；绿色标识脱落，标识不规范；点检员点检方法不合理
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1.压力表绿色区域重新制作标识；2.设备点检表上增加压力标准；3.压力表边上标准目视化制作、张贴；4.点检员压力确认方法教育实施
POINT_OUT_KO: 장비점검의 실효성이 부족하다. 장비 점검 시 기록된 공기압이 실제 상황과 일치하지 않습니다. 실제 현장에는 명확한 검사 기준이 없습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: The effectiveness of equipment inspection is insufficient. The air pressure recorded during equipment inspection is inconsistent with the actual situation. There is no clear inspection standard at the actual site.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 设备的点检有效性不足，设备点检记录气压与实际不一致，实际现场无明确点检标准
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 검사관은 압력 기준을 명확하게 알지 못하고, 현장 기준도 충분히 시각화되지 않습니다. 녹색 표시가 떨어지고 표시가 표준화되지 않았습니다. 검사원의 검사방법이 불합리하다
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: The inspector does not know the pressure standards clearly, and the on-site standards are not visualized enough; the green signs fall off and the signs are not standardized; the inspection methods of the inspector are unreasonable
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 点检员不明确压力标准，现场标准目视化不足；绿色标识脱落，标识不规范；点检员点检方法不合理
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1.压力表绿色区域重新制作标识；2.设备点检表上增加压力标准；3.压力表边上标准目视化制作、张贴；4.点检员压力确认方法教育实施
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1. Strengthening the new structure and building a new structure; 2. Transforming the structure into a stable structure; 3 .压力表边上标准目视化制作、张贴；4.点检员压力确认方法教育实施
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1、强化新结构，构建新格局； 2、将结构转变为稳定的结构； 3.压力表边上标准目视化制作、张贴；4.点检员压力确认方法教育实施

SUBJECT: 2025-BYD-SR-01
POINT_OUT: 模具的定期确认策划有缺失，实际难以执行
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 各事业工厂模具共用性，当时全社统一要求模具寿命设定50万回（满负荷6年）
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1.修正前的《模具保养要求要领》8.1对质量有间接或直接影响的模具按照模具检查要领定期进行评价和校正。一般模具投入使用达到轮胎生产50万回（满负荷6年）时，CTC部署应该对模具全面进行再检查，再判定其可用性。修正后的《模具保养要求要领》4.3保养计划的制定以及实施模具保养周期也为330天/次，（每月分批进行确认保养）；外壳登记检测周期2年/次
POINT_OUT_KO: 정기적인 금형확인 계획이 부족하고 현실적으로 실행하기 어렵습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: The regular mold confirmation plan is lacking and difficult to implement in practice.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 模具的定期确认策划有缺失，实际难以执行
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 各事业工厂模具共用性，当时全社统一要求模具寿命设定50万回（满负荷6年）
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: 各事业工厂模具共用性，当时全社统一要求模具寿命设定50万回（满负荷6年）
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 事业工厂模具消耗性，当时全社统一要求模具寿命设定50万回（满肥胖6年）
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1. 개정된 "금형 유지관리 요건 및 필수사항" 8.1 품질에 간접적 또는 직접적인 영향을 미치는 금형은 금형검사 필수사항에 따라 정기적으로 평가 및 수정되어야 한다. 일반적으로 금형을 사용하고 타이어 생산 주기가 500,000회(최대 부하 시 6년)에 도달하면 CTC 배치에서는 금형에 대한 포괄적인 재검사를 수행한 다음 가용성을 결정해야 합니다. 개정된 "금형 유지 관리 요구 사항" 4.3 유지 관리 계획 수립 및 실행 금형 유지 관리 주기도 330일/회입니다(유지 관리는 매월 일괄 확인됩니다). 쉘 등록 및 테스트 주기는 2년/시간입니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1. The revised "Mold Maintenance Requirements and Essentials" 8.1 Molds that have an indirect or direct impact on quality shall be regularly evaluated and corrected in accordance with the mold inspection essentials. Generally, when a mold is put into use and reaches 500,000 tire production cycles (6 years at full load), the CTC deployment should conduct a comprehensive re-inspection of the mold and then determine its availability. The revised "Mold Maintenance Requirements" 4.3 Formulation and Implementation of Maintenance Plans The mold maintenance cycle is also 330 days/time, (maintenance is confirmed in batches every month); the shell registration and testing cycle is 2 years/time
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1.修正前的《模具保养要求要领》8.1对质量有间接或直接影响的模具按照模具检查要领定期进行评价和校正。一般模具投入使用达到轮胎生产50万回（满负荷6年）时，CTC部署应该对模具全面进行再检查，再判定其可用性。修正后的《模具保养要求要领》4.3保养计划的制定以及实施模具保养周期也为330天/次，（每月分批进行确认保养）；外壳登记检测周期2年/次

SUBJECT: 2025-BYD-01
POINT_OUT: 岗位说明书未及时更新 查公司岗位说明书，该说明书内“品质革新”职位岗位说明书中对于学历要求是“高中”，经过与公司负责此业务的同事了解得知，该岗位学历要求为“本科并且该岗位在2025年已撤销，但最新岗位说明书内仍有该岗位。
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 1why: 为什么岗位说明书中的学历要求未更新为“本科”，且未删除已撤销的“品质革新”岗位? 1answer: 因为人员未能及时识别并响应部门关于岗位调整的通知，导致信息滞后。 2why: 为什么人员未能及时识别部门发布的岗位调整通知? 2answer: 部门在告知岗位变更时，未明确要求责任人更新岗位说明书，且缺乏后续跟踪机制，导致人员可能忽视或逮忘该信息。3why: 为什么责任人未对岗位说明书进行更新? 3answer:人员未意识到需主动更新岗位说明书(现已删除更新)
COUNTER_MEASURE: 对所有部门的岗位说明书全面更新。 向后每年公司组织结构变更时，岗位说明书立即检讨更务
POINT_OUT_KO: 직무 설명이 적시에 업데이트되지 않았습니다. 회사의 직무기술서를 확인해 보니 직무기술서에 '품질혁신' 직위의 학력요건이 '고졸'로 나와 있었습니다. 회사에서 이 사업을 담당하는 동료들과 이해한 결과, 이 직위에 대한 학력요건은 '학사학위'이며, 2025년에 직위가 폐지되었으나 최신 직무기술서에는 해당 직위가 아직 남아 있다는 사실을 알게 되었습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: The job description was not updated in a timely manner. I checked the company's job description and found that the academic requirement for the "Quality Innovation" position in the job description was "high school." After understanding with the company's colleagues in charge of this business, I learned that the academic requirement for this position is "bachelor's degree" and that the position has been canceled in 2025, but the position is still in the latest job description.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 岗位说明书未及时更新 查公司岗位说明书，该说明书内“品质革新”职位岗位说明书中对于学历要求是“高中”，经过与公司负责此业务的同事了解得知，该岗位学历要求为“本科并且该岗位在2025年已撤销，但最新岗位说明书内仍有该岗位。

SUBJECT: 2025-BYD-01
POINT_OUT: 问题:供方考核结果和日常供贷状态不相符。证据:查企业提供的2024年供应商年度绩效评价汇总记录，其中供应商-斯递尔评级为D，按企业文件《原辅材料供应商选定及管理要领》规定D级供应商为不合格供应商。再查企业提供的2025年合格供方名录，其中供应商-斯递尔给出的评级为B，属于正常供货，合格供方名录中该供应商的供货状态评价和该供应商年度绩效评定的状态不一致。进一步审核该供应商的2024年度绩效评定中被评为D级的原因是供货物料-加工助剂发生PAH超标，被赋值D。但是2025年合格供方名录中该供应商等级为B是限定于“防老剂/促进剂”产品，进而查企业《原辅材料供应商选定及管理要领》管理文件该文件中仅规定供应商年度绩效评价低于60分赋值D，并未明确规定供应商的绩效等级可按照"供应商+物料组”进行单独评价,文件策划不完善。
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 1why: 为什么2024年供应商年度绩效评价斯递尔评级为D?Ianswer: 因为斯递尔供货物料-加工助剂发生PAH超标，被赋值D.2why: 为什么斯递尔评级为D，“防老剂/促进剂”产品还正常供货?2answer: 因为“防老剂/促进剂”产品完全不涉及PAH指标，经QA,CTC，购买T共同检讨，仅暂停了斯递尔加工助剂供货，“防老剂/促进剂”产品还正常供货。3why: 为什么文件还是规定供应商年度绩效评价低于60分赋值D，为不合格供应商，与实际执行不符? 3answer:因为文件当时没有考虑到会有供货多个原料品目的供应商，因某一原料规格发生重大质量问题被判定为D等级暂停供货时,其他原料品目也会被涉及，2024年出现此情况后未及时修订文件导致: 4why: 为什么2024年出现此情况后未及时修订文件?4answer: 人员忘记修订文件(现已修订更改)
COUNTER_MEASURE: 修改《原辅料供应商选定及管理要领》程序文件增加:当供货多个原料品目的供应商，因某一原料规格发生重大质量问题被判定为D等级时,由于涉及多个原料品目，QA,CTC，购买T共同判定，如发生问题仅为该原材料独有的特性且其他原材料不受影响时，可仅暂停发生问题的原料供货，其他原材料不受影响，仍可正常供货。如果为共性问题，要求此供应商供应的其他原料也同时停止供货。
POINT_OUT_KO: 문제: 공급업체 평가 결과가 일일 대출 공급 상태와 일치하지 않습니다. 증거: 회사에서 제공한 2024년 공급업체 연간 실적 평가 요약 기록을 확인하세요. 공급업체 Stier는 D 등급입니다. 회사 문서 "원부자재 공급업체 선정 및 관리 필수 사항"에 따르면 D급 공급업체는 부적격 공급업체입니다. 그런 다음 회사에서 제공하는 2025년 적격 공급업체 목록을 확인하세요. 그 중 공급업체인 슈티에(Stier)가 부여한 등급은 B로, 이는 정상적인 공급이다. 적격 공급업체 목록에 있는 공급업체의 공급 상태 평가가 공급업체의 연간 성과 평가 상태와 일치하지 않습니다. 추가 검토 결과 공급업체가 2024년 성능 평가에서 D 등급을 받은 이유는 공급된 재료 가공 보조제가 PAH 기준을 초과하여 D 값을 할당받았기 때문입니다. 그러나 2025년 적격 공급업체 목록에서 해당 공급업체의 B 등급은 "노화방지제/촉진제" 제품에 한합니다. 그런 다음 해당 회사의 "원부자재 공급자 선정 및 관리요령" 관리문서를 확인하세요. 이 문서에는 연간 성과 평가가 60점 미만인 공급업체에만 D 값이 할당된다고 규정되어 있습니다. '공급업체+자재군'에 따라 공급업체의 성과수준을 개별적으로 평가할 수 있다는 점을 명확히 규정하지 않고, 문서기획도 불완전하다.
POINT_OUT_EN: Problem: The supplier assessment results are inconsistent with the daily loan supply status. Evidence: Check the supplier annual performance evaluation summary record for 2024 provided by the company, in which the supplier - Stier is rated D. According to the company document "Selection and Management Essentials of Raw and Auxiliary Material Suppliers", D-level suppliers are unqualified suppliers. Then check the list of qualified suppliers for 2025 provided by the company. Among them, the rating given by the supplier - Stier is B, which is a normal supply. The supplier's supply status evaluation in the qualified supplier list is inconsistent with the status of the supplier's annual performance evaluation. After further review, the reason why the supplier was rated D in the 2024 performance evaluation was that the supplied materials-processing aids exceeded PAH standards and were assigned a D value. However, the supplier's grade B in the list of qualified suppliers in 2025 is limited to "anti-aging agent/accelerator" products. Then check the company's "Raw and Auxiliary Material Supplier Selection and Management Essentials" management document. This document only stipulates that suppliers whose annual performance evaluation is less than 60 points are assigned a D value. It does not clearly stipulate that the supplier's performance level can be evaluated individually according to the "supplier + material group", and the document planning is incomplete.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 问题:供方考核结果和日常供贷状态不相符。证据:查企业提供的2024年供应商年度绩效评价汇总记录，其中供应商-斯递尔评级为D，按企业文件《原辅材料供应商选定及管理要领》规定D级供应商为不合格供应商。再查企业提供的2025年合格供方名录，其中供应商-斯递尔给出的评级为B，属于正常供货，合格供方名录中该供应商的供货状态评价和该供应商年度绩效评定的状态不一致。进一步审核该供应商的2024年度绩效评定中被评为D级的原因是供货物料-加工助剂发生PAH超标，被赋值D。但是2025年合格供方名录中该供应商等级为B是限定于“防老剂/促进剂”产品，进而查企业《原辅材料供应商选定及管理要领》管理文件该文件中仅规定供应商年度绩效评价低于60分赋值D，并未明确规定供应商的绩效等级可按照"供应商+物料组”进行单独评价,文件策划不完善。
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 1이유: Steele이 2024년 공급업체 연간 성과 평가를 D로 평가한 이유는 무엇입니까? I답변: Steele에서 공급하는 재료 및 가공 보조제는 PAH 표준을 초과하고 D.2 값이 할당되기 때문입니다. 이유: Steel이 D 등급으로 평가되고 "노화 방지제/촉진제" 제품이 여전히 정상적으로 공급되는 이유는 무엇입니까? 2답변: "노화방지제/촉진제" 제품에는 PAH 지표가 전혀 포함되어 있지 않기 때문에 QA, CTC, 구매T의 공동 검토 후 스틸의 가공보조제 공급만 중단되었고, "노화방지제/촉진제" 제품은 여전히 ​​정상적으로 판매되고 있었습니다. 3why: 문서에는 왜 연간 성과 평가가 60점 미만인 공급업체에 D 값을 할당한다고 규정하고 있는데, 이는 실제 구현과 일치하지 않는 부적격 공급업체임을 나타냅니다. 3답변: 문서에는 여러 원자재 품목을 공급하는 공급업체가 있을 것이라는 점을 고려하지 않았기 때문입니다. 원자재 규격에 중대한 품질 문제가 발생하여 D등급으로 판단되어 공급이 중단될 경우, 다른 원자재 품목도 함께 관련됩니다. 2024년에 이러한 상황이 발생한 후 문서를 제때에 수정하지 못한 결과: 4왜: 2024년에 이러한 상황이 발생한 후 문서가 제때에 수정되지 않은 이유는 무엇입니까? 4답변: 그 사람이 문서 수정을 잊어버렸습니다. (현재 수정 및 변경되었습니다.)
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: 1why: Why is the Supplier Annual Performance Evaluation of 2024 rated as D by Steele? Ianswer: Because the materials and processing aids supplied by Steele exceed the PAH standard and are assigned a value of D.2why: Why is Steel rated as D and the "anti-aging agent/accelerator" products are still supplied normally? 2answer: Because the "anti-aging agent/accelerator" product does not involve PAH indicators at all, after joint review by QA, CTC, and purchasing T, only the supply of Stil's processing aids was suspended, and the "anti-aging agent/accelerator" product was still available normally. 3why: Why does the document still stipulate that suppliers whose annual performance evaluation is lower than 60 points are assigned a value of D, indicating that they are unqualified suppliers, which is inconsistent with the actual implementation? 3answer: Because the document did not consider that there would be suppliers supplying multiple raw material items. When a major quality problem occurs in a raw material specification and is judged to be D grade and the supply is suspended, other raw material items will also be involved. Failure to revise the document in time after this situation occurred in 2024 resulted in: 4why: Why was the document not revised in time after this situation occurred in 2024? 4answer: The person forgot to revise the document (it has now been revised and changed)
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 1why: 为什么2024年供应商年度绩效评价斯递尔评级为D?Ianswer: 因为斯递尔供货物料-加工助剂发生PAH超标，被赋值D.2why: 为什么斯递尔评级为D，“防老剂/促进剂”产品还正常供货?2answer: 因为“防老剂/促进剂”产品完全不涉及PAH指标，经QA,CTC，购买T共同检讨，仅暂停了斯递尔加工助剂供货，“防老剂/促进剂”产品还正常供货。3why: 为什么文件还是规定供应商年度绩效评价低于60分赋值D，为不合格供应商，与实际执行不符? 3answer:因为文件当时没有考虑到会有供货多个原料品目的供应商，因某一原料规格发生重大质量问题被判定为D等级暂停供货时,其他原料品目也会被涉及，2024年出现此情况后未及时修订文件导致: 4why: 为什么2024年出现此情况后未及时修订文件?4answer: 人员忘记修订文件(现已修订更改)
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: "원자재 공급업체 선정 및 관리요령" 절차서에 다음 사항을 추가하도록 수정: 다수의 원자재 품목을 공급하는 업체가 특정 원자재 규격으로 인한 중대한 품질 문제로 D등급 판정을 받은 경우 다수의 원자재 품목이 관련되어 있으므로 QA, CTC, 구매T가 공동으로 판단한다. 원재료의 고유한 특성으로 인해 문제가 발생하고 다른 원재료에는 영향이 없는 경우에는 문제가 있는 원재료의 공급만 중단될 수 있습니다. 다른 원자재는 영향을 받지 않으며 정상적으로 공급될 수 있습니다. 일반적인 문제인 경우, 해당 공급업체가 공급하는 다른 원자재도 동시에 공급을 중단해야 합니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Modify the "Raw Material Supplier Selection and Management Essentials" procedure document to add: When a supplier of multiple raw material items is judged to have a D grade due to a major quality problem due to a certain raw material specification, since multiple raw material items are involved, QA, CTC, and purchasing T jointly determine. If the problem occurs only due to the unique characteristics of the raw material and other raw materials are not affected, only the supply of the raw material with the problem can be suspended. Other raw materials will not be affected and can still be supplied normally. If it is a common problem, other raw materials supplied by this supplier are required to stop supply at the same time.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 修改《原辅料供应商选定及管理要领》程序文件增加:当供货多个原料品目的供应商，因某一原料规格发生重大质量问题被判定为D等级时,由于涉及多个原料品目，QA,CTC，购买T共同判定，如发生问题仅为该原材料独有的特性且其他原材料不受影响时，可仅暂停发生问题的原料供货，其他原材料不受影响，仍可正常供货。如果为共性问题，要求此供应商供应的其他原料也同时停止供货。

SUBJECT: 2025-BYD-01
POINT_OUT: 问题:生产计划未达成无有效的整改措施。证据:查企业2025年11月生产计划执行情况，现场有提供11月18日的生产计划完成记录，其中当天计划生产17001，实际生产16782，欠产219，当日生产计划未达成，企业给出的原因分析为(1)GT不足:(2)不适合:(3)设备故障。但是对于如上给出的原因分析，企业现场未能有效给出对应的整改措施及整改记录。
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 1why:为什么只有原因分析，无对应的整改措施及整改记录1answer: 因为现处理流程为生产管理将欠产原因分析发送各关联部署，关联部署自 行进行整改，未对整改措施进行记录2why: 为什么未对整改措施进行记录 2answer: 未要求人员对整改措施进行记录(现已增加关联部署反馈整改措施流程)
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1.建立欠产台账，记录欠产情况、原因分析、改善措施2,设定单日单台硫化机欠产50本以上时，生产管理T记录在案，邀请表任部署反馈发生原因、整改措施3.生产管理T定期对台账进行整理，周生产会议上报告欠产改善情况
POINT_OUT_KO: 문제: 생산 계획이 달성되지 않았으며 효과적인 시정 조치가 없습니다. 증거자료: 2025년 11월 회사의 생산계획 이행을 확인한다. 11월 18일 현장생산계획 완료기록을 제공하였다. 그 중 이날 계획된 생산량은 17001개, 실제 생산량은 16782개, 부족생산량은 219개였다. 이날 생산계획은 달성되지 못했다. 회사가 제시한 이유 분석은 (1) GT 부족: (2) 부적합: (3) 장비 고장입니다. 그러나 위에 제시된 이유 분석으로 인해 회사는 해당 시정 조치 및 시정 기록을 현장에서 효과적으로 제공하지 못했습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: Problem: The production plan has not been achieved and there are no effective corrective measures. Evidence: Check the implementation of the company's production plan in November 2025. The on-site production plan completion record on November 18 was provided. Among them, the planned production on that day was 17001, the actual production was 16782, and the underproduction was 219. The production plan on that day was not achieved. The reason analysis given by the company is (1) insufficient GT: (2) unsuitable: (3) equipment failure. However, for the reason analysis given above, the company failed to effectively provide corresponding rectification measures and rectification records on site.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 问题:生产计划未达成无有效的整改措施。证据:查企业2025年11月生产计划执行情况，现场有提供11月18日的生产计划完成记录，其中当天计划生产17001，实际生产16782，欠产219，当日生产计划未达成，企业给出的原因分析为(1)GT不足:(2)不适合:(3)设备故障。但是对于如上给出的原因分析，企业现场未能有效给出对应的整改措施及整改记录。
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 1why: 원인 분석만 있고 그에 따른 시정 조치 및 시정 기록이 없는 이유는 무엇입니까? 1답: 현재 처리 프로세스는 생산 관리가 생산 부족 이유 분석을 각 관련 배포에 보내고 관련 배포는 수정 조치를 기록하지 않고 자체적으로 수정을 수행하는 것이기 때문입니다. 2why: 시정 조치가 기록되지 않는 이유는 무엇입니까? 2답: 직원은 수정 조치를 기록할 필요가 없습니다(관련 배치 피드백 수정 조치 프로세스가 이제 추가되었습니다).
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: 1why: Why is there only cause analysis, but no corresponding rectification measures and rectification records? 1answer: Because the current processing process is for production management to send the analysis of the reasons for underproduction to each associated deployment, and the associated deployments perform rectifications on their own, without recording the rectification measures. 2why: Why are the rectification measures not recorded? 2answer: Personnel are not required to record the rectification measures (the associated deployment feedback rectification measures process has now been added)
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 1why:为什么只有原因分析，无对应的整改措施及整改记录1answer: 因为现处理流程为生产管理将欠产原因分析发送各关联部署，关联部署自 行进行整改，未对整改措施进行记录2why: 为什么未对整改措施进行记录 2answer: 未要求人员对整改措施进行记录(现已增加关联部署反馈整改措施流程)
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1. 부족생산 상황, 원인분석, 개선조치 등을 기록하기 위한 부족생산원장을 구축한다. 2. 가황기 한 대가 하루에 50개 이상 부족하게 생산되면 생산 관리 T가 이를 기록하고 감독자를 초빙하여 원인과 시정 조치에 대한 피드백을 배포합니다. 3. 생산관리 T는 정기적으로 장부를 정리하고, 주간 생산회의를 통해 생산부족 개선사항을 보고한다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1. Establish an under-production ledger to record the under-production situation, cause analysis, and improvement measures. 2. When a single vulcanizing machine is under-produced by more than 50 copies in a single day, the production management T records it, and invites supervisors to deploy feedback on the reasons and corrective measures. 3. The production management T organizes the ledger regularly, and reports on the improvement of under-production at weekly production meetings.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1.建立欠产台账，记录欠产情况、原因分析、改善措施2,设定单日单台硫化机欠产50本以上时，生产管理T记录在案，邀请表任部署反馈发生原因、整改措施3.生产管理T定期对台账进行整理，周生产会议上报告欠产改善情况

SUBJECT: 2025-BYD-01
POINT_OUT: 问题:设备台账管理有效性不足。证据:查企业设备的台账，发现存在相同规格的设备存在信息(如:出厂自带编号)统计不完整的情况。如:台账中有两台相同规格(BM440)的密炼机，仅统计了企业内部编号为C2001和C2002，但是没有统计他们各自的自带出厂编号、厂家等信息，设备台账中可追湖信息统计不完整，设备台账管理有效性不足。
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 1.why: 为什么设备台账未包含设备出厂编号、厂家等信息?1.answer:因为没有明确规定要求需要包含设备出厂编号、厂家等信息2.why:为什么不明确相应规定? 2.answer:因为不知道有这方面的管理要求
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1.修订<设备管理规定>标准文件，完善设备履历卡要求，明确设备台账应包含设备出厂编号、设备名称、设备型号设备厂家等相关信息。 2.根据要求完善设备信息台账
POINT_OUT_KO: 문제: 장비 원장 관리가 충분히 효과적이지 않습니다. 증거: 회사의 장비 장부를 확인하여 동일한 사양(예: 공장 일련 번호)을 가진 장비에 대한 불완전한 통계가 있음을 확인하십시오. 예를 들어, 원장에는 동일한 사양(BM440)의 내부 믹서가 두 개 있습니다. C2001 및 C2002의 내부 회사 번호만 계산되며 해당 공장 번호, 제조업체 및 기타 정보는 계산되지 않습니다. 장비대장 내 추적 가능한 정보에 대한 통계가 불완전하고, 장비대장 관리의 효율성이 미흡합니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: Problem: Equipment ledger management is not effective enough. Evidence: Check the company's equipment ledger and find that there are incomplete statistics on equipment with the same specifications (such as factory serial numbers). For example, there are two internal mixers of the same specifications (BM440) in the ledger. Only the internal company numbers of C2001 and C2002 are counted, but their respective factory numbers, manufacturers and other information are not counted. The statistics of traceable information in the equipment ledger are incomplete, and the effectiveness of equipment ledger management is insufficient.

SUBJECT: 2025-BYD-01
POINT_OUT: 问题:设备验收有效性不足。证据:企业《MO评价规定》(文件编号:P07-L61B-01-00)中规定常规项目设备验收的CMK21.0，特别特性项目设备验收的CMK21.33。抽查企业2025年3月19日完成验收的规格为BB320IM、内部编号为C2002的Mixer设备的验收记录，其中有包含各项精度检测记录和小批量的产品试制记录，但是并未包含《MQ评价规定》文件中要求的CMK符合性的验收记录，设备验收有效性不足。
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 1why,为什么未包含《MQ评价规定》文件中要求的CMK符合性的验收记录?1Answer.密炼机设备评价不具备CMK评价条件，密炼机评价内容应使用韩国本部内军 2why,为什么不用MQ评价规定，而要使用韩国本部内容?2Answer.MQ评价要领为纲领性的文件，没有对设备别详细的内容进行规定
COUNTER_MEASURE: PQ要领修订(MQ评价要领→PQ评价要领)
POINT_OUT_KO: 문제: 장비 승인의 효율성이 부족합니다. 증거: 기업의 "MO 평가 규정"(문서 번호: P07-L61B-01-00)에는 일반 프로젝트의 장비 승인에 대한 CMK21.0과 특수 특성 프로젝트의 장비 승인에 대한 CMK21.33이 규정되어 있습니다. 당사가 2025년 3월 19일에 완료한 사양 BB320IM, 내부번호 C2002인 Mixer 장비의 합격 기록에 대한 무작위 검사에는 각종 정확도 시험 기록과 소량 배치 제품 시험 생산 기록이 포함되어 있으나, "MQ 평가 규정" 문서에서 요구하는 CMK 준수 합격 기록은 포함되어 있지 않아 장비 합격의 실효성이 미흡합니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: Problem: Insufficient effectiveness of equipment acceptance. Evidence: The enterprise's "MO Evaluation Regulations" (document number: P07-L61B-01-00) stipulates CMK21.0 for the acceptance of equipment for regular projects and CMK21.33 for the acceptance of equipment for special characteristics projects. A random inspection of the acceptance records of the Mixer equipment with specification BB320IM and internal number C2002 completed by the company on March 19, 2025 includes various accuracy testing records and small batch product trial production records, but it does not include the acceptance records of CMK compliance required in the "MQ Evaluation Regulations" document, and the effectiveness of the equipment acceptance is insufficient.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 问题:设备验收有效性不足。证据:企业《MO评价规定》(文件编号:P07-L61B-01-00)中规定常规项目设备验收的CMK21.0，特别特性项目设备验收的CMK21.33。抽查企业2025年3月19日完成验收的规格为BB320IM、内部编号为C2002的Mixer设备的验收记录，其中有包含各项精度检测记录和小批量的产品试制记录，但是并未包含《MQ评价规定》文件中要求的CMK符合性的验收记录，设备验收有效性不足。
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 1왜, "MQ 평가 규정" 문서에 요구되는 CMK 준수 승인 기록이 포함되어 있지 않은 이유는 무엇입니까? 1답변. 내부 믹서 장비 평가는 CMK 평가 조건을 충족하지 않으며, 내부 믹서 평가 내용은 한국 본사 내에서 활용되어야 합니다. 2why, MQ 평가규정을 사용하지 않고 한국 본사의 컨텐츠를 사용하는 이유는 무엇입니까? 2답변. MQ 평가 필수 사항은 프로그래밍 방식의 문서이며 장비의 세부 내용을 지정하지 않습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: 1why, why is it that the CMK compliance acceptance record required in the "MQ Evaluation Regulations" document is not included? 1Answer. The internal mixer equipment evaluation does not meet the CMK evaluation conditions, and the internal mixer evaluation content should be used within the Korean headquarters. 2why, why not use the MQ evaluation regulations, but use the content of the Korean headquarters? 2Answer. The MQ evaluation essentials is a programmatic document and does not specify the detailed content of the equipment.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 1why,为什么未包含《MQ评价规定》文件中要求的CMK符合性的验收记录?1Answer.密炼机设备评价不具备CMK评价条件，密炼机评价内容应使用韩国本部内军 2why,为什么不用MQ评价规定，而要使用韩国本部内容?2Answer.MQ评价要领为纲领性的文件，没有对设备别详细的内容进行规定
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: PQ필수 개정(MQ평가필수→PQ평가필수)
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Revision of PQ essentials (MQ evaluation essentials→PQ evaluation essentials)
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: PQ要领修订(MQ评价要领→PQ评价要领)

SUBJECT: 2025-BYD-01
POINT_OUT: 问题:设备维修统计分析后的措施落地有效性不足。证据:查企业2025年设备维修统计分析记录，其中2025年6月的维修实绩值为2.628、高于企业2025年目标值2.375企业给出的问题描述、原因分析及措施记录为:密炼工程中6月29日C2004设备TCU 24V控制器电源短路故障停机时间5小时;原因分析为TCU腔体传感器老化短路:临时措施为故障传感器拆除交替,长期措施为扩散检查所有TCU相同位置传感器，老化交替处理。企业现场对于该问题的长期措施未提供有效的落地改善记录。
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 1.why: 为什么没有长期措施的改善实绩? .answer:有长期措施的改善实绩 2.why: 为什么没有体现在设备维修统计分析的结果中?2.answer:未及时整理汇总
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1.实际保有，审核时未及时提供 2.12月起针对设备维修统计分析未达标而采取的改善措施建立改善跟踪登记台账，实时跟踪改善进展并记录改善实绩，直至改善完了。
POINT_OUT_KO: 문제: 장비 유지 관리에 대한 통계적 분석 후 구현된 조치가 충분히 효과적이지 않습니다. 근거: 회사의 2025년 장비 정비 통계 분석 기록을 확인하세요. 2025년 6월 실제 정비 실적 값은 2.628로, 회사의 2025년 목표 값인 2.375보다 높습니다. 회사에서 제공한 문제 설명, 원인 분석 및 조치 기록은 다음과 같습니다. 6월 29일 내부 혼합 프로젝트의 C2004 장비 TCU 24V 컨트롤러 전원 공급 장치 단락 오류로 인한 가동 중지 시간은 5시간 동안 지속되었습니다. 원인은 TCU 캐비티 센서의 노후화 단락으로 분석됐다. 임시 대책은 불량 센서를 제거하고 교체하는 것이었고, 장기적 대책은 같은 위치에 있는 모든 TCU 센서를 분산 점검해 교대로 노후화를 처리하는 것이었다. 이 문제에 대한 회사의 현장 장기 조치는 효과적인 구현 개선 기록을 제공하지 못했습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: Problem: Measures implemented after statistical analysis of equipment maintenance are not effective enough. Evidence: Check the company's equipment maintenance statistical analysis records in 2025. The actual maintenance performance value in June 2025 is 2.628, which is higher than the company's target value for 2025 of 2.375. The problem description, cause analysis and measure records given by the company are: C2004 equipment TCU in the internal mixing project on June 29 The 24V controller power supply short-circuit fault downtime lasted 5 hours; the cause was analyzed as aging short-circuit of the TCU cavity sensor: the temporary measure was to remove the faulty sensor and replace it, and the long-term measure was to diffusely check all TCU sensors in the same position, and deal with aging alternately. The company's on-site long-term measures for this problem did not provide effective implementation improvement records.

SUBJECT: 2025-BYD-01
POINT_OUT: 问题:关键工序三定管理有效性不足。证据:查企业现场关键工序-硫化工序，其中编号为K2108的硫化机上有张贴“途虎规格机台”标识卡。但是对于该关键工序的“定人“和“定工艺”，现场并未能有效给出。如:A班、B班、C班各班次认可的该工序作业人员是谁，使用何种工艺标准，现场均未有效提供，关键工序三定管理有效性不足。
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: why:为什么该关键工序未进行“定人"“定工艺”管理?Ianswer:该工序的作业人员指定为设定人员，工艺标准在硫化示方中有体现，工艺 标准和人员信息未考虑通过标识卡体现 2why:为什么在标识卡上只有体现规格机台? 2answer:OE机台管理时统一由设定人员管理，工艺标准在作界面可以直观看到标识卡只为区分OE机台与一般机台的差异，未标识人员和工艺标准

SUBJECT: 2025-BYD-01
POINT_OUT: 问题:制程检验策划不合理。证据:查企业制程-的密炼后BT检验(CPCQC48T147产品)标准(ECN:ECN2025093350)中规定:T50项目中值为90、下限为77、上限为104、单位为秒。查企业近期该CPCQC48T147产品检验记录，发现该产品是通过检验设备自动检测、完成后数据自动同步到MES系统上、系统进行自动判定。抽查2025年11月19日已检合格的该CPCOC48T147产品的MES系统内检验记录，发现:T50项目给出的标准中值为1.58、下限为1.28、上限为1.73、单位为分,系统上标准由分转化为秒后为:中值为94.8、下限为76.8、上限为103.8，该标准同检验规范中的标准不一致，制程检验策划不合理。
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 1why,为什么GMES 和示方系统不一致? answer:GMES 接收到示方书系统数据后进行了转换，秒转换成分钟。 2why,为什么需要转换成分钟? 2answer:测试机器上是分钟，传导到GMES上数据是分钟格式3why,为什么测试机器上是分钟，不是秒? 3answer:建厂初期设备增设时默认是分钟，未进行时间格式设定，GMES 进行了秒和分钟的单位转换。 4why,为什么 GMES 单位分钟转换有误差? 4answer:GMES 转换时存在小数点四舍五入情况，分钟一秒换算差异0.2秒。
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1>IT U 修改Gmes T50项目的Spec&实绩显示以秒为单位2:BT设备监测结果上传更改为以秒为单位

ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 1왜, GMES와 처방제도가 일치하지 않는 이유는 무엇인가요? 답변: GMES는 처방 시스템의 데이터를 수신한 후 초를 분으로 변환했습니다. 2왜, 왜 분으로 변환해야 하나요? 2답변: 테스트 머신은 분 단위지만 GMES로 전송되는 데이터는 분 형식입니다. 3why, 테스트 머신은 왜 초 단위가 아닌 분 단위인가요? 3답변: 공장 초기에 장비를 추가할 때는 기본값이 분이었고, 시간 형식은 설정되지 않았습니다. GMES는 초와 분 단위를 변환했습니다. 4왜, GMES 단위를 분으로 변환할 때 오류가 발생하는 이유는 무엇입니까? 4답변: GMES 변환 시 소수점 반올림 현상이 발생하며, 분과 초의 변환 차이는 0.2초입니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: 1why, why are GMES and the prescription system inconsistent? answer: GMES converted the data from the prescription system after receiving it, converting seconds into minutes. 2why, why does it need to be converted into minutes? 2answer: The test machine is in minutes, but the data transmitted to GMES is in minute format. 3why, why is the test machine in minutes, not seconds? 3answer: When the equipment was added in the early days of the factory, the default was minutes, and the time format was not set. GMES converted the units of seconds and minutes. 4why, why is there an error in the conversion of GMES units to minutes? 4answer: There is rounding of decimal points during GMES conversion, and the conversion difference between minutes and seconds is 0.2 seconds.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 1why,为什么GMES 和示方系统不一致? answer:GMES 接收到示方书系统数据后进行了转换，秒转换成分钟。 2why,为什么需要转换成分钟? 2answer:测试机器上是分钟，传导到GMES上数据是分钟格式3why,为什么测试机器上是分钟，不是秒? 3answer:建厂初期设备增设时默认是分钟，未进行时间格式设定，GMES 进行了秒和分钟的单位转换。 4why,为什么 GMES 单位分钟转换有误差? 4answer:GMES 转换时存在小数点四舍五入情况，分钟一秒换算差异0.2秒。

POINT_OUT: 台账信息错误:查《实验室计量仪器台账》，发现静特性试验机(3吨)设备的仪器编号与实物编号不符，台账显示为CT-C-03-01,实物编号为CT-C-18-01。台账需要进一步排查和更新
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Iwhy: 为什么台账编号与机器实际标号不一致? Ianswer: 因为在多次更新台帐时，表格更新错误 2why: 为什么表格更新错误? 2answer: 因为人为更新时导致匹配错误: 3why: 为什么人为更新时会有匹配错误? 3answer: 因为表格为开放性表格，未锁定基本信息: (现已全部锁定设备基本信息，不允许修改，保证设备信息的一致性)
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1.机台别重新确认设备编号，逐一对应后将Exce| 文件的 设备基本信息单元格全部锁定，只允许修改校正日期，确保台帐与机器的一致性;

SUBJECT: 2025-BYD-01
POINT_OUT: 个别设备验收有不足:如审核员要求查看现场试验设备TBR强度试验机(CT-C-03-01)的设备验收记录，现场没有提供。再查其点检维护记录，发现策划的内容不清晰，可执行性不强如点检"Oi 是否充足”，审核员问点检人廖工，这项目没有可目视的油表，也看不到润油，应该怎么点检，点检人无法回答，实际是凭感觉作动无摩擦声就判定为充足。
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 强度试验机验收记录未及时提供原因分析 1why:为什么没有现场提供验收记录? Ianswer:2012年入库设备，时间早，纸质记录已经存入文件库。纸质记录存入文件库，人工查找起来多花费了一些时间，彼时未形成电子化管理:2why:为什么没有形成实行电子化管理: 2answer:从2017年11月开始改善，全部设备投资项目验收Arena系统审批管理添附电子附件管理; 点检维护记录问题原因分析 1why: 为什么试验机,点检员工执行困难? Ianswer: 因为在点检表中 点检项目和判定标准 不清楚 why: 为什么试验机点检员工执行困难? ansuwer 因为在占检表中占检顶目和判完标准不法梦
COUNTER_MEASURE: .找到后扫描文件反馈;并确认到自2017年起 开始实施文件电子化管理，2017年之后的验收记录等重要文件已通过电子化文档集中 存储于OA系统(Arena系统)，通过关键词快速目方便查找 2.根据点检项目明确可操作性确认内容，由义子远叫以力点片参照确认，确保点检内容清晰，提高可执行性、indO\3.其他机台点检表扩散工

ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: why: 为什么检验人员提供检验规范的关联文件时，查找的过程中较为繁?Ianswer:因为员工现场使用试验标准 确认有GB标准引用，但对成品检验规范及GB关联不熟惑 2WHY:为什么对成品检验规范及GB关联不熟悉? 2answer因为成品检验规范的可说性、指导性不足? 3why: 为什么成品检验规范的可阅性、指导性不足? 3answer因为GB的要求未引用至《成品定期质量市查要领 4why:为什么GB的要求来引用至，成品定期质量市查要领?? 4answer 因为《成品定期质量审查要领》中未关联GB对应试验项目的试验标准 (现已项目别关联对应试验标准，便于指导员工)

POINT_OUT_EN: Insufficient planning of inspection specifications: For example, finished product inspection specifications "Guidelines for Regular Quality Market Inspection of Finished Products" CH5-L43E-01-05-0 9th Edition The planned experimental projects include high-speed testing, durability testing, strength and medical-free testing, but there are no experimental criteria (or information from cited documents). In fact, the experimental methods and criteria for the above experimental projects must reference information from multiple national standards and internal documents, such as GBIT4502, "PL88 Durability Test Conditions" R D5-R10U-08-00 and other special documents, when asking inspectors to provide related documents of inspection specifications, the search process is relatively cumbersome. Based on the above, the readability and guidance of finished product inspection specifications are insufficient. In the future, it is necessary to convert the requirements and standards of enterprise standards and GB into on-site documents to facilitate inspection by inspectors:

SUBJECT: 2025-Others-01
POINT_OUT: 影响质量的关键岗位能力和技能识别过程存在缺失
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 1.	为什么职位说明书没有相关要求？   答：因为当初编写职位说明书时，主要关注了行政管理和通用职责，忽略了具体的技术和质量能力要求。 2.	为什么编写时会忽略这些关键要求？     答：因为在文件管理流程中，未识别出职位说明书是影响产品符合性、过程有效性的关键文件，因此未将其纳入标准化管理的范畴。
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1.	1、首先识别出质量相关的关键岗位，并确认了技能描述缺失的岗位，制定了《技术/设备部关键岗位技能补充要求》（附件1），明确了该岗位在质量体系和专业技能方面的具体要求，作为现有职位说明书的临时补充；
POINT_OUT_KO: 影响质의 무게는 关键岗位能力과 技能识别过程存에서
POINT_OUT_EN: 影响质量的关键岗位能力和技能识别过程存在缺失
POINT_OUT_ZH: 影响质量的关键岗位能力和技能识别过程存在缺失
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 1. 직무기술서에 관련 요구사항이 없는 이유는 무엇입니까?   답변: 직무 설명이 원래 작성되었을 때 특정 기술 및 품질 역량 요구 사항을 무시하고 주로 행정 관리 및 일반 책임에 중점을 두었기 때문입니다. 2. 글을 쓸 때 왜 이러한 중요한 요구 사항이 무시되었습니까?     답변: 문서관리 과정에서 직무기술서는 제품 준수 및 프로세스 효율성에 영향을 미치는 핵심문서로 파악되지 않았기 때문에 표준화된 관리 범위에 포함되지 않았습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: 1. Why are there no relevant requirements in the job description?   Answer: Because when the job description was originally written, it focused mainly on administrative management and general responsibilities, ignoring specific technical and quality competency requirements. 2. Why were these critical requirements ignored when writing?     Answer: Because in the document management process, the job description was not identified as a key document that affects product compliance and process effectiveness, it was not included in the scope of standardized management.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 1.	为什么职位说明书没有相关要求？   答：因为当初编写职位说明书时，主要关注了行政管理和通用职责，忽略了具体的技术和质量能力要求。 2.	为什么编写时会忽略这些关键要求？     答：因为在文件管理流程中，未识别出职位说明书是影响产品符合性、过程有效性的关键文件，因此未将其纳入标准化管理的范畴。
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1. 1. 먼저, 품질 관련 핵심 직위를 파악하고, 기술 설명이 누락된 직위를 확인하고, 기존 직무 기술서에 대한 임시 보완으로 품질 시스템 및 전문 기술 측면에서 이 직위에 대한 구체적인 요구 사항을 명시한 "기술/장비 부서 핵심 직위의 보충 기술 요구 사항"(부록 1)을 공식화합니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1. 1. First, identify the key positions related to quality, and confirm the positions with missing skill descriptions, and formulate the "Supplementary Skill Requirements for Key Positions in the Technology/Equipment Department" (Appendix 1), which clarifies the specific requirements for this position in terms of quality system and professional skills, as a temporary supplement to the existing job description;
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1.	1、首先识别出质量相关的关键岗位，并确认了技能描述缺失的岗位，制定了《技术/设备部关键岗位技能补充要求》（附件1），明确了该岗位在质量体系和专业技能方面的具体要求，作为现有职位说明书的临时补充；

SUBJECT: 2025-Others-01
POINT_OUT: 物流外包服务管理的文件化过程存在缺失
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 1、	为什么物流外包服务管理的文件化过程存在缺失？ 答：因为《运输公司管理要领》CHS-L44I-00-01未明确规定运载能力、路证资质、车辆状况、异常加急情形下的配合的要求。  2、	为什么《运输公司管理要领》CHS-L44I-00-01没有明确规定？ 答：因为内部点检、应急活动预案等包含运载能力、路证资质、车辆状况、异常加急情形下的配合等要求，故未将系列要求列入《运输公司管理要领》CHS-L44I-00-01中。
COUNTER_MEASURE: 确认运载能力、路政资质、车辆状况、异常加急情形在《运输公司管理要领》CHS-L44I-00-01中没有规定，立即着手拟定将以上要求补充进程序文件《运输公司管理要领》CHS-L44I-00-01中。 在程序文件正式生效前，由以下内部自主管理文件进行风险控制： 1、	运载能力 2、	路政资质韩泰轮胎运输招标公示书》中有明确要求； 3、车辆状况 4、	异常加急情形
POINT_OUT_KO: 물류 아웃소싱 서비스 관리의 문서화된 프로세스에 결함이 있습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: There are deficiencies in the documented process of logistics outsourcing service management
POINT_OUT_ZH: 物流外包服务管理的文件化过程存在缺失
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 1. 물류 아웃소싱 서비스 관리에 있어서 문서화된 프로세스가 부족한 이유는 무엇입니까? 답변: "운송회사 관리 필수사항" CHS-L44I-00-01에는 운반 능력, 도로 허가 자격, 차량 상태, 비정상적인 비상 상황에서의 협조에 대한 요구 사항이 명확하게 규정되어 있지 않기 때문입니다.  2. "운송회사 경영필수사항" CHS-L44I-00-01에 명확한 규정이 없는 이유는 무엇입니까? 답: 내부점검, 비상조치계획 등에는 운반능력, 도로면허 자격, 차량상태, 비정상적인 비상상황에서의 협조 등의 요구사항이 포함되어 있기 때문에 일련의 요구사항은 "운송회사 경영필수사항" CHS-L44I-00-01에는 포함되어 있지 않습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: 1. Why is there a lack of documented process in logistics outsourcing service management? Answer: Because the "Transportation Company Management Essentials" CHS-L44I-00-01 does not clearly stipulate the requirements for carrying capacity, road permit qualification, vehicle status, and cooperation in abnormal emergency situations.  2. Why is there no clear provision in "Transportation Company Management Essentials" CHS-L44I-00-01? Answer: Because internal inspections, emergency action plans, etc. include requirements such as carrying capacity, road certificate qualifications, vehicle conditions, and cooperation in abnormal emergency situations, the series of requirements are not included in the "Transportation Company Management Essentials" CHS-L44I-00-01.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 1、	为什么物流外包服务管理的文件化过程存在缺失？ 答：因为《运输公司管理要领》CHS-L44I-00-01未明确规定运载能力、路证资质、车辆状况、异常加急情形下的配合的要求。  2、	为什么《运输公司管理要领》CHS-L44I-00-01没有明确规定？ 答：因为内部点检、应急活动预案等包含运载能力、路证资质、车辆状况、异常加急情形下的配合等要求，故未将系列要求列入《运输公司管理要领》CHS-L44I-00-01中。
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: "운송회사 경영필수사항" CHS-L44I-00-01에는 운반능력, 도로관리자격, 차량상태, 이상긴급상황 등이 규정되어 있지 않은 것으로 확인된다. 우리는 즉시 위의 요구 사항을 공식화하여 절차 문서 "운송 회사 관리 필수사항" CHS-L44I-00-01에 추가하기 시작했습니다. 프로그램 문서가 공식적으로 발효되기 전에 다음과 같은 내부 독립 관리 문서에 따라 위험 관리가 수행됩니다. 1. 운반 능력 2. 도로 행정 자격 한국타이어 운송 입찰 공고에는 명확한 요구 사항이 있습니다. 3. 차량상태 4. 비정상적인 긴급 상황
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: It is confirmed that the carrying capacity, road management qualifications, vehicle conditions, and abnormal emergency situations are not stipulated in the "Transportation Company Management Essentials" CHS-L44I-00-01. We immediately started to formulate and add the above requirements into the procedural document "Transportation Company Management Essentials" CHS-L44I-00-01. Before the program documents officially take effect, risk control will be carried out by the following internal independent management documents: 1. Carrying capacity 2. Road administration qualifications There are clear requirements in the Hankook Tire Transportation Tender Announcement; 3. Vehicle status 4. Abnormal emergency situations
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 确认运载能力、路政资质、车辆状况、异常加急情形在《运输公司管理要领》CHS-L44I-00-01中没有规定，立即着手拟定将以上要求补充进程序文件《运输公司管理要领》CHS-L44I-00-01中。 在程序文件正式生效前，由以下内部自主管理文件进行风险控制： 1、	运载能力 2、	路政资质韩泰轮胎运输招标公示书》中有明确要求； 3、车辆状况 4、	异常加急情形

SUBJECT: 2025-Others-01
POINT_OUT: 控制计划中密炼过程的橡胶重量管理存在缺失
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 为什么密炼示方书不科学，实绩会有偏差，但密炼示方书内容中没有允许误差?← 答:因为密炼示方书由公司内部PLM系统生成，只有标准值，PLM系统无法设置允许误差标识。允许误差由公司内部MES系统进行设置并控制。故打印的密炼示方书只有标准值没有允许允许误差。“ 2.为什么将未包含允许误差内容的下级文件(示方书)引用到控制计划中?←答:控制计划制作时认为在引用了示方书及MES自动控制的情况下，不需要在“产品规范/过程公差栏中进行“允许误差范围”的描述。←
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1.立即确认C2002机台生产的橡胶重量允许误差标准是否有效及计量实绩是否守了允许误差管理范围。并确认全部密炼机(大胎.TBR4台，小胎PCR4台，总共8台)橡胶重量允许误差范围均按要求进行了管理。2.完成时间:2025.11.10责任人:李俊/周邦科/刘欢/李浩亮对控制计划中的A/Q作业过程中的“橡胶重量”条款明确规范公差:“100kg未满计量时士1kg;100kg 以上计量时，士1%”司时确认大胎(TBR)控制计划中的描述已包含公差范围，不需要修改。
POINT_OUT_KO: 控管划中密炼过程的橡胶weight管理存在缺失
POINT_OUT_EN: There are deficiencies in rubber weight management during the mixing process in the control plan
POINT_OUT_ZH: 控制计划中密炼过程的橡胶重量管理存在缺失
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 비법서가 비과학적이고 실제 성능은 편향될 수 있는데 왜 비법서의 내용에는 허용 가능한 오류가 없는 걸까요? ← 답변: 비밀 레시피 북은 회사 내부 PLM 시스템에서 생성되며 표준 값만 가지고 있기 때문에 PLM 시스템에서는 허용되는 오류 표시를 설정할 수 없습니다. 허용오차는 회사 내부 MES 시스템에 의해 설정 및 관리됩니다. 따라서 인쇄된 비밀 레시피북에는 표준값만 있으며 허용되는 오류는 없습니다. " 2. 허용오차가 없는 하위문서(처방설명서)를 관리계획서에 인용하는 이유는 무엇입니까? ← 답변: 관리계획서 작성 시 처방설명서 및 MES 자동제어를 인용할 때 "제품규격/공정공차란"에 "허용오차 범위"를 기재할 필요가 없다고 생각하였습니다. ← 답변
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Why is the secret recipe book unscientific and the actual performance will be biased, but there is no allowable error in the content of the secret recipe book? ← Answer: Because the secret recipe book is generated by the company's internal PLM system and has only standard values, the PLM system cannot set the allowable error mark. The allowable error is set and controlled by the company's internal MES system. Therefore, the printed secret recipe book only has standard values ​​and no allowable errors. " 2. Why are subordinate documents (prescription instructions) that do not contain allowable errors quoted into the control plan? ← Answer: When making the control plan, it was considered that when the prescription instructions and MES automatic control were cited, there was no need to describe the "allowable error range" in the "Product Specification/Process Tolerance column." ←
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 为什么密炼示方书不科学，实绩会有偏差，但密炼示方书内容中没有允许误差?← 答:因为密炼示方书由公司内部PLM系统生成，只有标准值，PLM系统无法设置允许误差标识。允许误差由公司内部MES系统进行设置并控制。故打印的密炼示方书只有标准值没有允许允许误差。“ 2.为什么将未包含允许误差内容的下级文件(示方书)引用到控制计划中?←答:控制计划制作时认为在引用了示方书及MES自动控制的情况下，不需要在“产品规范/过程公差栏中进行“允许误差范围”的描述。←
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1. C2002 기계에서 생산된 고무분동의 허용오차 기준이 유효한지, 측정성능이 허용오차관리범위에 적합한지 즉시 확인한다. 또한 모든 내부 믹서(대형 타이어 TBR 4대, 소형 타이어 PCR 4대, 총 8대)의 고무 중량 허용 오차 범위를 필요에 따라 관리되는 것으로 확인됐다. 2. 완료 시기: 2025.11.10 담당자: Li Jun/Zhou Bangke/Liu Huan/Li Haoliang 관리 계획에서 A/Q 작업 과정의 "고무 무게" 조항에 대한 허용 오차를 명확하게 명시했습니다: "100kg이 가득 찼을 때 ±1kg, 100kg 이상 측정할 때 ±1%." 회사는 대형타이어(TBR) 관리계획서 기재사항에 허용범위가 포함되어 있어 수정할 필요가 없음을 확인했다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1. Immediately confirm whether the allowable error standard for the rubber weight produced by the C2002 machine is valid and whether the measurement performance complies with the allowable error management range. It was also confirmed that the allowable error range of the rubber weight of all internal mixers (4 large-tire TBR units, 4 small-tire PCR units, 8 units in total) were managed as required. 2. Completion time: 2025.11.10 Responsible person: Li Jun/Zhou Bangke/Liu Huan/Li Haoliang clearly specified the tolerance for the "rubber weight" clause in the A/Q operation process in the control plan: "When 100kg is less than full, ±1kg; when 100kg or more is measured, ±1%." The company confirmed that the description in the large tire (TBR) control plan has included the tolerance range and does not need to be modified.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1.立即确认C2002机台生产的橡胶重量允许误差标准是否有效及计量实绩是否守了允许误差管理范围。并确认全部密炼机(大胎.TBR4台，小胎PCR4台，总共8台)橡胶重量允许误差范围均按要求进行了管理。2.完成时间:2025.11.10责任人:李俊/周邦科/刘欢/李浩亮对控制计划中的A/Q作业过程中的“橡胶重量”条款明确规范公差:“100kg未满计量时士1kg;100kg 以上计量时，士1%”司时确认大胎(TBR)控制计划中的描述已包含公差范围，不需要修改。

SUBJECT: 2025-Benz-V540-01
POINT_OUT: 压出过程规格交替后初期，2次重量NG多发，Recoup发生率高
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 当时 由规格225→255规格， 规格差异大，初期稳定时间长，2次重量NG 多发
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1.规格别集中1个班生产，减少规格交替 （生产计划控制） 2. 计划制订时宽度接近规格放一起，连续生产（L长 1次/班 确认）
POINT_OUT_KO: 압출 공정 사양 변경 후 초기에는 2차 중량 NG가 자주 발생하여 Recoup 발생률이 높습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: In the early stage after extrusion process specifications are changed, the 2nd weight NG occurs frequently and the incidence of Recoup is high.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 压出过程规格交替后初期，2次重量NG多发，Recoup发生率高
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 당시 사양이 225에서 255로 바뀌었습니다. 사양차이가 크고, 초기 안정화 시간이 길고, 2차 웨이트가 다발에 NG였습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: At that time, the specification changed from 225 to 255. The specification difference was large, the initial stabilization time was long, and the 2nd weight was NG for multiple shots.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 当时 由规格225→255规格， 规格差异大，初期稳定时间长，2次重量NG 多发
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1.规格别集中1个班生产，减少规格交替 （生产计划控控） 2.计划客时宽島接近规格放一起，连续生产（L长 1次/班 确认）
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1.规格别集中1个班生产，减少规格交替 （生产计划控制） 2. 计划制订时宽度接近规格放一起，连续生产（L长 1次/班 确认）
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1.规格别集中1个班生产，减少规格交替（生产计划控制） 2.计划宽度时宽度接近规格放一起，连续生产（L长1次/班确认）

POINT_OUT_EN: The problem points in the process audit report are not completely improved, such as: logistics outbound tire FIFO is not followed, and the improvement countermeasures are not comprehensive.

ROOT_CAUSE_EN: The analysis of process audit problems is simple and not the root cause, resulting in incomplete improvements.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 过程审核问题分析简单，非根本原因，导致改善不彻底
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 2. 제품을 구매하는 데 있어 WMS软件管理 ude入库轮胎，订单由系统按光先入先流分配后流库给客户，避免FIFO未遵守情况。
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1.对过程审核发现的问题，改善方法采用5Y分析法，从体系流程Process根本处彻底改善   2. 成品仓库使用WMS软件管理出入库轮胎，订单由系统按照先入先出分配后出库给客户，避免FIFO未遵守情况。

SUBJECT: 2025-Benz-V540-01
POINT_OUT: The V540 tire development and release can catch up the BBAC car building timing. For the V174 and V178 tire, the development and  release is delay, even the background causes were about the Hankook or Mercedes-Benz updated optimization requirement.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: According to the info received from Mr. Hailong Chen (Mercedes-Benz China), there is a high possibility of re-developing 225/45R18W XL size (V178 all-around & V174 front tire) due to vehicle dynamics of the PT vehicle (mass production car)  It is believed that MB China is currently going through an internal process during which a final decision is being made by the upper management including the German MB headquarters  MB China also requires RRc target to be lowered from 5.6 to 5.5, considering the aerodynamics performance of competitor (Goodyear) * Our tires are believed to be slightly worse than Goodyear in terms of aerodynamics
COUNTER_MEASURE: Although official decision is still being made on the MB China side, Hankook believes that a new mold for 225/45R18W XL must be designed and manufactured in order to meet the new RRc target of 5.5 while also trying to improve its handling on the PT vehicle  Hankook R&D will initiate the new mold design process immediately to be ready when MB China gives the final decision on re-development of the 225-size.
POINT_OUT_KO: V540 타이어 개발 및 출시로 BBAC 자동차 제작 시기를 따라잡을 수 있다. V174 및 V178 타이어의 경우 개발 및 출시가 지연되고 있으며, 배경 원인조차도 한국이나 메르세데스-벤츠의 업데이트된 최적화 요구 사항에 관한 것이었습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: The V540 tire development and release can catch up the BBAC car building timing. For the V174 and V178 tire, the development and  release is delay, even the background causes were about the Hankook or Mercedes-Benz updated optimization requirement.
POINT_OUT_ZH: V540轮胎的开发和发布可以赶上BBAC造车时机。对于V174和V178轮胎，开发和发布都被推迟，甚至背景原因都是关于韩泰或梅赛德斯-奔驰更新的优化要求。
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: Hailong Chen(Mercedes-Benz China)으로부터 받은 정보에 따르면, PT 차량(양산차)의 차량 동역학으로 인해 225/45R18W XL 사이즈(V178 올라운드 & V174 앞 타이어)를 재개발할 가능성이 높다고 합니다. MB China는 현재 내부 프로세스를 진행 중이며, 그 과정에서 독일 MB 본사를 포함한 고위 경영진이 최종 결정을 내리는 것으로 알려져 있습니다. MB China도 RRc 목표를 요구합니다. 경쟁사(굿이어) 공력 성능을 고려하여 5.6에서 5.5로 하향 조정 * 당사 타이어는 굿이어에 비해 공력 성능이 다소 떨어지는 것으로 판단됩니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: According to the info received from Mr. Hailong Chen (Mercedes-Benz China), there is a high possibility of re-developing 225/45R18W XL size (V178 all-around & V174 front tire) due to vehicle dynamics of the PT vehicle (mass production car)  It is believed that MB China is currently going through an internal process during which a final decision is being made by the upper management including the German MB headquarters  MB China also requires RRc target to be lowered from 5.6 to 5.5, considering the aerodynamics performance of competitor (Goodyear) * Our tires are believed to be slightly worse than Goodyear in terms of aerodynamics
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 据梅赛德斯-奔驰中国陈海龙先生透露，由于PT车（量产车）的整车动力，重新开发225/45R18W XL尺寸（V178全能+V174前胎）的可能性很大。相信MB中国目前正在内部流程中，包括德国MB总部在内的高层正在做出最终决定MB中国也要求RRc目标为考虑到竞争对手（固特异）的空气动力学性能，从 5.6 降低至 5.5 * 我们的轮胎在空气动力学方面据信比固特异稍差
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: Although official decision is still being made on the MB China side, Hankook believes that a new mold for 225/45R18W XL must be designed and manufactured in order to meet the new RRc target of 5.5 while also trying to improve its handling on the PT vehicle  Hankook R&D will initiate the new mold design process immediately to be ready when MB China gives the final decision on re-development of the 225-size.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Although official decision is still being made on the MB China side, Hankook believes that a new mold for 225/45R18W XL must be designed and manufactured in order to meet the new RRc target of 5.5 while also trying to improve its handling on the PT vehicle Hankook R&D will initiate the new mold design process immediately to be ready when MB China gives the final decision on re-development of the 225-size.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 尽管MB中国方面仍在做出正式决定，但韩泰轮胎相信必须设计和制造225/45R18W XL的新模具，以满足新的RRc 5.5目标，同时努力改善PT车辆的操控性。韩泰轮胎研发部将立即启动新模具设计流程，以便在MB中国做出重新开发225尺寸的最终决定时做好准备。

POINT_OUT: 完成Bead自动称量秤点检记录中① 点检表缺少管理标准内容② 其中一组数据4~5次偏差较大，第6次点检满足标准，后续如何处理合格的要描述变化的原因。③ 完成Bead 重量现场看到是200~600g范围，精度点检只有500g、1000g 两组校准，点检范围 应能覆盖完成Bead重量范围(检讨反馈)

POINT_OUT_KO: 완성된 비드 자동저울 검사기록부에는 ① 검사표에 관리기준 내용이 부족합니다. ② 한 세트의 데이터가 4~5배 정도 편차가 크며, 6차 검사에서는 기준을 만족합니다. 후속 검사를 처리하는 방법은 변경 이유를 설명해야 합니다. ③ 완성된 비드의 무게는 현장에서 200~600g 범위로 확인되며, 정확도 확인은 500g, 1000g 2세트에 대해서만 이루어집니다. 확인 범위는 완성된 비드의 무게 범위를 커버할 수 있어야 합니다. (피드백 검토)
POINT_OUT_EN: In the completed Bead automatic weighing scale inspection record, ① the inspection table lacks management standard content ② One set of data has large deviations 4 to 5 times, and the sixth inspection meets the standards. How to deal with the subsequent inspections should describe the reasons for the changes. ③ The weight of the completed Bead is seen on site to be in the range of 200~600g, and the accuracy check is only for two sets of calibrations of 500g and 1000g. The check range should be able to cover the weight range of the completed Bead (review feedback)

SUBJECT: 2025-Benz-VAN.EA-01
POINT_OUT: 1.原材料仓库有过期药品，材料未及时按照废弃流程处理，里面有22年过期材料；2.仓库边部区域帘布隔离外存放原材料，未进行温湿度管理
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 此处非原材料仓库区域，存放的原料为临时过渡性拜访
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1.区域内原料禁止存放；2.长期在库原料生产部废弃完了
POINT_OUT_KO: 1. 원자재 창고에 유효기간이 지난 약품이 있고, 폐기물 처리과정에 따라 자재가 제때에 폐기되지 않습니다. 내부에는 유효기간이 22년인 자료가 있습니다. 2. 원자재는 창고 가장자리의 커튼 격리 외부에 보관되며 온도 및 습도 관리가 이루어지지 않습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: 1. There are expired drugs in the raw material warehouse, and the materials are not disposed of in time according to the waste process. There are 22-year expired materials inside; 2. The raw materials are stored outside the curtain isolation in the edge area of the warehouse, and no temperature and humidity management is carried out.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 1.原材料仓库有过期药品，材料未及时按照废弃流程处理，里面有22年过期材料；2.仓库边部区域帘布隔离外存放原材料，未进行温湿度管理
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 이곳은 원자재 창고 구역이 아니며, 보관된 원자재는 임시 임시 방문용입니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: This is not a raw material warehouse area, and the raw materials stored are for temporary transitional visits.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 此处非原材料仓库区域，存放的原料为临时过渡性拜访
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1. 해당 지역에서는 원자재의 저장이 금지되어 있습니다. 2. 장기간 보관되어 있던 원재료의 생산부서를 폐기하였습니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1. The storage of raw materials is prohibited in the area; 2. The production department of raw materials that have been stored for a long time has been discarded.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1.区域内原料禁止存放；2.长期在库原料生产部废弃完了

SUBJECT: 2025-Benz-VAN.EA-01
POINT_OUT: 气密层半成品外观有灰白色出现，无相关管理标准
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 1.压延辊速度不均；2.开炼辊，压延本体辊收边胶没控制好
COUNTER_MEASURE: 收边胶量管理：本体辊上胶量定量维持，异常原因作业停止时，橡胶拱胶终止，维持一定量的收边胶量。收边胶量基准：压延本体，10cm以下；开炼辊，20cm以下
POINT_OUT_KO: 기밀층 반제품의 외관은 황백색이며 관련 관리 기준이 없습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: The appearance of the semi-finished product of the airtight layer is off-white, and there are no relevant management standards.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 气密层半成品外观有灰白色出现，无相关管理标准
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 1.压延辊速道不均;2.开炼辊,压延本体辊收边胶没控移好
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: 1. The speed of the calendering roller is uneven; 2. The edge glue of the opening roller and the calendering body roller is not well controlled.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 1.压延辊速度不均；2.开炼辊，压延本体辊收边胶没控制好
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: Edge Closing Glue 양 관리 : 메인 롤러의 Glue 양을 정량적으로 유지합니다. 비정상적인 이유로 작업이 중지되면 고무 아치 접착제가 중지되고 일정량의 가장자리 마감 접착제가 유지됩니다. 가장자리 마감 접착제의 표준 양: 캘린더링 본체, 10cm 미만; 오프닝 롤러, 20cm 이하
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Management of the amount of edge closing glue: The amount of glue on the main roller is quantitatively maintained. When the operation stops due to abnormal reasons, the rubber arch glue is stopped and a certain amount of edge closing glue is maintained. Standard amount of edge closing glue: Calendering body, below 10cm; Opening roller, below 20cm
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 收边胶量管理：本体辊上胶量定量维持，异常原因作业停止时，橡胶拱胶终止，维持一定量的收边胶量。收边胶量基准：压延本体，10cm以下；开炼辊，20cm以下

ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 首次供应商资料传递错误
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 2021.12년에 지표가 변경되었습니다. 처음으로 2차 공급업체 데이터를 수집할 때 이전 버전의 표준이 사용되었습니다. 나중에 업데이트되어 Spec 파일이 2024.04에 다시 서명되어 원래 개발 문서에 기록되었습니다.

SUBJECT: 2025-GM-01_PCPA (Process Control Plan Audit)
POINT_OUT: "Directed Supply: In cases where the customer directs the organization to source from a specified supplier, it is still the responsibility of the organization (Tier 1) to work with the supplier to get necessary information to develop control plans, unless otherwise specified in the mutually signed agreement (e.g., RASIC, Master Purchase Agreement, etc.). This includes getting information from the supplier about items related to receiving and using the supplied component or material, any testing or validation to be added to the organization’s Control Plan, and any testing or validation to be added to the organization’s Control Plan, and any Pass-Through Characteristics Requirements: Information for Directed Supply components and materials must be available as reference when developing the organization’s Control Plan, just as if it was self-procured.   (AIAG Control Plan 1st Edition 1.12)"
COUNTER_MEASURE: Review PFMEA, conduct action plan & investment plan continually for reduce detection level
POINT_OUT_KO: "지시된 공급: 고객이 조직에 지정된 공급업체로부터 소싱하도록 지시하는 경우, 상호 서명된 계약(예: RASIC, 마스터 구매 계약 등)에 달리 명시되지 않는 한 제어 계획을 개발하는 데 필요한 정보를 얻기 위해 공급업체와 협력하는 것은 여전히 조직(Tier 1)의 책임입니다. 여기에는 공급된 구성 요소 또는 재료의 수령 및 사용과 관련된 항목에 대해 공급업체로부터 정보를 얻는 것, 조직의 제어 계획에 추가할 테스트 또는 검증, 조직의 제어 계획 및 통과 특성 요구 사항에 추가되어야 합니다. 직접 공급 구성 요소 및 재료에 대한 정보는 마치 자체 조달된 것처럼 조직의 제어 계획을 개발할 때 참조로 사용할 수 있어야 합니다(AIAG 제어 계획 1판 1.12).
POINT_OUT_EN: "Directed Supply: In cases where the customer directs the organization to source from a specified supplier, it is still the responsibility of the organization (Tier 1) to work with the supplier to get necessary information to develop control plans, unless otherwise specified in the mutually signed agreement (e.g., RASIC, Master Purchase Agreement, etc.). This includes getting information from the supplier about items related to receiving and using the supplied component or material, any testing or validation to be added to the organization’s Control Plan, and any testing or validation to be added to the organization’s Control Plan, and any Pass-Through Characteristics Requirements: Information for Directed Supply components and materials must be available as reference when developing the organization’s Control Plan, just as if it was self-procured.   (AIAG Control Plan 1st Edition 1.12)"
POINT_OUT_ZH: “定向供应：在客户指示组织从指定供应商处采购的情况下，组织（一级）仍然有责任与供应商合作，获取必要的信息来制定控制计划，除非双方签署的协议（例如 RASIC、主采购协议等）中另有规定。这包括从供应商处获取有关接收和使用所提供的组件或材料的相关项目的信息、要添加到组织控制计划中的任何测试或验证以及要添加的任何测试或验证符合组织的控制计划以及任何直通特性要求：在制定组织的控制计划时，必须提供定向供应组件和材料的信息作为参考，就像自行采购一样（AIAG 控制计划第 1 版 1.12）”
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: PFMEA 검토, 검출 수준 감소를 위한 지속적인 실천 계획 및 투자 계획 수행
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Review PFMEA, conduct action plan & investment plan continually for reduce detection level
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: Review PFMEA, conduct action plan & investment plan continually for reduce detection level

SUBJECT: 2025-GM-01_PCPA (Process Control Plan Audit)
POINT_OUT: "At a minimum, all DFMEA items with severity rank of 9-10 that flow to PFMEA for control must be designated as Special Characteristics.  The customer may specify other  severity ranks at their discretion. (AIAG Control Plan 1st Edition 1.2 Special Characteristics) Special Characteristics must be indicated in the “Special Characteristic Classification” column of the Control Plan.  If the Special Characteristic is identified by the Customer, the organization must use the appropriate classification as required by the customer. The use of  organization designated classifications is allowed if the customer agrees and there is documentation such as a correlation matrix to link to customer designation. "
COUNTER_MEASURE: Current projects which already got approval from GM (9BUx) has fixed approved 2d drawing with excel format . New development project will share the drawing with pdf format as well.
POINT_OUT_KO: "최소한 제어를 위해 PFMEA로 유입되는 심각도 등급 9-10의 모든 DFMEA 항목은 특수 특성으로 지정되어야 합니다. 고객은 재량에 따라 다른 심각도 등급을 지정할 수 있습니다. (AIAG Control Plan 1st Edition 1.2 특수 특성) 특수 특성은 제어 계획의 "특수 특성 분류" 열에 표시되어야 합니다. 고객이 특수 특성을 식별하는 경우 조직은 고객이 요구하는 대로 적절한 분류를 사용해야 합니다. 조직의 사용 고객이 동의하고 고객 지정과 연계할 수 있는 상관관계 매트릭스 등의 문서가 있는 경우 지정 분류가 허용됩니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: "At a minimum, all DFMEA items with severity rank of 9-10 that flow to PFMEA for control must be designated as Special Characteristics. The customer may specify other severity ranks at their discretion. (AIAG Control Plan 1st Edition 1.2 Special Characteristics) Special Characteristics must be indicated in the “Special Characteristic Classification" column of the Control Plan. If the Special Characteristic is identified by the Customer, the organization must use the appropriate classification as required by the customer. The use of organization designated classifications is allowed if the customer agrees and there is documentation such as a correlation matrix to link to customer designation. "
POINT_OUT_ZH: "At a minimum, all DFMEA items with severity rank of 9-10 that flow to PFMEA for control must be designated as Special Characteristics. If the Special Characteristic is identified by the Customer, the organization must use the appropriate classification as required by the customer. COUNTER_MEASURE: SEALANT PROCESS AREA - verified the set parameters in line with the control plan, last edition - during the audit, when analyzing with the audited people the parameters related to the TWIN SCREW EXTRUDER CHECKSHEET (S1601) (form SL-Form07) there were lacks in understanding to demonstrate the meaning of the technical parameter MASTER BATCH FEEDING SPEED mentioned in the control plan.
POINT_OUT_EN: 7.3.1. Production
POINT_OUT_ZH: 7.3.1. Production
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 인식 과정은 완전히 효과적이지 않습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: The awareness process is not fully effective.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 意识过程并不完全有效。
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 실란트 공정 영역 - 지난 버전의 제어 계획에 따라 설정된 매개변수를 확인했습니다. - 감사 중에 감사 대상자와 함께 TWIN SCREW EXTRUDER CHECKSHEET(S1601)(SL-Form07 형식)과 관련된 매개변수를 분석할 때 제어 계획에 언급된 기술 매개변수 MASTER BATCH FEEDING SPEED의 의미를 입증하기 위한 이해가 부족했습니다.

COUNTER_MEASURE: 1.作业指导书都是经过经验检验数据 2.割刀更换有作业更换计划台账记录 3.当在更换计划内出现异常时立刻更换切刀
POINT_OUT_KO: 타이어 롤링 스테이션의 절단 칼은 절단기 교체 관리가 부족하고 빈도가 제어되지 않습니다. 커터에 문제가 발생한 후 커터를 교체합니다. 절단기의 사용 빈도를 온라인으로 기록하고, 바람직하지 않은 상태에 도달하기 전에 사전에 교체하는 것이 좋습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: The cutting knife at the tire rolling station lacks management of the replacement of the cutter, and the frequency is not controlled. POINT_OUT_ZH: 轮胎压延工位的裁切刀缺少对切刀的更换管理，未按照频次进行管控，是在切刀发生问题后进行更换，建议对切刀使用频次在线记录，在达到不佳状态前主动更换

COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1. The operation instructions are all empirically tested data. 2. The replacement of the cutter is recorded in the operation replacement plan. 3. When an abnormality occurs within the replacement plan, the cutter is replaced immediately.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1.作业指导书都是经过经验检验数据 2.割刀更换有作业更换计划台账记录 3.当在更换计划内出现异常时立刻更换切刀

SUBJECT: 2025-HMC-01
POINT_OUT: Comply with process conditions and manage changes (by process)

SUBJECT: 2025-HMC-01
POINT_OUT: Process quality inspection (by process)
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: ■ Extruding : TriScan Online tread profile and thickness measurment is performed, but a management tolerance value is not set.     - currently TriScan Online is not set yet and operators self-inspec manually. ■ Cutting : A comparison and verification of monitor values and actual OP measured values for  width is needed (This should be a foolproof 검증currently, only actual measured values are recorded).
COUNTER_MEASURE: -- Extruding : Triscan measuring machine is an online measuring machine that continuously measures data in live view! There is a tolerance defined +- 2 mm! Measuring device checked and calibrated!

SUBJECT: 2025-HMC-01
POINT_OUT: ■ QA : Identification and storage management of non-conforming products are insufficient.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: - There are 13 scrap tires in the MR area, but the G.MES shows 16.       (It's necessary to record the movement of non-conforming products for traceability.)
COUNTER_MEASURE: -"We handle tires awaiting decision and final scrap (MR zone and scrap) separately.  Visual inspectors collect the scrap they have registered separately and lock it with a padlock.  If the S/V really judges it as scrap, the tire is then cut out and discarded. We avoid mixing."
POINT_OUT_KO: ■ QA : 부적합품 식별 및 보관관리가 미흡합니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: ■ QA: Identification and storage management of non-conforming products are insufficient.
POINT_OUT_ZH: ■ QA : Identification and storage management of non-conforming products are insufficient.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: - MR 구역에는 폐타이어가 13개 있는데, G.MES에서는 16개로 나타납니다. (추적성을 위해 부적합품의 이동을 기록하는 것이 필요합니다.)
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: - There are 13 scrap tires in the MR area, but the G.MES shows 16.       (It's necessary to record the movement of non-conforming products for traceability.)
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: - MR区域有13条废轮胎，但G.MES显示有16条。（需要记录不合格品的动向，以便追溯。）
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: - "판정 대기 타이어와 최종 스크랩(MR 존, 스크랩)을 별도로 처리합니다. 육안 검사관이 별도로 등록한 스크랩을 수거하여 자물쇠로 잠급니다. S/V가 정말로 스크랩으로 판단하면 타이어를 잘라내어 폐기합니다. 섞이지 않습니다."
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: -"We handle tires awaiting decision and final scrap (MR zone and scrap) separately. Visual inspectors collect the scrap they have registered separately and lock it with a padlock. If the S/V really judges it as scrap, the tire is then cut out and discarded. We avoid mixing."
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: -"We handle tires awaiting decision and final scrap (MR zone and scrap) separately.  Visual inspectors collect the scrap they have registered separately and lock it with a padlock.  If the S/V really judges it as scrap, the tire is then cut out and discarded. We avoid mixing."

SUBJECT: 2025-HMC-01
POINT_OUT: ■ While temperature sensors and gauges on equipment are checked periodically, the inspection cycle needs to be re-evaluated.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: - The temperature sensor check is set to once a year, but a comparison test showed a 5°C difference against a standard tolerance of ±2°C. The inspection cycle needs to be shortened to prevent excessive errors.
COUNTER_MEASURE: -All temperature sensor checked and calibrated as internal procedure describe.
POINT_OUT_KO: ■ 장비의 온도 센서 및 게이지를 정기적으로 점검하는 동안 점검 주기를 재평가해야 합니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: ■ While temperature sensors and gauges on equipment are checked periodically, the inspection cycle needs to be re-evaluated.
POINT_OUT_ZH: ■ 虽然定期检查设备上的温度传感器和仪表，但需要重新评估检查周期。
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: - 온도센서 점검은 연 1회로 설정되어 있으나, 비교시험 결과 표준 허용오차 ±2°C 대비 5°C의 차이가 나타났습니다. 과도한 오류를 방지하기 위해서는 검사 주기를 단축해야 합니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: - The temperature sensor check is set to once a year, but a comparison test showed a 5°C difference against a standard tolerance of ±2°C. The inspection cycle needs to be shortened to prevent excessive errors.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: - The temperature sensor check is set to once a year, but a comparison test showed a 5°C difference against a standard tolerance of ±2°C. The inspection cycle needs to be shortened to prevent excessive errors.
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: - 내부 절차에 설명된 대로 모든 온도 센서를 점검하고 교정했습니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: -All temperature sensor checked and calibrated as internal procedure describe.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: -按照内部程序所述检查和校准所有温度传感器。

SUBJECT: 2025-HMC-01
POINT_OUT: ■ Mold cleaning is done once every 20 days and coating is done once per shift, but compliance with the cleaning cycle is lacking.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: - A standard is in place to clean molds after they've been used for 20 operating days.         However, performance against the cleaning plan for some molds is insufficient.         (plans changed frequently including delayed)
COUNTER_MEASURE: -"Cleaning History based on MOLD Number Issue: There no option in the GMES Counter action: LFD511 Modification request → Applied at 2025.09.26"
POINT_OUT_KO: ■ 금형청소는 20일에 1회, 코팅은 교대당 1회 실시하나, 청소주기 준수가 부족합니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: ■ Mold cleaning is done once every 20 days and coating is done once per shift, but compliance with the cleaning cycle is lacking.
POINT_OUT_ZH: ■ 模具清洗每20天进行一次，涂装每班进行一次，但缺乏对清洗周期的遵守。
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: - A standard is in place to clean molds after they've been used for 20 operating days.         However, performance against the cleaning plan for some molds is insufficient.         (plans changed frequently including delayed)
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: - A standard is in place to clean molds after they've been used for 20 operating days.         However, performance against the cleaning plan for some molds is insufficient.         (plans changed frequently including delayed)
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: - 制定了模具使用 20 个工作日后清洁模具的标准。         然而，某些模具的清洁计划的表现还不够。         （计划经常改变，包括延迟）
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: - "몰드번호 기준 클리닝 이력 이슈 : GMES 카운터 조치에 옵션 없음 : LFD511 수정요청 → 2025.09.26 적용"
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: -"Cleaning History based on MOLD Number Issue: There is no option in the GMES Counter action: LFD511 Modification request → Applied at 2025.09.26"
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: -“基于 MOLD 编号的清洁历史记录问题：GMES 对策中没有选项：LFD511 修改请求→于 2025 年 9 月 26 日应用”

COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: -"우리는 매일 S/V 책을 준비했는데 여기에는 기계에 의한 정확성 점검과 같은 정보가 손실되어 있습니다. 그들은 TXT 파일과 마스터 타이어를 확인하고 시트의 충전 상태를 확인해야 합니다. 우리는 기계를 자동으로 멈출 수 없으므로 S/V가 항목을 확인하고 필요한 경우 기계를 멈출 수 있습니다. "

SUBJECT: 2025-HMC-01
POINT_OUT: ■ Production / Development items are not properly identified in the computer system.  While inspection hold items / non-conforming products / development items are all in "blocked" status but can not be identified why on the warehouse Solzard system. (can identified on QC side)  - In the incoming inspection process, non-conforming products are handled by Quality Control (QC) and then reported to the warehouse return or disposal.  However, development items, even if they pass inspection, they are still "blocked" in the system for warehousing, which makes identification management crucial.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Raw material lot numbers on identification tags vs test reports is insufficient.      ex) some development material mfg date : '25.7/15 vs received date : '25.7/15
COUNTER_MEASURE: -"Purchasing corrective actions:  We implement mandatory training (OJT), with completion verified through an attendance record. We regularly verify the process prior to barcode printing."
POINT_OUT_KO: ■ 생산/개발 항목이 컴퓨터 시스템에서 제대로 식별되지 않습니다. 검사 보류 품목/부적합 제품/개발 품목은 모두 "차단" 상태이지만 창고 Solzard 시스템에서는 이유를 확인할 수 없습니다. (QC 측에서 확인 가능) - 입고 검사 과정에서 부적합 제품은 품질 관리(QC)에 의해 처리된 후 창고로 반품 또는 폐기됩니다. 그러나 개발 품목은 검사를 통과하더라도 창고 시스템에서 여전히 '차단'되므로 식별 관리가 중요합니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: ■ Production / Development items are not properly identified in the computer system. While inspection hold items / non-conforming products / development items are all in "blocked" status but can not be identified why on the warehouse Solzard system. (can identified on QC side) - In the incoming inspection process, non-conforming products are handled by Quality Control (QC) and then reported to the warehouse return or disposal. However, development items, even if they pass inspection, they are still "blocked" in the system for warehousing, which makes identification management crucial.
POINT_OUT_ZH: ■ Production / Development items are not properly identified in the computer system.  While inspection hold items / non-conforming products / development items are all in "blocked" status but can not be identified why on the warehouse Solzard system. (can identified on QC side)  - In the incoming inspection process, non-conforming products are handled by Quality Control (QC) and then reported to the warehouse return or disposal.  However, development items, even if they pass inspection, they are still "blocked" in the system for warehousing, which makes identification management crucial.

SUBJECT: 2025-HMC-01
POINT_OUT: Compliance with the implementation status and standards  of the facility's daily inspection
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: ■ Mixing : Although a Foolproof is installed to automatically discharge chemicals if a weight discrepancy occurs in the weighing process, Foolproof inspection management is insufficient. (Inspection standards need to be established). ■ Extruding : The cooling water temperature standard is set at 20°C or below, but currently set to 18.6°C. ■ Daily inspection of the remaining amount of antibacterial chemicals is necessary (lower limit and proper value need to be identified).     - On the day of audit, the chemical was low.   ■ 냉Although a standard is established for cleaning the cooling water tank once a week, no records of implementation are being managed. ■ The discharge temperature sensor for the B2101 is set at a maximum of 120°C, but a lower limit value needs to be managed.

Mixing will follow up QC system check method  '- Extruding Cooling water :In cooling water regulation, it is specified that the cooling water must be below 20 °C. We can achieve this if the cooling circuit starts at 18.5 °C! '- A note is being made about the filling of the water chemical tank! '- Water tank cleaning note is being prepared "" MF1 EX : Form 25"" "

SUBJECT: 2025-Benz-MMA V174/178-01
POINT_OUT: For the supplier annual performance evaluation, there was no downgrading definition when the critical quality issue occurred.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: The situation where the same supplier supplies different raw material items simultaneously has not been subject to detailed management
COUNTER_MEASURE: In the "Key Points for the Management of Raw and Auxiliary Materials", new provisions have been added to provide corresponding measures for situations where the same supplier supplies multiple raw material items
POINT_OUT_KO: 공급업체의 연간 성과 평가에서는 심각한 품질 문제가 발생했을 때 하향 정의가 없었습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: For the supplier annual performance evaluation, there was no downgrading definition when the critical quality issue occurred.
POINT_OUT_ZH: For the supplier annual performance evaluation, there was no downgrading definition when the critical quality issue occurred.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 동일한 공급자가 서로 다른 원자재 품목을 동시에 공급하는 상황은 세부 관리 대상이 아닙니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: The situation where the same supplier supplies different raw material items simultaneously has not been subject to detailed management
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: The situation where the same supplier supplies different raw material items simultaneously has not been subject to detailed management
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: '원부자재 관리 핵심사항'에 동일 공급업체가 복수의 원자재 품목을 공급하는 경우 이에 상응하는 조치를 제공하는 조항을 신설하였습니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: In the "Key Points for the Management of Raw and Auxiliary Materials", new provisions have been added to provide corresponding measures for situations where the same supplier supplies multiple raw material items
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: In the "Key Points for the Management of Raw and Auxiliary Materials", new provisions have been added to provide corresponding measures for situations where the same supplier supplies multiple raw material items

SUBJECT: 2025-Benz-MMA V174/178-01
POINT_OUT: There was no effective traceability analysis and containment within the supply chain about the material STR40 out of specification, only  returned the NG material back to supplier and stopped the delivery.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Non-compliant items are not subject to routine management but only subject to regular spot checks
COUNTER_MEASURE: Incorporate the inspection of this item into the management of this type of raw materials, and require the supply to have the inspection capability of this item and reflect the inspection value in the COA in the warehouse
POINT_OUT_KO: 사양을 벗어난 자재 STR40에 대해 공급망 내에서 효과적인 추적성 분석 및 억제가 이루어지지 않았으며 NG 자재만 공급업체에 반환하고 배송을 중단했습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: There was no effective traceability analysis and containment within the supply chain about the material STR40 out of specification, only returned the NG material back to supplier and stopped the delivery.
POINT_OUT_ZH: There was no effective traceability analysis and containment within the supply chain about the material STR40 out of specification, only  returned the NG material back to supplier and stopped the delivery.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 부적합품목은 정기관리 대상이 아니며, 정기적인 현장점검만 실시됩니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Non-compliant items are not subject to routine management but only subject to regular spot checks
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 不合格项目不进行日常管理，仅定期抽查
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 이 품목의 검사를 이러한 유형의 원자재 관리에 통합하고, 공급업체가 이 품목의 검사 능력을 갖추고 창고 COA에 검사 값을 반영하도록 요구합니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Incorporate the inspection of this item into the management of this type of raw materials, and require the supply to have the inspection capability of this item and reflect the inspection value in the COA in the warehouse
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 将此项目的检验纳入该类原材料的管理中，并要求供应商具备该项目的检验能力，并将检验值反映在仓库的COA中

SUBJECT: 2025-Benz-MMA V174/178-01
POINT_OUT: There is no definition about the material requalification especially after the critical quality issue happen or the sub-supplier process  change.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 1) The years of cooperation with suppliers have not been statistically recorded  2) There is no full coverage verification for materials that have been in long-term use
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1) The materials of suppliers with more than 10 years shall be counted by years  2) When developing diversified raw materials, the verification and evaluation of raw materials from long-term suppliers should be fully covered
POINT_OUT_KO: 특히 중요한 품질 문제가 발생하거나 하위 공급업체 프로세스가 변경된 후에는 자재 재인증에 대한 정의가 없습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: There is no definition about the material requalification especially after the critical quality issue happen or the sub-supplier process change.
POINT_OUT_ZH: There is no definition about the material requalification especially after the critical quality issue happen or the sub-supplier process  change.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 1) 공급업체와 협력한 기간은 통계적으로 기록되지 않았습니다. 2) 장기간 사용된 자재에 대한 전체 적용 범위 검증이 없습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: 1) The years of cooperation with suppliers have not been statistically recorded  2) There is no full coverage verification for materials that have been in long-term use
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 1）与供应商的合作年限未统计记录 2）长期使用的材料没有全覆盖验证
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1) 10년 이상 공급업체의 자재는 연도별로 계산한다. 2) 다양한 원자재 개발 시 장기 공급업체의 원자재에 대한 검증 및 평가를 전면적으로 포괄해야 한다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1) The materials of suppliers with more than 10 years shall be counted by years 2) When developing diversified raw materials, the verification and evaluation of raw materials from long-term suppliers should be fully covered
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1) The materials of suppliers with more than 10 years shall be counted by years  2) When developing diversified raw materials, the verification and evaluation of raw materials from long-term suppliers should be fully covered
