SUBJECT: 2025-Toyota-quality system audit
POINT_OUT: 管理者指责的问题点的改善措施：优化标准，但标准前后不明确，建议量化标准
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 1why：分层审核指责的问题点改善措施效果不佳。如分层审核发现1#BELT割刀温度异常，改善对策为：PM修复后使用。有再发的情况。 2why：未分析到根本原因，也没有文件化，有再发的可能。
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1.深入分析指责的问题事项，例如：1#BELT割刀温度异常，为经验判断，现场无异常的判定标准及管理指导书  2.分析到根本原因后并制定有效的改善对策，必要时形成文件化。例如：新增成型割刀管理指导书，员工教育实施。 3.对改善措施进行横展，防止其他机台再发
POINT_OUT_KO: 관리자가 지적한 문제점에 대한 개선방안 : 기준을 최적화하되 전후 기준이 명확하지 않아 기준을 정량화하는 것을 권장
POINT_OUT_EN: Improvement measures for the problems pointed out by managers: Optimize the standards, but the standards are not clear before and after, it is recommended to quantify the standards
POINT_OUT_ZH: 管理者指责的问题点的改善措施：优化标准，但标准前后不明确，建议量化标准
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 1why: 계층적 감사에서 지적된 문제점에 대한 개선 조치가 효과적이지 않습니다. 다층 감사에서 1# BELT 절단 칼의 온도가 비정상인 것으로 확인되면 개선 대책은 PM 수리 후 사용하는 것입니다. 재발하는 경우가 있습니다. 2why: 근본 원인이 분석 및 문서화되지 않았으며 재발 가능성이 있습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: 1why: The improvement measures for the problem points pointed out by the hierarchical audit are not effective. If the layered audit finds that the temperature of the 1# BELT cutting knife is abnormal, the improvement countermeasures are: use after PM repair. There may be recurrence. 2why: The root cause has not been analyzed and documented, and there is a possibility of recurrence.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 1why：分层审核指责的问题点改善措施效果不佳。如分层审核发现1#BELT割刀温度异常，改善对策为：PM修复后使用。有再发的情况。 2why：未分析到根本原因，也没有文件化，有再发的可能。
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1. 피고인 문제에 대한 심층 분석을 수행합니다. 예: 1#BELT 절단 칼 온도 이상, 이는 경험적 판단입니다. 현장에는 이상 유무 판단 기준 및 관리 지침이 없습니다. 2. 근본 원인을 분석한 후 효과적인 개선 대책을 수립하고, 필요한 경우 이를 문서화합니다. 예를 들어 절단기 형성 및 직원 교육 구현에 대한 새로운 관리 지침이 있습니다. 3. 타 기기에서의 재발방지를 위한 개선조치 실시
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1. Conduct an in-depth analysis of the accused issues, for example: 1#BELT cutting knife temperature abnormality, which is an empirical judgment. There are no abnormality judgment standards and management instructions on site. 2. After analyzing the root causes, formulate effective improvement countermeasures and document them if necessary. For example: new management instructions for forming cutters and implementation of employee education. 3. Carry out improvement measures to prevent recurrence on other machines
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1.深入分析指责的问题事项，例如：1#BELT割刀温度异常，为经验判断，现场无异常的判定标准及管理指导书  2.分析到根本原因后并制定有效的改善对策，必要时形成文件化。例如：新增成型割刀管理指导书，员工教育实施。 3.对改善措施进行横展，防止其他机台再发

SUBJECT: 2025-Toyota-quality system audit
POINT_OUT: 青岛华恒新规评审缺乏品质人员参与，指责的问题点：实验室样品管理台账缺失是否关闭缺乏改善依据
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 1why：青岛华恒新规评审时，QA部门审核员应日程冲突，未参加 2why：《原辅材料供应商选定及管理规定》对审核组成员指定单一，品质部门只指定了QA，可调整的机动性不足。
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1.扩大新规供应商审核的品质部门，除QA部门外，QC部，OE品质部，有VDA6.3审核资质人员均可代表品质部门参与新规供应商评审，增强可调整的机动性。 2.修改《原辅材料供应商选定及管理规定》 3.指责问题点已关闭，青岛华恒已提供《样品留样登记表》
POINT_OUT_KO: Qingdao Huaheng의 새로운 규정 검토에는 품질 담당자의 참여가 부족합니다. 지적된 문제는 검사실 검체 관리 대장이 부족하고, 폐쇄 여부와 개선 근거가 부족하다는 점이다.
POINT_OUT_EN: The review of Qingdao Huaheng's new regulations lacks the participation of quality personnel. The problem pointed out is: the lack of laboratory sample management ledger, whether it is closed and the lack of basis for improvement.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 青岛华恒新规评审缺乏品质人员参与，指责的问题点：实验室样品管理台账缺失是否关闭缺乏改善依据
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 1why：青岛华恒新规评审时，QA部门审核员应日程冲突，未参加 2why：《原辅材料供应商选定及管理规定》对审核组成员指定单一，品质部门只指定了QA，可调整的机动性不足。
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: 1why：青岛华恒新规评审时，QA部门审核员应日程冲突，未参加2why：《原辅材料供应商选定及管理理定》对审核组成员指定单一，品质部门只指定了QA，可调整的机动性不足。
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 1why：青岛华恒新规评审时，QA部门审核员应定期冲突，未参加2why：《原辅材料供应商精选及管理理定》对审核组成员指定单一，品质部门只指定了QA，可调整的机动性不足。
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1. 가장 새로운 제품, QA 부서, QC 부서, OEM 부서, VD가 있습니다. A6.3은 최신 기술을 바탕으로 한 제품을 제공합니다. 2.修改 《原辅材料供应商选定及管理规定》 3.指责问题点已关闭，青岛华恒已提供 《样product留样登记表》
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1.扩大新规供应商审核的品质部门，除QA部门外，QC部，OE品质部，有VDA6.3审核资质人员均可代表品质部门参与新规供应商评审，增强可调整的机动性。 2.修改《原辅材料供应商选定及管理规定》 3.指责问题点已关闭，青岛华恒已提供《样品留样登记表》
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1.扩大新规供应商审核的评判部门，除QA部门外，QC部，OE评判部，有VDA6.3审核资质人员代表评判部门参与新规供应商评审，增强可调整的机动性。 2.《原辅材料供应商选定及管理》3.问题点关闭，青岛华恒已提供《样品留样登记表》

SUBJECT: 2025-Toyota-quality system audit
POINT_OUT: 濮阳班德路DCS系统温度设备上下限整改标准的依据来源不明确，建议明确数据依据
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 1why：对供应商审查，只对问题点改善与否进行确认，没有对改善的合理性进行深入检讨。
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1.要求该厂家提供上下限树立依据，《报警规范设置》内明确规定了上下限。 2.向后需要对供应商的改善报告进行可靠性确认，所有审核员横展。
POINT_OUT_KO: Puyang Bande Road의 DCS 시스템 온도 장비에 대한 상한 및 하한 정류 기준의 근거는 불분명합니다. 데이터 기반을 명확히하는 것이 좋습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: The source of the basis for the upper and lower limit rectification standards for DCS system temperature equipment in Puyang Bande Road is unclear. It is recommended to clarify the data basis.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 濮阳班德路DCS系统温度设备上下限整改标准的依据来源不明确，建议明确数据依据
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 1why: 협력사 검토 시 문제점 개선 여부만 확인하고, 개선의 합리성에 대한 심층적인 검토는 진행하지 않습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: 1why: When reviewing suppliers, we only confirm whether problem points have been improved or not, but do not conduct an in-depth review of the rationality of the improvements.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 1why：对供应商审查，只对问题点改善与否进行确认，没有对改善的合理性进行深入检讨。
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1. 제조자는 상한 및 하한 설정에 대한 근거를 제공해야 합니다. 상한과 하한은 "경보 사양 설정"에 명확하게 규정되어 있습니다. 2. 공급업체의 개선 보고서에 대한 신뢰성을 거꾸로 확인하는 것이 필요하며, 모든 감사자가 이를 실시합니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1. The manufacturer is required to provide the basis for establishing upper and lower limits. The upper and lower limits are clearly stipulated in the "Alarm Specification Settings". 2. It is necessary to confirm the reliability of the supplier's improvement report backwards, and all auditors will do so.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1.要求该厂家提供上下限树立依据，《报警规范设置》内明确规定了上下限。 2.向后需要对供应商的改善报告进行可靠性确认，所有审核员横展。

SUBJECT: 2025-Toyota-quality system audit
POINT_OUT: 基层管理人员的培训考核缺乏理论+实操
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 1why：基层管理人员考核以上层领导主管评价为主。 2why：基层管理人员晋升无明确的理论和实操考核评价基准。
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1.增加对见习L长理论知识的线上学习培训并考核； 2.新增《见习L长的岗位技能测定卡》，理论和实操的综合评价，包涵评价基准及考核达标要求； 3.考核达标后，当部署提交《晋升推荐书》
POINT_OUT_KO: 풀뿌리 관리자에 대한 교육 및 평가에는 이론 + 실무가 부족합니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: The training and assessment of grassroots managers lacks theory + practical practice
POINT_OUT_ZH: 基层管理人员的培训考核缺乏理论+实操
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 1why: 하위 관리자에 대한 평가는 주로 상위 리더와 감독자의 평가를 기반으로 합니다. 2why: 하급관리자 승진에 대한 명확한 이론적, 실무적 평가 및 평가기준이 없다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: 1why: The assessment of lower-level managers is mainly based on the evaluation of upper-level leaders and supervisors. 2why: There is no clear theoretical and practical assessment and evaluation benchmark for the promotion of lower-level managers.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 1why：基层管理人员考核以上层领导主管评价为主。 2why：基层管理人员晋升无明确的理论和实操考核评价基准。
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1. 연수생 리더의 이론적 지식에 대한 온라인 학습, 훈련 및 평가를 늘립니다. 2. 평가 벤치마크 및 평가 요구 사항을 포함하여 이론과 실무를 종합적으로 평가하는 "훈련생 리더를 위한 직무 기술 측정 카드"를 추가합니다. 3. 평가 통과 후 배치 시 '승진 추천서'가 제출됩니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1. Increase the online learning, training and assessment of the theoretical knowledge of trainee leaders; 2. Add the "Job Skills Measurement Card for Trainee Leaders", a comprehensive evaluation of theory and practice, including evaluation benchmarks and assessment requirements; 3. After the assessment is met, a "Promotion Recommendation Letter" will be submitted when deployed
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1.增加对见习L长理论知识的线上学习培训并考核； 2.新增《见习L长的岗位技能测定卡》，理论和实操的综合评价，包涵评价基准及考核达标要求； 3.考核达标后，当部署提交《晋升推荐书》

SUBJECT: 2025-Toyota-quality system audit
POINT_OUT: 设备日常点检缺乏异常原因管理，只有更换结果，建议追加
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 1why：设备日常点检故障仅对异常现象进行消除 2why：故障未分析到根本原因，导致无法防止再发 3why：缺少横展，同设备故障扩散
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1.设备故障分析报告内增加根本原因分析，防止再发； 2.增加同类型设备故障样像扩散点检，防止同类故障发生
POINT_OUT_KO: 장비의 일상점검에서는 이상원인 관리가 부족하고 교체결과만 나온다. 추가하는 것이 좋습니다
POINT_OUT_EN: The daily inspection of equipment lacks management of abnormal causes and only has replacement results. It is recommended to add
POINT_OUT_ZH: 设备日常点检缺乏异常原因管理，只有更换结果，建议追加
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 1이유: 设备日常点检故障仅对异常现象进行消除3why: 缺少横设备故障扩散
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: 1why：设备日常点检故障仅对异常现象进行消除 2why：故障未分析到根本原因，导致无法防止再发 3why：缺少横展，同设备故障扩散
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 1why：设备日常点检故障仅对异常现象进行排除 2why：故障未分析到根本原因，导致无法防止再发 3why：缺少横展，同设备故障扩散
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1. 재발 방지를 위해 장비 고장 분석 보고서에 근본 원인 분석을 추가합니다. 2. 동일한 유형의 장비 고장에 대한 샘플 확산 검사를 추가하여 유사한 고장이 발생하지 않도록 합니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1. Add root cause analysis to the equipment failure analysis report to prevent recurrence; 2. Add sample diffusion inspection of equipment failures of the same type to prevent similar failures from occurring.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1.设备故障分析报告内增加根本原因分析，防止再发； 2.增加同类型设备故障样像扩散点检，防止同类故障发生

SUBJECT: 2025-Toyota-quality system audit
POINT_OUT: 过程品管理规则分散在作业要领书上，建议增加一级文件明确管理要求（试作品、首末件、端数品）
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 1why：程序文件为韩国母社传递过来，过程品管理规则较分散，无明确的一级文件
COUNTER_MEASURE: 增加过程品管理的一级文件
POINT_OUT_KO: 프로세스 제품 관리 규칙은 작업 지침에 분산되어 있습니다. 관리 요구 사항(시험 작업, 첫 번째 및 마지막 작품, 최종 제품)을 명확히 하기 위해 첫 번째 수준 문서를 추가하는 것이 좋습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: The process product management rules are scattered in the work instructions. It is recommended to add a first-level document to clarify the management requirements (trial works, first and last pieces, final products)
POINT_OUT_ZH: 过程品管理规则分散在作业要领书上，建议增加一级文件明确管理要求（试作品、首末件、端数品）

SUBJECT: 2025-Toyota-quality system audit

POINT_OUT_EN: For extruded products, parameters such as weight, geometry, and compound distribution should be monitored continuously throughout the production process to maintain process quality. A 100% measurement is recommended to ensure full control. For proactive measures, real-time online monitoring is highly recommended.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 对于挤压产品，应在整个生产过程中持续监控重量、几何形状和化合物分布等参数，以保持工艺质量。建议进行 100% 测量以确保完全控制。对于主动措施，强烈建议实时在线监控。

SUBJECT: 2025-Porsche-CAYENNE E4-01
POINT_OUT: 1) Many pallets from the first NG measurement are awaiting a second inspection. Please analyze root causes using e.g Lean Six Sigma to eliminate/improve the need for a second inspection, reducing costs, space usage, waiting times, and resource consumption.  2) Pallets/material are stored in unmarked areas in production.   If storage for inspection waiting on the production floor is needed, ensure that storage markings are available in designated areas and reflected in the system. The system should clearly indicate pallet locations, material flow, and approval status accordingly. currently No system-based location management system with storage location assignment and quantity tracking in the intermediate waiting areas in production.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Remark : Batch inspection
POINT_OUT_KO: 1) 1차 NG 측정 결과 많은 팔레트가 2차 검사를 기다리고 있습니다. Lean Six Sigma 등을 사용하여 근본 원인을 분석하여 두 번째 검사의 필요성을 제거/개선하고 비용, 공간 사용량, 대기 시간 및 리소스 소비를 줄이십시오.  2) 팔레트/자재는 생산 시 표시되지 않은 구역에 보관됩니다.   생산 현장에서 검사를 위해 보관해야 하는 경우 지정된 구역에 보관 표시가 있고 시스템에 반영되어 있는지 확인하십시오. 시스템은 이에 따라 팔레트 위치, 자재 흐름 및 승인 상태를 명확하게 표시해야 합니다. 현재 생산 중 중간 대기 구역에 저장 위치 할당 및 수량 추적 기능을 갖춘 시스템 기반 위치 관리 시스템이 없습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: 1) Many pallets from the first NG measurement are awaiting a second inspection. Please analyze root causes using e.g Lean Six Sigma to eliminate/improve the need for a second inspection, reducing costs, space usage, waiting times, and resource consumption.  2) Pallets/material are stored in unmarked areas in production.   If storage for inspection waiting on the production floor is needed, ensure that storage markings are available in designated areas and reflected in the system. The system should clearly indicate pallet locations, material flow, and approval status accordingly. currently No system-based location management system with storage location assignment and quantity tracking in the intermediate waiting areas in production.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 1) 许多第一次检测不合格的托盘正在等待第二次检查。请使用精益六西格码等分析根本原因，以消除/改善二次检查的需要，从而降低成本、空间使用、等待时间和资源消耗。  2) 托盘/材料在生产过程中存放在无标记的区域。   如果需要在生产车间储存等待检查，请确保指定区域有储存标记并反映在系统中。系统应清楚地指示托盘位置、物料流向以及相应的审批状态。目前，尚无基于系统的位置管理系统，可在生产中的中间等待区域进行存储位置分配和数量跟踪。
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 비고: 일괄 검사
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Remark: Batch inspection
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: Remark : Batch inspection

SUBJECT: 2025-Stellantis-01
POINT_OUT: Capability  reviews of control devices (e.g. gage R&R, bias, linearity, stability, etc.) is determined and  the equipment are certified/calibrated at a scheduled frequency.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: After NOK calibration found, the standarized process need to involve Quality (central quality) to perform a risk analysis on the suspect material produced (from the previous calibration up to now) and give the OK, NOK or actions / controls to implement  Calibration Dpt should have at least some basic Kpi's some examples can be: calibration on time, or %NOK calibrations / replacements before calibration ends...
COUNTER_MEASURE: During LPA / Process Patrol wheneve find NOK the previous materials should be measured checked in order to be exclude previous NOK materials. Calibration DPt will be implemented internal KPI.
POINT_OUT_KO: 제어 장치의 성능 검토(예: 게이지 R&R, 바이어스, 선형성, 안정성 등)가 결정되고 장비는 예정된 빈도에 따라 인증/교정됩니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: Capability reviews of control devices (e.g. gage R&R, bias, linearity, stability, etc.) is determined and the equipment are certified/calibrated at a scheduled frequency.
POINT_OUT_ZH: Capability  reviews of control devices (e.g. gage R&R, bias, linearity, stability, etc.) is determined and  the equipment are certified/calibrated at a scheduled frequency.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: NOK 교정이 발견된 후 표준화된 프로세스는 품질(중앙 품질)을 포함하여 생산된 의심되는 재료(이전 교정부터 지금까지)에 대한 위험 분석을 수행하고 OK, NOK 또는 교정을 구현하기 위한 작업/컨트롤을 제공해야 합니다. Dpt는 최소한 몇 가지 기본 Kpi를 가져야 합니다. 몇 가지 예는 다음과 같습니다: 시간에 따른 교정 또는 교정이 끝나기 전 %NOK 교정/교체...
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: After NOK calibration found, the standarized process need to involve Quality (central quality) to perform a risk analysis on the suspect material produced (from the previous calibration up to now) and give the OK, NOK or actions / controls to implement  Calibration Dpt should have at least some basic Kpi's some examples can be: calibration on time, or %NOK calibrations / replacements before calibration ends...
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 发现 NOK 校准后，标准化流程需要涉及质量（中心质量），对产生的可疑材料（从之前的校准到现在）进行风险分析，并给出 OK、NOK 或行动/控制来实施校准 Dpt 应该至少有一些基本 Kpi 的一些示例可以是：按时校准，或校准结束前的 %NOK 校准/更换...
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: LPA/프로세스 순찰 중에 NOK가 발견될 때마다 이전 NOK 물질을 제외하기 위해 이전 물질을 측정하여 확인해야 합니다. 보정 DPt는 내부 KPI로 구현됩니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: During LPA / Process Patrol wheneve find NOK the previous materials should be measured checked in order to be exclude previous NOK materials. Calibration DPt will be implemented internal KPI.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: During LPA / Process Patrol wheneve find NOK the previous materials should be measured checked in order to be exclude previous NOK materials. Calibration DPt will be implemented internal KPI.

SUBJECT: 2025-Stellantis-01
POINT_OUT: Content of PFMEA fields and scoring are defined properly in accordance with customer guideline. In case of different rules used by supplier, Stellantis can accept if all risks are taking account according to AIAG/VDA FMEA manual.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Scoring, specially in Ocurrence needs a deep revision and actual data to back it up.  AIAG Severity matrix should be followed.
COUNTER_MEASURE: AIAG severity matrix will be followed.
POINT_OUT_KO: PFMEA 필드의 내용과 채점은 고객 가이드라인에 따라 적절하게 정의됩니다. 공급자가 다른 규칙을 사용하는 경우 Stellantis는 AIAG/VDA FMEA 매뉴얼에 따라 모든 위험을 고려하는 경우 이를 수락할 수 있습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: Content of PFMEA fields and scoring are defined properly in accordance with customer guideline. In case of different rules used by supplier, Stellantis can accept if all risks are taking account according to AIAG/VDA FMEA manual.
POINT_OUT_ZH: Content of PFMEA fields and scoring are defined properly in accordance with customer guideline. In case of different rules used by supplier, Stellantis can accept if all risks are taking account according to AIAG/VDA FMEA manual.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 특히 Ocurrence의 채점에는 이를 뒷받침할 심층적인 수정과 실제 데이터가 필요합니다. AIAG 심각도 매트릭스를 따라야 합니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Scoring, specially in Ocurrence needs a deep revision and actual data to back it up. AIAG Severity matrix should be followed.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: Scoring, specially in Ocurrence needs a deep revision and actual data to back it up.  AIAG Severity matrix should be followed.
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: AIAG severity matrix will be followed.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: AIAG severity matrix will be followed.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 将遵循 AIAG 严重性矩阵。

SUBJECT: 2025-Stellantis-01
POINT_OUT: Reverse PFMEAs activities are scheduled and tracked.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: There is a corporate process for Reverse PFMEA but not being applied in Racalmas as they do not have GM business (OEM that initially required them to have this tool)  * Requotation: Process is available and it is done if the client require it, currently Racalmas location is not suplying to any OEM that require it (GM or Stellantis) therefore is not implemented, but it will be if they start supplying
COUNTER_MEASURE: Reverse FMEA process and activities will be applied.
POINT_OUT_KO: 역PFMEA 활동을 계획하고 추적합니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: Reverse PFMEAs activities are scheduled and tracked.
POINT_OUT_ZH: Reverse PFMEAs activities are scheduled and tracked.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: Reverse PFMEA에 대한 기업 프로세스가 있지만 Racalmas에는 GM 비즈니스가 없기 때문에 적용되지 않습니다(처음에 이 도구가 필요했던 OEM) * 재인용: 프로세스가 가능하며 고객이 요구하면 완료됩니다. 현재 Racalmas 위치는 이를 요구하는 OEM(GM 또는 Stellantis)에 공급하지 않으므로 구현되지 않지만 공급을 시작하면 그렇게 될 것입니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: There is a corporate process for Reverse PFMEA but not being applied in Racalmas as they do not have GM business (OEM that initially required them to have this tool) * Requotation: Process is available and it is done if the client require it, currently Racalmas location is not suplying to any OEM that require it (GM or Stellantis) therefore is not implemented, but it will be if they start supplying
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: There is a corporate process for Reverse PFMEA but not being applied in Racalmas as they do not have GM business (OEM that initially required them to have this tool)  * Requotation: Process is available and it is done if the client require it, currently Racalmas location is not suplying to any OEM that require it (GM or Stellantis) therefore is not implemented, but it will be if they start supplying
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: Reverse FMEA process and activities will be applied.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Reverse FMEA process and activities will be applied.

SUBJECT: 2025-Stellantis-01

SUBJECT: 2025-Stellantis-01

SUBJECT: 2025-HMC-01
POINT_OUT: Claim management - EQGMS  1. Procedure is not followed. Claim Management Manual requires to close supplier claims with 8D report within 30 days. Reviewed period 01.01.2024 - 10.04.2025: 3 completed cases but no 8D report attached in portal; 2 pending cases from 8/2024 and 1/2025 - no comment regarding next steps or escalation.  2. Severity of claim (normal / major) is not recorded in EGQMS portal.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 1. File uploading function was under development in GQMS. 2. Severity is recorded but the text is in Korean.
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1. File upload function was fixed. Pending items' documentation is under uploading. 2. Korean text was translated to english.
POINT_OUT_KO: 클레임 관리 - EQGMS 1. 절차를 따르지 않습니다. 청구 관리 매뉴얼에서는 8D 보고서를 통해 공급업체 청구를 30일 이내에 종료하도록 요구합니다. 검토 기간 2024년 1월 1일 - 2025년 4월 10일: 3개의 사례가 완료되었지만 포털에 첨부된 8D 보고서가 없습니다. 2024년 8월과 2025년 1월에 보류 중인 케이스 2개 - 다음 단계 또는 에스컬레이션에 관한 의견이 없습니다. 2. 클레임의 심각도(보통/중요)는 EGQMS 포털에 기록되지 않습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: Claim management - EQGMS 1. Procedure is not followed. Claim Management Manual requires to close supplier claims with 8D report within 30 days. Reviewed period 01.01.2024 - 10.04.2025: 3 completed cases but no 8D report attached in portal; 2 pending cases from 8/2024 and 1/2025 - no comment regarding next steps or escalation. 2. Severity of claim (normal / major) is not recorded in EGQMS portal.
POINT_OUT_ZH: Claim management - EQGMS  1. Procedure is not followed. Claim Management Manual requires to close supplier claims with 8D report within 30 days. Reviewed period 01.01.2024 - 10.04.2025: 3 completed cases but no 8D report attached in portal; 2 pending cases from 8/2024 and 1/2025 - no comment regarding next steps or escalation.  2. Severity of claim (normal / major) is not recorded in EGQMS portal.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 1. GQMS에서는 파일 업로드 기능이 개발 중이었습니다. 2. 심각도가 기록되어 있지만 텍스트는 한국어로 되어 있습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: 1. File uploading function was under development in GQMS. 2. Severity is recorded but the text is in Korean.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 1. File uploading function was under development in GQMS. 2. Severity is recorded but the text is in Korean.
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1. 파일 업로드 기능이 수정되었습니다. 보류 중인 항목의 문서가 업로드 중입니다. 2. 한국어 텍스트가 영어로 번역되었습니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1. File upload function was fixed. Pending items' documentation is under uploading. 2. Korean text was translated to english.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1. File upload function was fixed. Pending items' documentation is under uploading. 2. Korean text was translated to english.

SUBJECT: 2025-HMC-01
POINT_OUT: Quality documentation Definition of severity for claims is missing in Standard for handling raw material. Supplier differentiate major or normal severity which is evaluated by QC depending if RC is clearly supplier (normal) or unclear (major).
POINT_OUT_KO: 품질 문서 원재료 취급 표준에는 클레임의 심각도 정의가 누락되어 있습니다. 공급업체는 RC가 명확한 공급업체인지(정상) 또는 불명확한지(주요)에 따라 QC에서 평가하는 주요 또는 일반 심각도를 구분합니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: Quality documentation Definition of severity for claims is missing in Standard for handling raw material. Supplier differentiate major or normal severity which is evaluated by QC depending if RC is clearly supplier (normal) or unclear (major).
POINT_OUT_ZH: 质量文件 原材料处理标准中缺少索赔严重性的定义。供应商区分主要或正常严重程度，由 QC 评估，具体取决于 RC 是明确的供应商（正常）还是不清楚（主要）。

SUBJECT: 2025-HMC-01
POINT_OUT: FMEA Document reviewed annually as per internal procedure. Supplier must react with corrective action when RPN over 100. Found one item with RPN 147 but no action was completed. Procedure is not followed.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Missing periodical revision of above 100 RPN failure items.
COUNTER_MEASURE: Corrective action has been implemented related to high RPN number ruling when over 100 RPN.
POINT_OUT_KO: FMEA 문서는 내부 절차에 따라 매년 검토됩니다. RPN이 100을 초과하면 공급업체는 시정 조치로 대응해야 합니다. RPN 147인 항목이 하나 발견되었지만 조치가 완료되지 않았습니다. 절차가 따르지 않습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: FMEA Document reviewed annually as per internal procedure. Supplier must react with corrective action when RPN over 100. Found one item with RPN 147 but no action was completed. Procedure is not followed.
POINT_OUT_ZH: FMEA Document reviewed annually as per internal procedure. Supplier must react with corrective action when RPN over 100. Found one item with RPN 147 but no action was completed. Procedure is not followed.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 100개 이상의 RPN 실패 항목에 대한 정기 개정이 누락되었습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Missing periodical revision of above 100 RPN failure items.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: Missing periodical revision of above 100 RPN failure items.
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: Corrective action has been implemented related to high RPN number ruling when over 100 RPN.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Corrective action has been implemented related to high RPN number ruling when over 100 RPN.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 已实施与 RPN 数超过 100 RPN 时的高 RPN 数裁决相关的纠正措施。

SUBJECT: 2025-HMC-01
POINT_OUT: Internal Audits Product audit (PDe 52931-6421) from 12/2024 does not follow ISIR testing requirements for weight - 5pcs / 6 months. Supplier only tested 2 samples instead of 5. Customer requirement is not followed.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Sampling frequency for product Audit not set paralell as Customer requirement.
COUNTER_MEASURE: Updated frequesncy of Product Audit according to Hyundai requirements.
POINT_OUT_KO: 내부 감사 2024년 12월의 제품 감사(PDe 52931-6421)는 중량(5개/6개월)에 대한 ISIR 테스트 요구 사항을 따르지 않습니다. 공급업체는 5개가 아닌 2개의 샘플만 테스트했습니다. 고객 요구 사항을 따르지 않았습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: Internal Audits Product audit (PDe 52931-6421) from 12/2024 does not follow ISIR testing requirements for weight - 5pcs / 6 months. Supplier only tested 2 samples instead of 5. Customer requirement is not followed.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 内部审核 12/2024 起的产品审核 (PDe 52931-6421) 不遵循 ISIR 重量测试要求 - 5 件/6 个月。供应商只测试了 2 个样品，而不是 5 个。未遵循客户要求。
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 제품 감사에 대한 샘플링 빈도가 고객 요구 사항과 평행하게 설정되지 않았습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Sampling frequency for product Audit not set parallel as Customer requirement.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: Sampling frequency for product Audit not set paralell as Customer requirement.
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 현대자동차 요구 사항에 따라 제품 감사 빈도가 업데이트되었습니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Updated frequesncy of Product Audit according to Hyundai requirements.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 根据现代要求更新产品审核频率。

SUBJECT: 2025-HMC-01
POINT_OUT: Production site management Illumination inspection is conducted. The minimum for Final inspection is achieved - 1000 lux. The required illumination for final inspection as per manual is 750 lux - dicrepency between manual and reality.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Based on the MSZ EN 12464-1:2022 standard the minimum required illumination is 750lux for tire inspection and 1000 lux is a stricter value is the visual work is critical.
COUNTER_MEASURE: The internal standard must be modified for the stricter limit to follow the EU standard requirements.
POINT_OUT_KO: 생산현장 관리 조도점검을 실시합니다. 최종 검사의 최소값은 1000lux입니다. 매뉴얼에 따라 최종 검사에 필요한 조명은 750럭스입니다. 이는 매뉴얼과 실제 사이의 차이입니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: Production site management Illumination inspection is conducted. The minimum for Final inspection is achieved - 1000 lux. The required illumination for final inspection as per manual is 750 lux - dicrepency between manual and reality.
POINT_OUT_ZH: Production site management Illumination inspection is conducted. The minimum for Final inspection is achieved - 1000 lux. The required illumination for final inspection as per manual is 750 lux - dicrepency between manual and reality.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: MSZ EN 12464-1:2022 표준에 따르면 타이어 검사에 필요한 최소 조명은 750lux이고 시각적 작업이 중요하므로 1000lux가 더 엄격한 값입니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Based on the MSZ EN 12464-1:2022 standard the minimum required illumination is 750lux for tire inspection and 1000 lux is a stricter value is the visual work is critical.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: Based on the MSZ EN 12464-1:2022 standard the minimum required illumination is 750lux for tire inspection and 1000 lux is a stricter value is the visual work is critical.
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: The internal standard must be modified for the stricter limit to follow the EU standard requirements.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: The internal standard must be modified for the stricter limit to follow the EU standard requirements.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 必须修改内部标准以获得更严格的限制，以遵循欧盟标准要求。

SUBJECT: 2025-HMC-01
POINT_OUT: Management of Subsidiary material 1. In incoming laboratory was found expired (01/2025) glycerol which is used to preheat testing machine before testing softening point.  2. Supplier does not have in laboratory manual clearly defined responsibility for management of chemicals. 3. Lubrication chemical for uniformity station - management of expiry is not set up.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Layout organise and announce on shopfloor by each process not executed well.
COUNTER_MEASURE: "2. Added and placed General layout plan for mixing on each floor  Arranged and defined additional zones for recoup and materials 3. Prepared layout."
POINT_OUT_KO: 부자재 관리 1. 연화점 시험 전 시험기를 예열하는 데 사용되는 유효기간이 지난(2025년 1월) 글리세롤이 입고된 실험실에서 발견되었습니다. 2. 공급업체는 실험실 매뉴얼에 화학물질 관리에 대해 명확하게 정의된 책임이 없습니다. 3. 균일성 스테이션용 윤활약품 - 만료 관리가 설정되지 않았습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: Management of Subsidiary material 1. In incoming laboratory was found expired (01/2025) glycerol which is used to preheat testing machine before testing softening point. 2. Supplier does not have in laboratory manual clearly defined responsibility for management of chemicals. 3. Lubrication chemical for uniformity station - management of expiry is not set up.
POINT_OUT_ZH: Management of Subsidiary material 1. In incoming laboratory was found expired (01/2025) glycerol which is used to preheat testing machine before testing softening point.  2. Supplier does not have in laboratory manual clearly defined responsibility for management of chemicals. 3. Lubrication chemical for uniformity station - management of expiry is not set up.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 제대로 실행되지 않은 공정별로 레이아웃을 구성하고 현장에 공지합니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Layout organize and announce on shopfloor by each process not executed well.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: Layout organise and announce on shopfloor by each process not executed well.
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: "2. 층별 혼합을 위한 일반 배치도 추가 및 배치 회수 및 자재 추가 구역 배치 및 정의 3. 배치도 준비."
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: "2. Added and placed General layout plan for mixing on each floor Arranged and defined additional zones for recoup and materials 3. Prepared layout."
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: "2. Added and placed General layout plan for mixing on each floor  Arranged and defined additional zones for recoup and materials 3. Prepared layout."

SUBJECT: 2025-HMC-01
POINT_OUT: Laboratory 1. Two containers with unidentified material were found in incoming laboratory. One was for equipment, second was a sample after analysis. Procedure for material identification and disposal is not followed. 2. Several samples of cord were stored in laboratory but not disposed after testing.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: No dedicated person for laboratory material expire.
COUNTER_MEASURE: Define a person-in-charge who must monitor and inventory the used materials in laboratory and ensure to do not use expired material.
POINT_OUT_KO: Laboratory 1. Two containers with unidentified material were found in incoming laboratory. One was for equipment, second was a sample after analysis. Procedure for material identification and disposal is not followed. 2. Several samples of cord were stored in laboratory but not disposed after testing.
POINT_OUT_EN: Laboratory 1. Two containers with unidentified material were found in incoming laboratory. One was for equipment, the second was a sample after analysis. Procedure for material identification and disposal is not followed. 2. Several samples of cord were stored in laboratory but not disposed after testing.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 实验室 1. 在进入实验室时发现两个装有不明物质的容器。一是设备，二是分析后的样本。未遵循材料识别和处置程序。 2. 多个帘线样品存放在实验室，但测试后未处理。
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 실험실 재료 전담 인력이 만료되지 않습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: No dedicated person for laboratory material expire.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 没有专人负责实验室材料过期。
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 실험실에서 사용된 재료를 모니터링하고 목록을 작성하고 유통기한이 지난 재료를 사용하지 않도록 해야 하는 담당자를 정의합니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Define a person-in-charge who must monitor and inventory the used materials in laboratory and ensure to do not use expired material.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 指定一名负责人，负责对实验室使用过的材料进行监控和盘点，确保不使用过期材料。

SUBJECT: 2025-HMC-01
POINT_OUT: Material receiving area In the area found discrepencies on return palete tags. Material (cord) supplier quarantees expiry until 26.02.2025 but Hankook has on internal label 27.02.2025. Hankook global procedure calculates expiry from  manufacturers production day. Expiry on internal identification label should not exceed expiry claimed by supplier. Not respected expiry date.
COUNTER_MEASURE: Use a sticker for each material what sampled & prepared for incoming test (Minimum information: Material code, LOT No., incoming date)
POINT_OUT_KO: 자재 수령 영역 해당 영역에서 반품 팔레트 태그에 불일치가 발견되었습니다. 자재(코드) 공급업체의 검역 만료일은 2025년 2월 26일까지이지만 한국타이어 내부 라벨은 2025년 2월 27일입니다. 한국글로벌프로시저는 제조사 생산일로부터 유통기한을 계산합니다. 내부 식별 라벨의 만료일은 공급업체가 주장한 만료일을 초과해서는 안 됩니다. 만료일이 존중되지 않습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: Material receiving area In the area found discrepancies on return pallet tags. Material (cord) supplier quarantines expiry until 26.02.2025 but Hankook has on internal label 27.02.2025. Hankook global procedure calculates expiry from manufacturer production day. Expiry on internal identification label should not exceed expiry claimed by supplier. Not respected expiry date.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 物料接收区域 在该区域发现返回托盘标签上存在差异。材料（绳索）供应商隔离期截止至 2025 年 2 月 26 日，但韩泰轮胎的内部标签上的隔离期为 2025 年 2 月 27 日。韩泰轮胎全球程序从制造商生产日起计算有效期。内部识别标签的有效期不应超过供应商声称的有效期。不遵守有效期。
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 입고 테스트를 위해 샘플링 및 준비한 자재별로 스티커를 사용하세요. (최소 정보: 자재 코드, LOT 번호, 입고 날짜)
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Use a sticker for each material what sampled & prepared for incoming test (Minimum information: Material code, LOT No., incoming date)
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: Use a sticker for each material what sampled & prepared for incoming test (Minimum information: Material code, LOT No., incoming date)

SUBJECT: 2025-HMC-01
POINT_OUT: Recoup process 1. Proportion of non-conforming material from extruding process can be added in mixing batch. Unclear procedure "recoup process" and not defined in Control Plan. Supplier should clarify inspection method and whole procedure. 2. Work standard to be created for each department defining work scope and operator role for the process.
POINT_OUT_KO: 회수 공정 1. 압출 공정에서 부적합 물질의 비율이 혼합 배치에 추가될 수 있습니다. "회수 프로세스" 절차가 불분명하고 제어 계획에 정의되어 있지 않습니다. 공급자는 검사 방법 및 전체 절차를 명확히 해야 합니다. 2. 프로세스에 대한 작업 범위 및 운영자 역할을 정의하는 각 부서에 대한 작업 표준을 작성합니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: Recoup process 1. Proportion of non-conforming material from extruding process can be added in mixing batch. Unclear procedure "recoup process" and not defined in Control Plan. Supplier should clarify inspection method and whole procedure. 2. Work standard to be created for each department defining work scope and operator role for the process.
POINT_OUT_ZH: Recoup process 1. Proportion of non-conforming material from extruding process can be added in mixing batch. Unclear procedure "recoup process" and not defined in Control Plan. Supplier should clarify inspection method and whole procedure. 2. Work standard to be created for each department defining work scope and operator role for the process.

SUBJECT: 2025-HMC-01
POINT_OUT: Mixing process area 1. Non-conforming material returned from extruding process does not have RFID system implemented. RFID registered after QC inspection. Not defined location for material before and after QC inspection.  2. Material from extrusion for recoup process has expiry but no FIFO system implemented. 3. During audit was found a palete (prior QC inspection) without correct identification - expiry was missing. 4. MR zone blocked by other material - impossible to access.
POINT_OUT_KO: 혼합 공정 영역 1. 압출 공정에서 반송된 부적합 재료에는 RFID 시스템이 구현되어 있지 않습니다. QC 검사 후 RFID가 등록되었습니다. QC 검사 전후에 재료의 위치가 정의되지 않았습니다.  2. 회수 프로세스를 위한 압출 재료는 만료되었지만 FIFO 시스템이 구현되지 않았습니다. 3. 감사 중에 정확한 식별이 없는 팔레트(사전 QC 검사)가 발견되었습니다. 만료 날짜가 누락되었습니다. 4. MR 구역이 다른 물질에 의해 차단되어 접근이 불가능합니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: Mixing process area 1. Non-conforming material returned from extruding process does not have RFID system implemented. RFID registered after QC inspection. Not defined location for material before and after QC inspection.  2. Material from extrusion for recoup process has expiry but no FIFO system implemented. 3. During audit was found a palete (prior QC inspection) without correct identification - expiry was missing. 4. MR zone blocked by other material - impossible to access.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 混合过程区域 1. 挤出过程返回的不合格材料未实施 RFID 系统。 QC检查后注册RFID。 QC 检查前后没有定义材料的位置。  2.用于回收过程的挤出材料已过期但未实施先进先出系统。 3. 审核期间发现调色板（之前的 QC 检查）没有正确标识 - 有效期缺失。 4. MR 区域被其他材料阻挡 - 无法进入。

SUBJECT: 2025-HMC-01
POINT_OUT: Safety  1. Respiratory mask in mixing area is mandatory but not worned 100% times. 2. Fire extinguisher blocked by paletes - mixing area. 3. Water leakage from the roof in mixing area (1st floor) - risk of accident. 4. Grinding Rework station - Several bottles with chemicals were not labelled.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: No periodical review of MR materials, and separated zone management by status. /MR, Scrap, Test./
COUNTER_MEASURE: MR zone and corresponding  area has been re-zoned and for better accesibility.
POINT_OUT_KO: 안전 1. 혼합실 내 호흡마스크는 필수이지만 100% 착용은 아닙니다. 2. 소화기가 팔레트-혼합 구역에 의해 차단되었습니다. 3. 혼합실(1층) 옥상에서 누수가 발생하여 사고위험이 있습니다. 4. 연삭 재작업 스테이션 - 화학 물질이 담긴 여러 병에 라벨이 붙어 있지 않았습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: Safety  1. Respiratory mask in mixing area is mandatory but not worned 100% times. 2. Fire extinguisher blocked by paletes - mixing area. 3. Water leakage from the roof in mixing area (1st floor) - risk of accident. 4. Grinding Rework station - Several bottles with chemicals were not labelled.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 安全 1. 混合区域强制佩戴呼吸面罩，但未佩戴 100% 次数。 2. 灭火器被托盘堵塞-混合区。 3. 混合区（一楼）屋顶漏水——存在事故风险。 4. 研磨返工站 - 几个装有化学品的瓶子没有贴标签。

ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 23년 제조, '24년 12월 expire 임에도 불구하고 정상입고 처리됨  (ERP상에서는 입고일 기준으로 LOT산정되어 유효기간이 제조업체가 제시한 expire일자보다 더 연장되어 관리됨) / 구매상황에 따라 해외수입 원부재에 대한 항구 장기재고로 추정되며, 해당 원부재에 대한 재검사 및 재고관리 절차 필요함
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Manufactured in 23 years, processed as normal receipt despite expiration in December 2024 (LOT is calculated based on the date of receipt in ERP and the expiration date is extended and managed beyond the expiration date suggested by the manufacturer) / Depending on the purchase situation, it is assumed to be a long-term port inventory for overseas imported raw materials, and re-inspection and inventory management procedures for the raw materials are required.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 制造23年，2024年12月过期仍按正常收货处理（根据ERP收货日期计算LOT，超过厂家建议的有效期进行延长管理）/根据采购情况，假设为海外进口原材料长期口岸库存，需要对原材料重新办理检验和库存管理手续。

SUBJECT: 2025-Others-01-JP-Internal Audit-OE Quality Assessment

ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 분동을 자주 사용(교대당 1회)하고, 표면이 오염되고, 청소 중 라벨이 손상됩니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: The weights are used frequently (once per shift), the surface is contaminated, and the labels are damaged during cleaning.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 砝码日常使用频次多（1次/班），表面污染，清扫时标签损坏
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1. 중량사용자는 각 교대조를 확인하여야 한다. 2. 파손된 부분이 발견된 경우, 분실된 경우 즉시 신고하십시오. 주간 교대 직원은 즉시 교체해야 합니다. 3. 체중현황은 주 1회 주간교대 전담직원이 매일 점검한다.

ROOT_CAUSE_EN: After the early modification of the control plan, the operation diary was not modified in time, and the consistency between the operation diary and the control plan was not checked.

SUBJECT: 2025-Others-01-JP-Internal Audit-OE Quality Assessment
POINT_OUT: 物流部分铁框状态较差，变形、破损、脏污较多，轮胎S隐患存在，污染发生较多
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 铁框室外露天存放发生灰尘污染。以及搬运过程中碰撞，导致油漆脱落
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1.入库使用前对有灰尘的铁框蚕食干净后再装载轮胎。2.表面有油漆脱落和生锈的铁矿挑出来安排重新喷塑翻新。3.局部变形和破损位置需要第三方业体维修合格后再返厂使用。4.叉车工定期教育和设备的定期维护
POINT_OUT_KO: 물류부분의 철프레임 상태가 좋지 않아 변형, 파손, 먼지가 많이 발생합니다. 타이어 S에는 숨겨진 위험이 있고 더 많은 오염이 발생합니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: The iron frame in the logistics part is in poor condition, with a lot of deformation, damage, and dirt. There are hidden dangers of tire S and more pollution occurs.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 物流部分铁框状态较差，变形、破损、脏污较多，轮胎S隐患存在，污染发生较多
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 철골을 야외에 보관할 때 먼지 오염이 발생합니다. 운송 중 충돌로 인해 페인트가 벗겨질 수 있습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Dust pollution occurs when iron frames are stored outdoors in the open air. And collision during transportation, causing the paint to peel off
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 铁框室外露天存放发生灰尘污染。以及搬运过程中碰撞，导致油漆脱落
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1. 보관하기 전에 먼지가 쌓인 철제 프레임을 청소한 후 타이어를 장착하십시오. 2. 페인트가 벗겨지고 표면에 녹이 발생한 철광석을 골라내고 재도포 및 개조 작업을 진행합니다. 3. 사용을 위해 공장으로 반품하기 전에 부분적인 변형 및 손상을 제3자에 의해 수리해야 합니다. 4. 지게차 작업자에 대한 정기 교육 및 장비의 정기 유지보수
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1. Before putting it into storage, clean the dusty iron frame and then load the tires. 2. Pick out the iron ore with peeling paint and rust on the surface and arrange for re-spraying and renovation. 3. Partial deformation and damage need to be repaired by a third party before returning to the factory for use. 4. Regular education for forklift workers and regular maintenance of equipment
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1.入库使用前对有灰尘的铁框蚕食干净后再装载轮胎。2.表面有油漆脱落和生锈的铁矿挑出来安排重新喷塑翻新。3.局部变形和破损位置需要第三方业体维修合格后再返厂使用。4.叉车工定期教育和设备的定期维护

SUBJECT: 2024-Tesla-01 - CSR Audit
POINT_OUT: [HR] Sampled 54 workers' working hour records in November 2023, June 2024 and October 2024 show that 0.7% workweeks exceed 60 hours with maximum 76 hours in October 2024, which is within RBA tolerance limit thus compliance.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: -Interview with workers confirm they do not have one day off per seven days sometimes.
COUNTER_MEASURE: Workers need receive at least one day off every 7 days.
POINT_OUT_KO: [HR] 2023년 11월, 2024년 6월, 2024년 10월 표본 54명의 근로자 근무 시간 기록을 보면 2024년 10월 주당 0.7%가 60시간을 초과해 최대 76시간을 초과해 RBA 허용 한도 내에 있어 준수하는 것으로 나타났다.
POINT_OUT_EN: [HR] Sampled 54 workers' working hour records in November 2023, June 2024 and October 2024 show that 0.7% workweeks exceed 60 hours with maximum 76 hours in October 2024, which is within RBA tolerance limit thus compliance.
POINT_OUT_ZH: [HR] Sampled 54 workers' working hour records in November 2023, June 2024 and October 2024 show that 0.7% workweeks exceed 60 hours with maximum 76 hours in October 2024, which is within RBA tolerance limit thus compliance.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: -근로자들과의 인터뷰를 통해 7일에 하루도 쉬지 못하는 경우가 있음을 확인했습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: -Interview with workers confirm they do not have one day off per seven days sometimes.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: - 与工人的访谈证实他们有时每 7 天没有休息一天。
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 근로자는 7일마다 최소 1일의 휴가를 받아야 합니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Workers need to receive at least one day off every 7 days.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: Workers need receive at least one day off every 7 days.

SUBJECT: 2024-Tesla-01 - CSR Audit
POINT_OUT: [EHS] Majority of evacuation plans in the production are not named as evacuation or emergency plans, there are no information about "your position", there is no assembly point marked, there is no legend about symbols. Most of the plans include positions of hydrants and fire extinguishers.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Two evacuation exits that are close to construction area, lead to grass and it is not clear where workers should safely evacuate.
COUNTER_MEASURE: Effective emergency preparedness and response program shall be established.
POINT_OUT_KO: [EHS] 제작중인 대부분의 대피 계획은 대피 또는 비상 계획으로 명명되지 않고, "당신의 위치"에 대한 정보도 없고, 표시된 집합 장소도 없고, 기호에 대한 전설도 없습니다. 대부분의 계획에는 소화전과 소화기의 위치가 포함됩니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: [EHS] Majority of evacuation plans in the production are not named as evacuation or emergency plans, there are no information about "your position", there is no assembly point marked, there is no legend about symbols. Most of the plans include positions of hydrants and fire extinguishers.
POINT_OUT_ZH: [EHS] 制作中的疏散预案大多没有命名为疏散或应急预案，没有“你的位置”信息，没有集合点标记，没有符号图例。大多数平面图都包括消防栓和灭火器的位置。
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 공사 지역에 가까운 두 개의 대피 출구는 잔디밭으로 이어져 있으며 작업자가 안전하게 대피해야 하는 곳이 명확하지 않습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Two evacuation exits that are close to construction area, lead to grass and it is not clear where workers should safely evacuate.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 两个疏散出口靠近施工区，通向草地，工人安全疏散尚不清楚。
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 효과적인 비상 대비 및 대응 프로그램을 수립해야 합니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Effective emergency preparedness and response program shall be established.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: Effective emergency preparedness and response program shall be established.

SUBJECT: 2024-Tesla-01 - CSR Audit
POINT_OUT: [Major]Transportation tickets and visas are paid for by certain categories of migrant workers, specifically those from Mongolia and Nepal. These expenses are not reimbursed by the facility, which is also confirmed by the facility management. Detailed information is not provided, as it is gathered during interviews and may have implications for the workers involved. (Repayment required)
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Workers during interview confirm that their ID documents are kept by them, not by the facility, and that there are no any kind of above bonded, prisoned, forced, trafficing labor.
COUNTER_MEASURE: Forced labor in any form, including but not limited to bonded (including debt bondage) or indentured labor, involuntary or exploitative prison labor, slavery, or trafficking of persons, is not permitted.
POINT_OUT_KO: [주요]교통표와 비자는 특정 범주의 이주노동자, 특히 몽골과 네팔 출신의 이주노동자들이 지불합니다. 해당 비용은 시설 측에서 환급하지 않으며, 이는 시설 관리팀에서도 확인하고 있습니다. 자세한 정보는 인터뷰 중에 수집되며 관련 근로자에게 영향을 미칠 수 있으므로 제공되지 않습니다. (환불 필요)
POINT_OUT_EN: [Major]Transportation tickets and visas are paid for by certain categories of migrant workers, specifically those from Mongolia and Nepal. These expenses are not reimbursed by the facility, which is also confirmed by the facility management. Detailed information is not provided, as it is gathered during interviews and may have implications for the workers involved. (Repayment required)
POINT_OUT_ZH: [Major]Transportation tickets and visas are paid for by certain categories of migrant workers, specifically those from Mongolia and Nepal. These expenses are not reimbursed by the facility, which is also confirmed by the facility management. Detailed information is not provided, as it is gathered during interviews and may have implications for the workers involved. (Repayment required)
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 인터뷰 중 근로자들은 자신의 신분증을 시설이 아닌 본인이 보관하고 있으며, 위의 어떤 종류의 보세, 투옥, 강제, 인신매매 노동이 없음을 확인합니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Workers during interview confirm that their ID documents are kept by them, not by the facility, and that there are no any kind of above bonded, prisoned, forced, trafficing labor.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: Workers during interview confirm that their ID documents are kept by them, not by the facility, and that there are no any kind of above bonded, prisoned, forced, trafficing labor.
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 담보(채무 속박 포함) 또는 계약 노동, 비자발적 또는 착취적인 감옥 노동, 노예 제도 또는 인신매매를 포함하되 이에 국한되지 않는 모든 형태의 강제 노동은 허용되지 않습니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Forced labor in any form, including but not limited to bonded (including debt bondage) or indentured labor, involuntary or exploitative prison labor, slavery, or trafficking of persons, is not permitted.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 不允许任何形式的强迫劳动，包括但不限于债役（包括债役）或契约劳工、非自愿或剥削性监狱劳工、奴役或人口贩运。

SUBJECT: 2024-Tesla-01 - CSR Audit
POINT_OUT: [Major]The employment contracts and job descriptions for Filipino and Nepalese workers are available in Hungarian and English but not in a language the workers fully understand.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: -Personal files for 2 Nepalese and 2 Filipino workers show that the employment contracts and job descriptions for Filipino and Nepalese workers are available in Hungarian and English but not in a language the workers fully understand.
COUNTER_MEASURE: Terms and conditions of employment are provided in writing and in their native language, or a language the worker can understand, before employment (foreign and internal migrant workers: before leaving their home country/region) and the key terms and conditions of employment are explained verbally in a language workers can understand, so workers understand what the terms and conditions of employment state.
POINT_OUT_KO: [주요]필리핀 및 네팔 근로자의 고용 계약 및 직무 설명은 헝가리어와 영어로 제공되지만 근로자가 완전히 이해할 수 있는 언어는 제공되지 않습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: [Major]The employment contracts and job descriptions for Filipino and Nepalese workers are available in Hungarian and English but not in a language the workers fully understand.
POINT_OUT_ZH: [主要]菲律宾和尼泊尔工人的雇佣合同和工作描述有匈牙利语和英语版本，但不是工人完全理解的语言。
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: - 네팔인 2명과 필리핀인 근로자 2명의 개인 파일에 따르면 필리핀인과 네팔인 근로자에 대한 고용 계약 및 직무 설명은 헝가리어와 영어로 제공되지만 근로자가 완전히 이해할 수 있는 언어는 제공되지 않습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: -Personal files for 2 Nepalese and 2 Filipino workers show that the employment contracts and job descriptions for Filipino and Nepalese workers are available in Hungarian and English but not in a language the workers fully understand.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: -Personal files for 2 Nepalese and 2 Filipino workers show that the employment contracts and job descriptions for Filipino and Nepalese workers are available in Hungarian and English but not in a language the workers fully understand.
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 고용조건은 고용 전(외국인 및 국내 이주노동자: 본국/지역을 떠나기 전) 근로자가 이해할 수 있는 모국어 또는 언어로 서면으로 제공되며, 주요 고용조건은 근로자가 이해할 수 있는 언어로 구두로 설명되어 근로자가 고용조건의 내용을 이해할 수 있도록 한다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Terms and conditions of employment are provided in writing and in their native language, or a language the worker can understand, before employment (foreign and internal migrant workers: before leaving their home country/region) and the key terms and conditions of employment are explained verbally in a language workers can understand, so workers understand what the terms and conditions of employment state.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: Terms and conditions of employment are provided in writing and in their native language, or a language the worker can understand, before employment (foreign and internal migrant workers: before leaving their home country/region) and the key terms and conditions of employment are explained verbally in a language workers can understand, so workers understand what the terms and conditions of employment state.

COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: PM skill matrix ensure and new equipment for each process
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: PM skill matrix ensure and new equipment for each process

SUBJECT: 2024-Tesla-01 - CSR Audit
POINT_OUT: [Major]The facility has Business Ethics Regulation defining grievance process. However, 1) The facility has anonymous system in English and Korean only, but not in other languages understandable to the workers. 2) The anonymous channel has system that grievances are sent and solved in Hankook European HQ, not locally. 3) The facility has Idea boxes, all around the facility, but they are mostly used for Ideas not for the complaints. 3) Workers are not fully aware of complaint system channels and procedures.
COUNTER_MEASURE: An adequate and effective process is established to anonymously report labor grievances confidentially without fear of reprisal or intimidation.
POINT_OUT_KO: [주요]본 시설에는 고충 처리 절차를 정의한 기업 윤리 규정이 있습니다. 다만, 1) 해당 시설에는 영어와 한국어로만 익명시스템을 갖추고 있으며, 근로자가 이해할 수 있는 기타 언어는 제공하지 않습니다. 2) 익명채널은 국내가 아닌 한국유럽본사에 고충사항을 전달하고 해결하는 시스템을 갖추고 있습니다. 3) 시설 내 곳곳에 아이디어 박스가 있으나 대부분 민원용이 아닌 아이디어용으로 사용됩니다. 3) 근로자는 불만사항 처리 시스템 채널 및 절차를 완전히 인식하지 못합니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: [Major]The facility has Business Ethics Regulation defining grievance process. However, 1) The facility has anonymous system in English and Korean only, but not in other languages understandable to the workers. 2) The anonymous channel has system that grievances are sent and solved in Hankook European HQ, not locally. 3) The facility has Idea boxes, all around the facility, but they are mostly used for Ideas not for the complaints. 3) Workers are not fully aware of complaint system channels and procedures.
POINT_OUT_ZH: [主要]该设施有定义申诉流程的商业道德法规。然而，1）工厂只有英语和韩语的匿名系统，没有工人可以理解的其他语言。 2) 匿名渠道的系统是在韩泰欧洲总部而非本地发送和解决申诉。 3) 该设施在设施周围设有创意箱，但它们主要用于创意而不是投诉。 3）工人对投诉系统的渠道和程序不完全了解。
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 보복이나 위협에 대한 두려움 없이 비밀리에 노동 불만을 익명으로 보고할 수 있는 적절하고 효과적인 프로세스가 확립되어 있습니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: An adequate and effective process is established to anonymously report labor grievances confidentially without fear of reprisal or intimidation.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 我们建立了充分、有效的流程，以保密方式匿名报告劳工申诉，而不必担心遭到报复或恐吓。

SUBJECT: 2024-Tesla-01 - CSR Audit
POINT_OUT: [EHS]Regular inspections of fire extinguishers are not made in RBA CoC frequency of monthly, but quarterly.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: The facility is equipped with manual fire alarm, smoke detectors, smoke windows and sprinkler system. However, regular inspections of fire extinguishers are not made in RBA CoC frequency of monthly, but quarterly.
COUNTER_MEASURE: Adequate and effective fire detection, alarm, and suppression systems are in place.
POINT_OUT_KO: [EHS]소화기 정기점검은 월별 RBA CoC 주기가 아닌 분기별로 실시됩니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: [EHS]Regular inspections of fire extinguishers are not made in RBA CoC frequency of monthly, but quarterly.
POINT_OUT_ZH: [EHS]RBA CoC 中的灭火器定期检查频率不是每月一次，而是每季度一次。
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 이 시설에는 수동 화재 경보기, 연기 감지기, 연기 창 및 스프링클러 시스템이 갖추어져 있습니다. 다만, 소화기 정기점검은 월별 RBA CoC 주기가 아닌 분기별로 실시하고 있다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: The facility is equipped with manual fire alarm, smoke detectors, smoke windows and sprinkler system. However, regular inspections of fire extinguishers are not made in RBA CoC frequency of monthly, but quarterly.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 该设施配备手动火灾报警器、烟雾探测器、防烟窗和喷水灭火系统。然而，RBA CoC 的定期检查频率不是每月一次，而是每季度一次。
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 적절하고 효과적인 화재 감지, 경보 및 진압 시스템이 마련되어 있습니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Adequate and effective fire detection, alarm, and suppression systems are in place.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: Adequate and effective fire detection, alarm, and suppression systems are in place.

SUBJECT: 2024-Tesla-01 - CSR Audit
POINT_OUT: Although facility doesn't have pregnant woman and nursing mothers within production workers, it would be good to be aware of this topic and to discuss about it with workers, if they need.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Pregnant woman is not working in the production, from the moment they announce they are pregnant. Family doctor sends pregnant ladies to pregnancy care leave. Nursing mother are not included in the risk assessment due the fact that Parental leave in Hungary is 3 years. Although facility doesn't have pregnant woman and nursing mothers within production workers, it would be good to be aware of this topic and to discuss about it with workers, if they need.
COUNTER_MEASURE: Gender-responsive measures are taken to ensure pregnant women and nursing mothers are not in working conditions, which could be hazardous to them or their child, and provide reasonable accommodations for nursing mothers.
POINT_OUT_KO: 비록 해당 시설의 생산직 근로자 중에 임산부와 수유부가 있는 것은 아니지만, 이에 대해 숙지하고 필요하다면 근로자들과 논의하는 것이 좋을 것 같습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: Although the facility doesn't have pregnant women and nursing mothers within production workers, it would be good to be aware of this topic and to discuss about it with workers, if they need.
POINT_OUT_ZH: Although facility doesn't have pregnant woman and nursing mothers within production workers, it would be good to be aware of this topic and to discuss about it with workers, if they need.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 임산부는 임신 사실을 발표한 순간부터 제작에 참여하지 않습니다. 가정의는 임산부에게 임신 관리 휴가를 보냅니다. 헝가리의 육아 휴직 기간은 3년이므로 수유부는 위험 평가에 포함되지 않습니다. 생산직 근로자 중 임산부, 수유부가 없는 시설이지만, 이에 대해 숙지하고 필요하다면 근로자와 협의하는 것이 좋을 것 같습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Pregnant woman is not working in the production, from the moment they announce they are pregnant. Family doctor sends pregnant ladies to pregnancy care leave. Nursing mother are not included in the risk assessment due to the fact that Parental leave in Hungary is 3 years. Although facility doesn't have pregnant woman and nursing mothers within production workers, it would be good to be aware of this topic and to discuss about it with workers, if they need.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: Pregnant woman is not working in the production, from the moment they announce they are pregnant. Family doctor sends pregnant ladies to pregnancy care leave. Nursing mother are not included in the risk assessment due the fact that Parental leave in Hungary is 3 years. Although facility doesn't have pregnant woman and nursing mothers within production workers, it would be good to be aware of this topic and to discuss about it with workers, if they need.
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 임산부와 수유모가 자신이나 자녀에게 위험할 수 있는 근무 조건에 있지 않도록 보장하고 수유모에게 합리적인 편의를 제공하기 위해 성별에 따른 조치가 취해집니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Gender-responsive measures are taken to ensure pregnant women and nursing mothers are not in working conditions, which could be hazardous to them or their child, and provide reasonable accommodations for nursing mothers.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: Gender-responsive measures are taken to ensure pregnant women and nursing mothers are not in working conditions, which could be hazardous to them or their child, and provide reasonable accommodations for nursing mothers.

SUBJECT: 2024-Tesla-01 - CSR Audit
POINT_OUT: [Major]Energy consumption and all scopes 1, 2 Greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions are tracked, documented, and publicly reported against an absolute corporate-wide GHG reduction goal. However, significant categories of Scope 3 Greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions are not tracked and documented.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: The facility calculates only Scope 1 and scope 2 emissions, for the boilers, vehicles, fork lifts. C02 calculation for 2024is checked. Total C02 emission is 42,140 t. Facility has reduction targets. However, Scope 3 GHG emissions are not calculated.
COUNTER_MEASURE: Scope 3 GHS emission should be calculated.
POINT_OUT_KO: [주요]에너지 소비 및 모든 범위 1, 2 온실가스(GHG) 배출은 전사적 온실가스 감축 목표에 대해 추적, 문서화 및 공개적으로 보고됩니다. 그러나 범위 3 온실가스(GHG) 배출의 중요한 범주는 추적 및 문서화되지 않습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: [Major]Energy consumption and all scopes 1, 2 Greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions are tracked, documented, and publicly reported against an absolute corporate-wide GHG reduction goal. However, significant categories of Scope 3 Greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions are not tracked and documented.
POINT_OUT_ZH: [Major]Energy consumption and all scopes 1, 2 Greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions are tracked, documented, and publicly reported against an absolute corporate-wide GHG reduction goal. However, significant categories of Scope 3 Greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions are not tracked and documented.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 이 시설은 보일러, 차량, 지게차에 대해 범위 1 및 범위 2 배출량만 계산합니다. 2024년의 C02 계산이 확인되었습니다. 총 CO2 배출량은 42,140톤입니다. 시설에는 감소 목표가 있습니다. 그러나 Scope 3 온실가스 배출량은 계산되지 않습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: The facility calculates only Scope 1 and scope 2 emissions, for the boilers, vehicles, fork lifts. C02 calculation for 2024is checked. Total C02 emission is 42,140 t. Facility has reduction targets. However, Scope 3 GHG emissions are not calculated.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: The facility calculates only Scope 1 and scope 2 emissions, for the boilers, vehicles, fork lifts. C02 calculation for 2024is checked. Total C02 emission is 42,140 t. Facility has reduction targets. However, Scope 3 GHG emissions are not calculated.
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 범위 3 GHS 배출량을 계산해야 합니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Scope 3 GHS emission should be calculated.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 应计算范围 3 GHS 排放量。

SUBJECT: 2024-Tesla-01 - CSR Audit
POINT_OUT: An ongoing two-way communication process with workers, internal and external stakeholders, where relevant or necessary, is established to obtain feedback on operational environmental practices and conditions and to foster continuous improvement. However, there are no MSDS sheets at the places where chemicals are used
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Meetings are organized at least twice per year. However, there are no MSDS sheets at the places where chemicals are used.
COUNTER_MEASURE: An adequate and effective ongoing two-way communication process with workers, internal and external stakeholders, where relevant or necessary, is established to obtain feedback on operational environmental practices and conditions and to foster continuous improvement.
POINT_OUT_KO: 관련되거나 필요한 경우 근로자, 내부 및 외부 이해관계자와의 지속적인 양방향 커뮤니케이션 프로세스가 확립되어 운영 환경 관행 및 조건에 대한 피드백을 얻고 지속적인 개선을 촉진합니다. 다만, 화학물질을 사용하는 장소에는 MSDS가 비치되어 있지 않습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: An ongoing two-way communication process with workers, internal and external stakeholders, where relevant or necessary, is established to obtain feedback on operational environmental practices and conditions and to foster continuous improvement. However, there are no MSDS sheets at the places where chemicals are used
POINT_OUT_ZH: 在相关或必要时，与工人、内部和外部利益相关者建立持续的双向沟通流程，以获得有关运营环境实践和条件的反馈，并促进持续改进。但使用化学品的地方却没有MSDS表
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 회의는 1년에 최소 2번 개최됩니다. 그러나 화학물질을 사용하는 장소에는 MSDS 시트가 없습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Meetings are organized at least twice per year. However, there are no MSDS sheets at the places where chemicals are used.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 会议每年至少组织两次。然而，使用化学品的地方却没有MSDS表。
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 관련되거나 필요한 경우 근로자, 내부 및 외부 이해관계자와의 적절하고 효과적인 지속적인 양방향 커뮤니케이션 프로세스가 확립되어 운영 환경 관행 및 조건에 대한 피드백을 얻고 지속적인 개선을 촉진합니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: An adequate and effective ongoing two-way communication process with workers, internal and external stakeholders, where relevant or necessary, is established to obtain feedback on operational environmental practices and conditions and to foster continuous improvement.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 在相关或必要时，与工人、内部和外部利益相关者建立充分且有效的持续双向沟通流程，以获得有关运营环境实践和条件的反馈，并促进持续改进。

SUBJECT: 2024-Tesla-01 - CSR Audit
POINT_OUT: [Major]There are QM, EMS and H&S manager appointed, but no RBA CoC responsible for ethics.

COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: Ethics responsibilities and authorities are adequately and effectively defined and assigned for all employee levels

SUBJECT: 2024-Tesla-01 - CSR Audit
POINT_OUT: ESG policy, covering most of the elements is shared on Hankook web page and it is public available, but it is only in Korean and English. It is not endorsed by local management, it is not translated to ALL applicable languages: Hungarian, Ukrainian, Nepalese, Philippines, Mongolian, and workers are not informed and trained based on it. Additionally, the facility has very detailed ESG CoC that expects from their suppliers but doesn’t implement it locally.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: ESG policy, covering most of the elements is shared on Hankook web page and it is public available, but it is only in Korean and English. It is not endorsed by local management, it is not translated to ALL applicable languages: Hungarian, Ukrainian, Nepalese, Philippines, Mongolian, and workers are not informed and trained based on it. Additionally, the facility has very detailed ESG CoC that expects from their suppliers, but doesn’t implement it locally.
COUNTER_MEASURE: An adequate and effective Code of Conduct is established and endorsed by executive management covering all elements of the RBA code.
POINT_OUT_KO: ESG 정책에 대한 대부분의 내용은 한국타이어 홈페이지에 공유되어 공개되어 있으나 한국어와 영어로만 제공됩니다. 이는 현지 경영진의 승인을 받지 않았으며 헝가리어, 우크라이나어, 네팔어, 필리핀, 몽골어 등 모든 해당 언어로 번역되지 않았으며 근로자는 이를 기반으로 한 정보와 교육을 받지 못했습니다. 또한 시설에는 공급업체에게 기대하지만 현지에서는 구현하지 않는 매우 상세한 ESG CoC가 있습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: ESG policy, most covering of the elements is shared on Hankook web page and it is public available, but it is only in Korean and English. It is not endorsed by local management, it is not translated to ALL applicable languages: Hungarian, Ukrainian, Nepalese, Philippines, Mongolian, and workers are not informed and trained based on it. Additionally, the facility has very detailed ESG CoC that expects from their suppliers but doesn’t implement it locally.
POINT_OUT_ZH: ESG policy, covering most of the elements is shared on Hankook web page and it is public available, but it is only in Korean and English. It is not endorsed by local management, it is not translated to ALL applicable languages: Hungarian, Ukrainian, Nepalese, Philippines, Mongolian, and workers are not informed and trained based on it. Additionally, the facility has very detailed ESG CoC that expects from their suppliers but doesn’t implement it locally.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: ESG 정책에 대한 대부분의 내용은 한국타이어 홈페이지에 공유되어 공개되어 있으나 한국어와 영어로만 제공됩니다. 이는 현지 경영진의 승인을 받지 않았으며 헝가리어, 우크라이나어, 네팔어, 필리핀, 몽골어 등 모든 해당 언어로 번역되지 않았으며 근로자는 이를 기반으로 한 정보와 교육을 받지 못했습니다. 또한 시설에는 공급업체로부터 기대하는 매우 상세한 ESG CoC가 있지만 이를 현지에서 구현하지는 않습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: ESG policy, most covering of the elements is shared on Hankook web page and it is public available, but it is only in Korean and English. It is not endorsed by local management, it is not translated to ALL applicable languages: Hungarian, Ukrainian, Nepalese, Philippines, Mongolian, and workers are not informed and trained based on it. Additionally, the facility has very detailed ESG CoC that expects from their suppliers, but doesn’t implement it locally.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: ESG policy, covering most of the elements is shared on Hankook web page and it is public available, but it is only in Korean and English. It is not endorsed by local management, it is not translated to ALL applicable languages: Hungarian, Ukrainian, Nepalese, Philippines, Mongolian, and workers are not informed and trained based on it. Additionally, the facility has very detailed ESG CoC that expects from their suppliers, but doesn’t implement it locally.
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: RBA 강령의 모든 요소를 포괄하는 적절하고 효과적인 행동 강령이 경영진에 의해 확립되고 승인됩니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: An adequate and effective Code of Conduct is established and endorsed by executive management covering all elements of the RBA code.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: An adequate and effective Code of Conduct is established and endorsed by executive management covering all elements of the RBA code.

SUBJECT: 2024-GM-01
POINT_OUT: 部分公司指标未达项目缺少分析，无改善措施。
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 轻微未达标事项只限于所属部门内部检讨对策，未有文件留档
COUNTER_MEASURE: 对指标未达标的项目进行详细分析，并树立针对性改善方案，追踪改善效果，直至达标
POINT_OUT_KO: 회사의 지표가 충족되지 않는 일부 프로젝트에 대한 분석 및 개선 조치가 부족합니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: There is a lack of analysis and improvement measures for some projects where the company's indicators are not met.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 部分公司指标未达项目缺少分析，无改善措施。
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 경미한 위반 사항에 대해서는 해당 부서의 내부 검토 및 조치만 실시하며, 어떠한 문서도 보관하지 않습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Minor non-compliance matters are only subject to internal review and countermeasures by the department to which they belong, and no documents are kept.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 轻微未达标事项只限于所属部门内部检讨对策，未有文件留档
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 지표가 기준을 충족하지 못하는 프로젝트에 대해 상세 분석을 실시하고 목표 개선 계획을 수립하며 기준이 충족될 때까지 개선 결과를 추적합니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Conduct detailed analysis of projects whose indicators do not meet the standards, establish targeted improvement plans, and track the improvement results until the standards are met.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 对指标未达标的项目进行详细分析，并树立针对性改善方案，追踪改善效果，直至达标

SUBJECT: 2024-GM-01
POINT_OUT: 高层参与快反较少。
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 高层参与重大事项，或所属部门负责人单独向高层报告
COUNTER_MEASURE: 向后快反会议，高层每周至少参加1次
POINT_OUT_KO: 고위 경영진은 신속한 대응에 덜 관여합니다.

SUBJECT: 2024-Hyundai-01
POINT_OUT: Recoup consumption :    How to guarantee the Recoup %
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Recycle rubber usage is %22 for Hyundai  not defined in drawing
COUNTER_MEASURE: Recoup Consumption Agreement   * Do not change Consumption discuss with R&D and Quality   * BC3 Project tire which have been applied 22% consumption      and all test were verified and approved.       So Hankook have to control same consumption 22% of       recoup for mass production to be satisfied drawing ER.
POINT_OUT_KO: Recoup 소비 : Recoup % 보장 방법
POINT_OUT_EN: Recoup consumption : How to guarantee the Recoup %
POINT_OUT_ZH: Recoup consumption :    How to guarantee the Recoup %
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 재활용 고무 사용량은 도면에 정의되지 않은 현대자동차의 %22입니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Recycle rubber usage is %22 for Hyundai not defined in drawing
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: Recycle rubber usage is %22 for Hyundai  not defined in drawing
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 회수 소비 계약 * 소비량을 변경하지 마십시오. R&D 및 품질팀과 논의합니다. * 22% 소비량을 적용하고 모든 테스트를 검증 및 승인한 BC3 프로젝트 타이어입니다.       그래서 한국이 ER을 만족하려면 대량생산에 대한 회수율 22%를 동일 소비량으로 조절해야 한다.

SUBJECT: 2024-VW-TAVASCAN-01
POINT_OUT: 21“成型，搭接时两侧局部不到位不能实现一次成型，需人工处理，损失节拍
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 成型机设计为办自动，PA接头需手动调整
COUNTER_MEASURE: 生产/设备:检讨确认 该现象 属于 正常作业状，自动糕曲，人工处理，能满足品质及生产的需要。
POINT_OUT_KO: 21" 성형. 겹칠 경우 양면의 부품이 제 위치에 있지 않아 한번에 성형할 수 없음. 수작업 가공이 필요하므로 사이클타임 손실 발생.
POINT_OUT_EN: 21" molding. When overlapping, parts of both sides are not in place and cannot be molded at one time. Manual processing is required, which results in loss of cycle time.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 21“成型，搭接时两侧局部不到位不能实现一次成型，需人工处理，损失节拍
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 성형기는 자동으로 작동하도록 설계되었으며 PA 커넥터는 수동으로 조정해야 합니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: The molding machine is designed to operate automatically, and the PA connector needs to be adjusted manually.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 成型机设计为办自动，PA接头需手动调整
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 생산/장비: 검토 결과 이러한 현상은 품질 및 생산 요구를 충족할 수 있는 정상적인 작동 조건, 자동 베이킹 및 수동 처리에 속한다는 것이 확인되었습니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Production/Equipment: The review confirmed that this phenomenon belongs to normal operation conditions, automatic baking and manual processing, which can meet the needs of quality and production.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 生产/设备:检讨确认 该现象 属于 正常作业状，自动糕曲，人工处理，能满足品质及生产的需要。

SUBJECT: 2024.Octber - Tesla Supplier Selection Audit
POINT_OUT: Break down or Issue reporting system is manual, No MES or existing  Ez Heims  used. Supplier need to start tracking the Issue reporting and closure in the system itself rather manual.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Breakdown report still keeping by each Facility Maintenance in charge staff. So, the report can’t be accessed by another facility maintenance staff
COUNTER_MEASURE: All breakdown machine report should be uploaded in MES system by each Facility Maintenance in charge staff.
POINT_OUT_KO: 고장 또는 문제 보고 시스템은 수동이며 MES 또는 기존 Ez Heim을 사용하지 않습니다. 공급업체는 수동이 아닌 시스템 자체에서 문제 보고 및 종료 추적을 시작해야 합니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: Break down or Issue reporting system is manual, No MES or existing  Ez Heims  used. Supplier need to start tracking the Issue reporting and closure in the system itself rather manual.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 故障或问题报告系统是手动的，不使用 MES 或现有的 Ez Heims。供应商需要开始在系统本身中跟踪问题报告和关闭，而不是手动进行。
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 각 시설 유지 관리 담당 직원이 고장 보고서를 계속 보관하고 있습니다. 따라서 다른 시설 유지관리 직원은 보고서에 접근할 수 없습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Breakdown report still keeping by each Facility Maintenance in charge staff. So, the report can’t be accessed by another facility maintenance staff
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 故障报告仍由各设施维护负责人员保存。因此，其他设施维护人员无法访问该报告
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 모든 기계 고장 보고서는 각 시설 유지 관리 담당 직원이 MES 시스템에 업로드해야 합니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: All breakdown machine report should be uploaded in MES system by each Facility Maintenance in charge staff.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 所有故障机器报告均应由各设施维护负责人员上传至MES系统。

SUBJECT: 2024.Octber - Tesla Supplier Selection Audit
POINT_OUT: Supplier Qualification has the Procedure G/KOS-L36A-03-01-E, starts with evaluation of R&D and then the trial / build phase to register the supplier, SQA is carried out using  VDA6.3 check-list, All supplier data base is managed with SQMS and scheduled by global team and supplier audit scope is managed region specific by the plant and HQ jointly together. ESG Checklist is tabled separately and assessed but the weightage is low and even the supplier has a low score on ESG ( Environmental, Health, Safety, Code of conduct & Labor Practice) still has a qualifying score need to work in the scoring system
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: The score system for grading supplier is based on Global Hankook Standard
COUNTER_MEASURE: For ESG section in the supplier evaluation, applying the downgrade and down scoring rule is on reviewing by HQ) ESG, Purchasing Planning team. It would be applied to the next year evaluation through Global ESG committee in Dec. 2024.

ESG 체크리스트는 별도로 표로 작성되어 평가되지만 가중치가 낮고 공급업체도 ESG(환경, 보건, 안전, 행동 강령 및 노동 관행) 점수가 낮습니다. 여전히 적격 점수가 있으므로 채점 시스템에서 작업해야 합니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: Supplier Qualification has the Procedure G/KOS-L36A-03-01-E, starts with evaluation of R&D and then the trial / build phase to register the supplier, SQA is carried out using VDA6.3 check-list, All supplier data base is managed with SQMS and scheduled by global team and supplier audit scope is managed region specific by the plant and HQ jointly together. ESG Checklist is tabled separately and assessed but the weightage is low and even the supplier has a low score on ESG ( Environmental, Health, Safety, Code of conduct & Labor Practice) still has a qualifying score need to work in the scoring system
POINT_OUT_ZH: Supplier Qualification has the Procedure G/KOS-L36A-03-01-E, starts with evaluation of R&D and then the trial / build phase to register the supplier, SQA is carried out using  VDA6.3 check-list, All supplier data base is managed with SQMS and scheduled by global team and supplier audit scope is managed region specific by the plant and HQ jointly together. ROOT_CAUSE_EN: The score system for grading supplier is based on Global Hankook Standard
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 供应商分级评分系统基于全球韩泰轮胎标准
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: For ESG section in the supplier evaluation, applying the downgrade and down scoring rule is on reviewing by HQ) ESG, Purchasing Planning team. It would be applied to the next year evaluation through Global ESG committee in Dec. 2024.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: For ESG section in the supplier evaluation, applying the downgrade and down scoring rule is on reviewing by HQ) ESG, Purchasing Planning team. It would be applied to the next year evaluation through Global ESG committee in Dec. 2024.

SUBJECT: 2024.Octber - Tesla Supplier Selection Audit
POINT_OUT: Performance metrics and reaction mechanism is weak as its only quarterly monitoring currently. Need to improve the Scoring system to Monthly and reaction should be fast enough to take the actions as all the supplies comes under bulk category with tones of material.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: -. The performance system for the supplier is based on Global Hankook Standard  -. Related the supplier issue (Delivery, Quality), We followed up directly when     the issues occur
COUNTER_MEASURE: For key raw materials requiring management, we will collaborate with relevant departments to select the inspection targets on a monthly basis and plan additional analysis by R&D.   ※ Example: For the expansion and increased use of recycled materials     → additional monthly testing for recycled carbon black, recycled butyl, and        recycled rubber will be conducted.
POINT_OUT_KO: 현재 유일한 분기별 모니터링으로 성과 지표 및 반응 메커니즘이 취약합니다. 채점 시스템을 월간으로 개선해야 하며 모든 공급품이 재료 톤이 있는 대량 카테고리에 속하므로 조치를 취할 수 있을 만큼 반응이 빨라야 합니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: Performance metrics and reaction mechanism is weak as its only quarterly monitoring currently. Need to improve the Scoring system to Monthly and reaction should be fast enough to take the actions as all the supplies comes under bulk category with tones of material.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 绩效指标和反应机制较弱，目前仅按季度进行监测。需要将评分系统改进为每月，并且反应应该足够快以采取行动，因为所有供应品都属于带有材料色调的散装类别。
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: -. The performance system for the supplier is based on Global Hankook Standard  -. Related the supplier issue (Delivery, Quality), We followed up directly when     the issues occur
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: -. The performance system for the supplier is based on Global Hankook Standard -. Related the supplier issue (Delivery, Quality), We followed up directly when the issues occur
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: -.供应商的绩效体系基于全球韩泰标准 -。涉及供应商问题（交期、质量），问题发生时我们直接跟进
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 관리가 필요한 핵심 원자재에 대해서는 유관부서와 협업하여 월 단위로 검사 대상을 선정하고 R&D를 통한 추가 분석을 계획할 예정입니다.   ※ 예시 : 재활용 소재 확대 및 사용 확대를 위해 → 재활용 카본블랙, 재활용 부틸, 재활용 고무에 대한 추가 월별 테스트를 실시합니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: For key raw materials requiring management, we will collaborate with relevant departments to select the inspection targets on a monthly basis and plan additional analysis by R&D.   ※ Example: For the expansion and increased use of recycled materials     → additional monthly testing for recycled carbon black, recycled butyl, and        recycled rubber will be conducted.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 对于需要管理的关键原材料，我们将会同相关部门每月选定检查对象，并计划由研发部门进行补充分析。   ※ 例：为了扩大和增加再生材料的使用→每月对再生炭黑、再生丁基橡胶、再生橡胶进行追加检测。

POINT_OUT: 1. Curing process alarm log storage is asked to analyze if any issues, currently alarms are real time basis not logged and backed-up. 2. 3D laser measurement UF m/c is requested to allocate for Tesla as only 1 machinehas the capability remaining all M/cs are 2D laser pointed.  3. Currently error-proof methods are verified in 1 time/week ( Building & Curing process are 1 time/month ) and recorded to check sheet - Need to improve with enhanced frequency.

When material change – OP doing RFID check-System on NMP show            list data        b. QC verification error proof system 2 time / month
POINT_OUT_KO: 1. 문제가 있는지 분석하기 위해 경화 프로세스 알람 로그 저장이 요청됩니다. 현재 알람은 기록 및 백업되지 않고 실시간 기반입니다. 2. 3D 레이저 측정 UF m/c는 Tesla에 할당하도록 요청됩니다. 단 1대의 기계만이 나머지 모든 M/cs가 2D 레이저를 가리키는 기능을 갖고 있기 때문입니다.  3. 현재 오류 방지 방법은 주 1회(Building & Curing 과정은 월 1회)로 검증하고 체크시트에 기록합니다. - 빈도를 높여 개선이 필요합니다.

Curing process alarm log storage is asked to analyze if any issues, currently alarms are real time basis not logged and backed-up. 2. 3D laser measurement UF m/c is requested to allocate for Tesla as only 1 machinehas the capability remaining all M/cs are 2D laser pointed.  3. Currently error-proof methods are verified in 1 time/week ( Building & Curing process are 1 time/month ) and recorded to check sheet - Need to improve with enhanced frequency.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 1.固化过程报警日志存储要求分析是否有问题，目前报警是实时的，没有记录和备份。 2. 要求为 Tesla 配备 3D 激光测量 UF m/c，因为只有 1 台机器具有此功能，其余所有 M/c 均为 2D 激光指向。  3. 目前的防错方法验证为每周 1 次（构建和固化过程为每月 1 次）并记录到检查表 - 需要提高频率进行改进。
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 1) 경화기에는 알람 녹화를 위한 인프라가 없습니다. 2) 2023년부터 3D BPS를 시험용으로만 1대에 설치합니다. 3) 특히 GT 중량 풀 프루프 구축의 경우 교대마다 이미 확인하고 있으며 그 외의 경우에는 고위험 풀 프루프와 저위험 풀 프루프가 분류되지 않습니다.

Gauge R&R Uniformity only based on OE customer requirement.

MSA 연구는 측벽 게이지, 측벽 폭, 비드 내부 둘레, 비드 필러(Apex) 프로필, JLB 스트립, 트레드 길이 등 7개 매개변수로만 제한됩니다. - 도구 선택에 대한 합리적 근거가 없고 문자 선택에 대한 근거가 없습니다. 단지 7자 및 70개 이상의 도구 중 7개 도구(프로파일 프로젝터, 캘리퍼)는 다른 매개변수를 사용하지 않습니다. 2. 데이터 검색이 좋지 않아 Excel의 현재 데이터에서 도구 및 게이지 수를 계산할 수 없습니다. 3. 속성 4에 대한 결과가 없습니다. GRR 연구가 수행되지 않았습니다. 타이어 균일성 측정

POINT_OUT_ZH: 1. MSA 研究仅限于 7 个参数 – 胎侧规格、胎侧宽度、胎圈内周长、胎圈填料 (Apex) 轮廓、JLB 条带、胎面长度 - 没有选择仪器的合理性，没有选择字符的合理性，只有 7 个字符和 70 多个仪器中的 7 个仪器（轮廓投影仪、卡尺），没有使用其他参数 2. 数据检索很差，无法从 Excel 中的当前数据中计算仪器和仪表。 3. 属性没有可用结果 4. 未进行 GRR 研究 轮胎均匀性测量

SUBJECT: 2024.Octber - Tesla Supplier Selection Audit
POINT_OUT: Customer Complaints in 2023 : 7 and 2024 as on date : 7 Complaints, Majorly on tire mix-up, Pinhole, dirt, foreign material, CFT approach followed. ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Less the system to prevent recurrence issue of the costumer complaint.

Update CQMS system : M-Code will shows information such as project          info, field return info, issue history info to prevent recurrence.         → Target system update : Mar. 2025

SUBJECT: 2024.Octber - Tesla Supplier Selection Audit
POINT_OUT: - FMEA still 3rd edition in use and AIAG VDA nor 4th edition is not in practice, FMEAs are in excel sheets and Severity ratings are based on special characters however occurrence rating doesn’t have a back up for rating rationale and same for detection as well.  - Expectations for detection level is not set as the CC character of Severity 8-9 has detection rating varies to all the stages. DFMEA / PFMEA are centrally stored in cloud based system for Engineering documents. - Local Resource lack of knowledge in the FMEA, Supplier need to work on the training mechanism both internal / external for Foundation documents of FMEA, CP, Problem Solving approaches.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: FMEA VDA AIAG Version 4th has been implemented in FORD PFMEA, but have not implemented yet in another Hankook Tire Indonesia`s OE customers, because only FORD request to using PFMEA VDA AIAG Version 4.
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1. Managing FMEA through the Global HKT website,      currently on developing(Target March 2025)      2. FMEA training schedule with HQ (Refer to training plan)  3. For TESLA will update FMEA VDA the latest version
POINT_OUT_KO: - FMEA는 여전히 3판을 사용 중이고 AIAG VDA 또는 4판은 실제로 사용되지 않습니다. FMEA는 Excel 시트에 있고 심각도 등급은 특수 문자를 기반으로 하지만 발생 등급에는 등급 근거에 대한 백업이 없으며 탐지에도 동일합니다. - 심각도 8~9의 CC 캐릭터는 단계마다 탐지 등급이 다르기 때문에 탐지 수준에 대한 기대치는 설정되지 않습니다. DFMEA / PFMEA는 엔지니어링 문서용 클라우드 기반 시스템에 중앙 집중식으로 저장됩니다. - 현지 리소스의 FMEA 지식 부족, 공급업체는 FMEA, CP, 문제 해결 접근 방식의 기초 문서에 대한 내부/외부 교육 메커니즘을 개발해야 합니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: - FMEA still 3rd edition in use and AIAG VDA nor 4th edition is not in practice, FMEAs are in excel sheets and Severity ratings are based on special characters however occurrence rating doesn’t have a back up for rating rationale and same for detection as well. - Expectations for detection level is not set as the CC character of Severity 8-9 has detection rating varies to all the stages. DFMEA / PFMEA are centrally stored in cloud based system for Engineering documents. - Local Resource lack of knowledge in the FMEA, Supplier need to work on the training mechanism both internal / external for Foundation documents of FMEA, CP, Problem Solving approaches.
POINT_OUT_ZH: - FMEA still 3rd edition in use and AIAG VDA nor 4th edition is not in practice, FMEAs are in excel sheets and Severity ratings are based on special characters however occurrence rating doesn’t have a back up for rating rationale and same for detection as well.  - Expectations for detection level is not set as the CC character of Severity 8-9 has detection rating varies to all the stages. DFMEA / PFMEA are centrally stored in cloud based system for Engineering documents. - Local Resource lack of knowledge in the FMEA, Supplier need to work on the training mechanism both internal / external for Foundation documents of FMEA, CP, Problem Solving approaches.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: FMEA VDA AIAG Version 4th는 FORD PFMEA에 구현되었지만, FORD에서만 PFMEA VDA AIAG Version 4 사용을 요청했기 때문에 다른 한국타이어 인도네시아 OE 고객사에서는 아직 구현하지 않았습니다.

ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: FMEA VDA AIAG Version 4th has been implemented in FORD PFMEA, but have not implemented yet in another Hankook Tire Indonesia`s OE customers, because only FORD request to using PFMEA VDA AIAG Version 4.

COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1. Managing FMEA through the Global HKT website, currently on developing(Target March 2025) 2. FMEA training schedule with HQ (Refer to training plan) 3. For TESLA will update FMEA VDA the latest version
