COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 고무 숙성의 개념은 고무가 다음 혼합 단계에 들어갈 때 혼합 온도가 균일해지길 바라는 마음에서 제안되었습니다. CP와 JP 장비 상태가 다르고 생산 능력도 다르므로 공장의 실제 상황에 따라 수정되지 않습니다. 다른 배포도 늘릴 필요가 있다고 생각되면 다시 연락해 배포 논의를 하시기 바랍니다. 1. 기술부서 : 성숙한 시간관리 복합 검토가 완료되었습니다. 2. 품질관리 부서: - IT 라벨 숙성 시간을 추가합니다. GMES 관리 프로그램이 추가되었습니다. GMES에는 시간 조정 권한이 있어야 합니다. - 품질 관리 기술적인 T 요구 사항에 따른 성숙한 시간 관리.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: The concept of rubber ripening is proposed in the hope that the mixing temperature will be uniform when the rubber enters the next step of mixing. CP and JP equipment status is different, the production capacity is different, according to the actual situation of the factory will not be modified. If other deployments feel the need to increase, please contact me again for deployment discussion. 1. Technical Department: Mature time management compound review completed. 2. Quality Control Department: - IT Adds the label ripening time. The GMES management program is added. GMES must have time adjustment permission. - Quality management Mature time management according to technical T requirements.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 橡胶熟化概念的提出是希望橡胶进入下一步混炼时混炼温度均匀。 CP和JP设备状态不同，产能不同，根据工厂实际情况不会进行修改。如果其他部署觉得需要增加，请再次联系我进行部署讨论。 1.技术部：成熟的时间管理复合审核完成。 2. 质量控制部门： - IT 添加标签成熟时间。增加GMES管理程序。 GMES必须有时间调整许可。 - 质量管理 根据技术T要求进行成熟的时间管理。

COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1. 신규 제조사의 A 의약품 진열 포장의 외부 포장을 적시에 업데이트하고 확인합니다. 2. 약품 조제 시 외부 포장 및 바코드를 확인하고 확인하십시오. 오류 방지 및 오류 방지 시스템을 사용하십시오. 3. 2025년까지 Q약물 자동측정 확대를 추진할 계획이다. 4. 2025년까지 Q약물 자동측정이 추가되지 않을 경우 장비부서에 광감지장치 추가를 요청한다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1. Timely update and confirm the outer packaging of the new manufacturer's A drug display package. 2. Check and confirm the outer packaging and barcode during drug dispensing. Use error prevention and error prevention systems. 3. Plan to promote the increase of automatic measurement of Q drugs by 2025. 4. If Q drug automatic metering is not added by 2025, invite the equipment department to add a light sensing device.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1. Timely update and confirm the outer packaging of the new manufacturer's A drug display package. 2. Check and confirm the outer packaging and barcode during drug dispensing. Use error prevention and error prevention systems. 3. Plan to promote the increase of automatic measurement of Q drugs by 2025. 4. ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 문제는 수리고무를 해당 리턴고무 보관장소에 보관해야 하는데, Q고무 보관장소에 잘못 넣어야 한다는 것입니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: The problem is that the repair rubber should be stored in the corresponding return rubber storage place, and wrongly placed in the Q rubber storage place
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: The problem is that the repair rubber should be stored in the corresponding return rubber storage place, and wrongly placed in the Q rubber storage place
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1. 이상고무는 사용 후 반품되는 수리고무입니다 2. 수리고무에는 고무라벨이 붙어있습니다 3. 수리고무는 해당 반품고무 보관장소에 보관해야 하고, Q고무 보관장소에 잘못 넣어야 하는 문제 개선조치 (1) 이상고무 보관위치를 즉시 수정 (2) 수리고무에 반품확인 통보를 하고 임의로 보관하지 말것, 관련직원 전파교육
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1. The abnormal rubber is the repair rubber that is returned after being used 2. The repair rubber has a rubber label on it 3. The problem is that the repair rubber should be stored in the corresponding return rubber storage place, and wrongly placed in the Q rubber storage place Improvement measures (1) Immediately correct the abnormal rubber storage location (2) Repair rubber must be notified to confirm the return, shall not be stored at will, related personnel spread education
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1. The abnormal rubber is the repair rubber that is returned after being used 2. The repair rubber has a rubber label on it 3. The problem is that the repair rubber should be stored in the corresponding return rubber storage place, and wrongly placed in the Q rubber storage place Improvement measures (1) Immediately correct the abnormal rubber storage location (2) Repair rubber must be notified to confirm the return, shall not be stored at will, related personnel spread education

SUBJECT: 2024-Others-01-MP-Internal Audit-OE Quality Assessment
POINT_OUT: Customer Support / Customer Satisfaction / Service
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Are all requirements relating to QM system, product and process fulfilled?
COUNTER_MEASURE: "New method for Initial Tire inspection implemented on the process but related documents ( workstandard, procedure ) are not updated.  P05-R06H-03-02 First Time inspection ( curing) standard notice the PDA usage for inspection acutally using a camera measurement system which not ipmlemented in the workstandard."
POINT_OUT_KO: 고객지원 / 고객만족 / 서비스
POINT_OUT_EN: Customer Support / Customer Satisfaction / Service
POINT_OUT_ZH: Customer Support / Customer Satisfaction / Service
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: QM 시스템, 제품 및 프로세스와 관련된 모든 요구 사항이 충족됩니까?
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Are all requirements relating to QM system, product and process fulfilled?
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: Are all requirements relating to QM system, product and process fulfilled?
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: "초기 타이어 검사를 위한 새로운 방법이 프로세스에 구현되었지만 관련 문서(작업 표준, 절차)가 업데이트되지 않았습니다. P05-R06H-03-02 최초 검사(경화) 표준은 작업 표준에 구현되지 않은 카메라 측정 시스템을 사용하여 PDA를 사용하여 정확하게 검사하도록 합니다."
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: "New method for Initial Tire inspection implemented on the process but related documents ( workstandard, procedure ) are not updated.  P05-R06H-03-02 First Time inspection ( curing) standard notice the PDA usage for inspection acutally using a camera measurement system which not ipmlemented in the workstandard."
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: “在流程中实施了初始轮胎检查的新方法，但相关文件（工作标准、程序）未更新。P05-R06H-03-02首次检查（固化）标准注意到PDA使用相机测量系统进行实际检查，但工作标准中未实施。”

SUBJECT: 2024-Benz-01
POINT_OUT: There is near 20 minutes time delay gap in the tire curing machine computer. There is high risk for the traceability once any deviation found.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: The time difference is caused by the off-duty power failure (power switchover of the main device).
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1.When off work, check the time accuracy of each shift. 2.If there is any deviation, correct it on the curing machine computer in time.
POINT_OUT_KO: 타이어 경화기 컴퓨터에는 거의 20분의 시간 지연 간격이 있습니다. 편차가 발견되면 추적 가능성이 높아질 위험이 높습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: There is near 20 minutes time delay gap in the tire curing machine computer. There is high risk for the traceability once any deviation found.
POINT_OUT_ZH: There is near 20 minutes time delay gap in the tire curing machine computer. There is high risk for the traceability once any deviation found.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 시간차는 비번 정전(주 장치의 전원 전환)으로 인해 발생합니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: The time difference is caused by the off-duty power failure (power switchover of the main device).
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 该时间差是由于下班停电（主设备电源切换）造成的。
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1. 퇴근 시 각 교대근무시간의 정확성을 확인한다. 2. 편차가 있는 경우 경화기 컴퓨터에서 적시에 수정하십시오.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1.When off work, check the time accuracy of each shift. 2.If there is any deviation, correct it on the curing machine computer in time.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1.When off work, check the time accuracy of each shift. 2.If there is any deviation, correct it on the curing machine computer in time.

SUBJECT: 2024-Benz-01
POINT_OUT: There is 5 minutes time delay gap in the calendaring machine computer.

POINT_OUT_ZH: There is 5 minutes time delay gap in the calendaring machine computer.

ROOT_CAUSE_EN: 1.The calendaring machine computer time is not accurate. 2.There's no regular personnel check and confirm.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 1.The calendaring machine computer time is not accurate. 2.There's no regular personnel check and confirm.
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1. 컴퓨터 시간은 베이징 표준시로 조정됩니다. 2.정기적인 포인트 체크 시간 및 교정. (1회/주) 3.포인트 확인 기록표에는 포인트 확인 시간이 기록됩니다.

COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1.The computer time is adjusted to standard Beijing time. 2.Regular point check time and calibration. (once/week) 3.The point check record table records the point check time.

SUBJECT: 2024-Benz-01
POINT_OUT: Some suspected tires after final visual inspection have been put on the pallet with chalk marking for the next high level judgement. There is mixing risk even no outflow risk throng scanning the barcode.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: The process of disposal of suspicious tires is incomplete.
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1.A red iron frame is added near the final inspection line, suspected tires are placed in the iron frame to prevent the risk of mixing the suspected tires with the normal tires. 2. The tire surface is marked with white chalk, and the tire is stored in the designated isolation area. 3.The inspector checks the special card out of the warehouse, records the checked retained tires, and checks the actual tires with the records after the end of the car. 4.Line Leader will record the disposal of retained tires in the work diary. 5.The Line Leader will scan and register the retained tires, and the registration record can be checked with the special card and the actual tires.
POINT_OUT_KO: 최종 육안 검사 후 일부 의심되는 타이어는 다음 높은 수준의 판단을 위해 분필 표시가 있는 팔레트 위에 놓였습니다. 바코드를 스캔하는 동안 유출 위험이 없더라도 혼합 위험이 있습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: Some suspected tires after final visual inspection have been put on the pallet with chalk marking for the next high level judgment. There is mixing risk even no outflow risk throng scanning the barcode.
POINT_OUT_ZH: Some suspected tires after final visual inspection have been put on the pallet with chalk marking for the next high level judgement. There is mixing risk even no outflow risk throng scanning the barcode.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 의심스러운 타이어의 폐기 과정이 불완전합니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: The process of disposal of suspicious tires is incomplete.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: The process of disposal of suspicious tires is incomplete.
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1. 최종 검사 라인 근처에 빨간색 철제 프레임을 추가하고 의심되는 타이어를 철제 프레임에 배치하여 의심되는 타이어와 일반 타이어가 섞이는 위험을 방지합니다. 2. 타이어 표면에 흰색 분필로 표시를 하고, 지정된 격리 장소에 타이어를 보관합니다. 3. 검사원은 창고에서 특수 카드를 확인하고, 확인된 보유 타이어를 기록하며, 차량 종료 후 기록과 함께 실제 타이어를 확인합니다. 4.Line Leader는 작업일지에 보관된 타이어 폐기 내역을 기록합니다. 5. 보유 타이어를 라인리더가 스캔하여 등록하며, 등록기록은 특수카드와 실제 타이어로 확인 가능합니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1.A red iron frame is added near the final inspection line, suspected tires are placed in the iron frame to prevent the risk of mixing the suspected tires with the normal tires. 2. The tire surface is marked with white chalk, and the tire is stored in the designated isolation area. 3.The inspector checks the special card out of the warehouse, records the checked retained tires, and checks the actual tires with the records after the end of the car. 4.Line Leader will record the disposal of tires retained in the work diary. 5.The Line Leader will scan and register the retained tires, and the registration record can be checked with the special card and the actual tires.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1.A red iron frame is added near the final inspection line, suspected tires are placed in the iron frame to prevent the risk of mixing the suspected tires with the normal tires. 2. The tire surface is marked with white chalk, and the tire is stored in the designated isolation area. 3.The inspector checks the special card out of the warehouse, records the checked retained tires, and checks the actual tires with the records after the end of the car. 4.Line Leader will record the disposal of retained tires in the work diary. 5.The Line Leader will scan and register the retained tires, and the registration record can be checked with the special card and the actual tires.

SUBJECT: 2024-Benz-01
POINT_OUT: One internal TS16949 audit in 2024 has been reviewed and the root cause analysis and protective action or corrective actions were not well organized.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 1.There are no strict requirements on the methods of root cause analysis and improvement measures. 2.The rootcause analysis and improvement of the report format are not well planned.
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1.Modify rootcause analysis and improve report format. 2.Add method requirements for rootcause analysis-5 why and upload evidence of reoccurrence prevention measures.
POINT_OUT_KO: 2024년 TS16949 내부 감사 1건을 검토한 결과 근본 원인 분석 및 보호 조치나 시정 조치가 제대로 정리되지 않았습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: One internal TS16949 audit in 2024 has been reviewed and the root cause analysis and protective action or corrective actions were not well organized.
POINT_OUT_ZH: One internal TS16949 audit in 2024 has been reviewed and the root cause analysis and protective action or corrective actions were not well organized.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 1. 근본 원인 분석 및 개선 조치 방법에 대한 엄격한 요구 사항은 없습니다. 2. 근본 원인 분석 및 보고서 형식 개선이 제대로 계획되어 있지 않습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: 1.There are no strict requirements on the methods of root cause analysis and improvement measures. 2.The rootcause analysis and improvement of the report format are not well planned.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 1.根本原因分析方法和改进措施没有严格要求。 2、根源分析和报告格式的改进没有很好的规划。
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1. 근본 원인 분석을 수정하고 보고서 형식을 개선합니다. 2. 근본 원인 분석-5 Why에 대한 방법 요구 사항을 추가하고 재발 방지 조치에 대한 증거를 업로드합니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1.Modify rootcause analysis and improve report format. 2.Add method requirements for rootcause analysis-5 why and upload evidence of reoccurrence prevention measures.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1.Modify rootcause analysis and improve report format. 2.Add method requirements for rootcause analysis-5 why and upload evidence of reoccurrence prevention measures.

SUBJECT: 2024-Benz-01
POINT_OUT: There is only one Hankook sales company supplier code "15678094" which is not matching with the Hankook Jiaxing production plant. The PPAP certificate release will be failed. Hankook shall apply for the production plant code for process release and PPAP approval immediately.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Main reason: As a Tier 2 supplier, we have not received any requirement to apply for Supplier Code for the plant before.
COUNTER_MEASURE: The supplier code has been applied for, Daimler said it has been certified, the system will send an email, but it has not been received yet, and we are confirming the reason with Daimler.
POINT_OUT_KO: 한국판매사 공급업체코드 '15678094'가 한국가흥 생산공장과 일치하지 않는 경우가 딱 한 곳 있다. PPAP 인증서 릴리스가 실패합니다. 한국타이어는 즉시 공정출시를 위한 생산공장 코드 및 PPAP 승인을 신청해야 합니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: There is only one Hankook sales company supplier code "15678094" which is not matching with the Hankook Jiaxing production plant. The PPAP certificate release will be failed. Hankook shall apply for the production plant code for process release and PPAP approval immediately.
POINT_OUT_ZH: There is only one Hankook sales company supplier code "15678094" which is not matching with the Hankook Jiaxing production plant. The PPAP certificate release will be failed. Hankook shall apply for the production plant code for process release and PPAP approval immediately.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 주된 이유: 우리는 Tier 2 공급업체로서 이전에 해당 공장에 대한 공급업체 코드를 신청하라는 요구 사항을 받지 못했습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Main reason: As a Tier 2 supplier, we have not received any requirement to apply for Supplier Code for the plant before.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: Main reason: As a Tier 2 supplier, we have not received any requirement to apply for Supplier Code for the plant before.
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 공급업체 코드가 신청되었으며 다임러는 인증되었으며 시스템에서 이메일을 보내지만 아직 수신되지 않았으며 다임러에 그 이유를 확인하고 있다고 말했습니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: The supplier code has been applied for, Daimler said it has been certified, the system will send an email, but it has not been received yet, and we are confirming the reason with Daimler.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: The supplier code has been applied for, Daimler said it has been certified, the system will send an email, but it has not been received yet, and we are confirming the reason with Daimler.

SUBJECT: 2024-Benz-01
POINT_OUT: The V174 tire development technical release and PPAP can not catch up the BBAC Cycle 1 PT1 building based on the current test status.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Main Reason: 1.As MMA is the first project for Mercedes-Benz to carry out real vehicle evaluation in China, due to the lack of tire performance and performance required by Mercedes-Benz, as well as the lack of relevant experience, the scheme could not be locked within the specified time. 2.The wear test in DV test failed to meet the standard due to the improper choice of test route (road conditions were too harsh).
COUNTER_MEASURE: Project status: The wear test is being carried out, and the preliminary estimated mileage is expected to be obtained on November 25. Meanwhile, the handling test will be conducted in ICPG China in the 49th week. Once the result is obtained, we will share it in time.
POINT_OUT_KO: V174 타이어 개발 기술 공개와 PPAP는 현재 테스트 상태로는 BBAC Cycle 1 PT1 구축을 따라잡을 수 없습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: The V174 tire development technical release and PPAP can not catch up the BBAC Cycle 1 PT1 building based on the current test status.
POINT_OUT_ZH: The V174 tire development technical release and PPAP can not catch up the BBAC Cycle 1 PT1 building based on the current test status.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: Main Reason: 1.As MMA is the first project for Mercedes-Benz to carry out real vehicle evaluation in China, due to the lack of tire performance and performance required by Mercedes-Benz, as well as the lack of relevant experience, the scheme could not be locked within the specified time. 2.The wear test in DV test failed to meet the standard due to the improper choice of test route (road conditions were too harsh).
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Main Reason: 1.As MMA is the first project for Mercedes-Benz to carry out real vehicle evaluation in China, due to the lack of tire performance and performance required by Mercedes-Benz, as well as the lack of relevant experience, the scheme could not be locked within the specified time. 2.The wear test in DV test failed to meet the standard due to the improper choice of test route (road conditions were too harsh).
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 主要原因：1.由于MMA是奔驰在中国开展实车评测的第一个项目，由于缺乏奔驰所要求的轮胎性能和性能，以及缺乏相关经验，导致该方案无法在规定时间内锁定。 2、DV试验中由于试验路线选择不当（路况过于恶劣），磨损试验未达标。
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 프로젝트 현황 : 마모 테스트를 진행 중이며, 11월 25일 예비 추정 주행거리 획득 예정. 한편 핸들링 테스트는 49주차에 중국 ICPG에서 진행될 예정이다. 결과가 나오면 시간 내에 공유하겠습니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Project status: The wear test is being carried out, and the preliminary estimated mileage is expected to be obtained on November 25. Meanwhile, the handling test will be conducted in ICPG China in the 49th week. Once the result is obtained, we will share it in time.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: Project status: The wear test is being carried out, and the preliminary estimated mileage is expected to be obtained on November 25. Meanwhile, the handling test will be conducted in ICPG China in the 49th week. Once the result is obtained, we will share it in time.

SUBJECT: 2024-BYD-01
POINT_OUT: o project development team was set up. The supplier explained that the factory was only responsible for production, and the design and development were completed by the head office. The factory was rarely involved in design and development business.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: '-. The Indonesia factory is only responsible for production, not development, and the Indonesia factory has not received the SOR project - We already have development structure for each project consist Local Team (Hankook tire Indonesia Team) on T:Design system. But, when audit we can't show because it's R&D HQ authority.
COUNTER_MEASURE: "-. The Indonesian factory has other OE project development teams, and the BYD project development team is established according to the company's internal process. -. We will make the development structure form and will be included in APQP documents."
POINT_OUT_KO: o 프로젝트 개발팀이 구성되었습니다. 공급업체는 공장이 생산만 담당하고, 설계와 개발은 본사에서 완료했다고 설명했다. 공장은 설계 및 개발 사업에 거의 관여하지 않았습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: o project development team was set up. The supplier explained that the factory was only responsible for production, and the design and development were completed by the head office. The factory was rarely involved in design and development business.
POINT_OUT_ZH: o project development team was set up. The supplier explained that the factory was only responsible for production, and the design and development were completed by the head office. The factory was rarely involved in design and development business.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: '-. 인도네시아 공장은 개발이 아닌 생산만 담당하고 있으며, 인도네시아 공장은 SOR 프로젝트를 아직 받지 못했습니다. - 이미 T:Design 시스템에 프로젝트별 로컬팀(한국타이어 인도네시아팀)으로 구성된 개발 구조를 갖추고 있습니다. 하지만 감사시 R&D 본부 권한이라 공개할 수 없습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: '-. The Indonesia factory is only responsible for production, not development, and the Indonesia factory has not received the SOR project - We already have development structure for each project consist Local Team (Hankook tire Indonesia Team) on T:Design system. But, when audit we can't show because it's R&D HQ authority.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: '-。印尼工厂只负责生产，不负责开发，印尼工厂还没有收到SOR项目 - 我们已经在T:Design系统上拥有由本地团队（韩泰轮胎印尼团队）组成的每个项目的开发结构。但是，审计时我们不能显示，因为这是研发总部的权限。
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: "-.인도네시아 공장에는 다른 OE 프로젝트 개발팀이 있고, BYD 프로젝트 개발팀은 회사 내부 프로세스에 따라 구성됩니다. -. 개발 구조를 형성하여 APQP 문서에 포함될 예정입니다."
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: "-. The Indonesian factory has other OE project development teams, and the BYD project development team is established according to the company's internal process. -. We will make the development structure form and will be included in APQP documents."
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: “-.印尼工厂还有其他OE项目开发团队，比亚迪项目开发团队是按照公司内部流程组建的。-.我们会制定开发结构形式，并会纳入APQP文件中。”

SUBJECT: 2024-BYD-01
POINT_OUT: The equipment ledger information is seriously lacking, and it is impossible to effectively manage the equipment on a daily basis. The equipment ledger list for 24 years only records the equipment number, and lacks information such as the equipment name, specification model, usage status, and acceptance date (for example: Process Mixing A, machine number C1001-C1003, Process Mixing Q, machine number C1005-C1007, Process Small, Chemical, machine number L1201-L1204, etc., all equipment has no specification model, equipment status, and acceptance date information). Risk: The equipment ledger is not well compiled and lacks unified management.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: We don't have special form to unify all information regarding tools, machine or equipment as like BYD requirement.  We have these information separate in different team (machine under FTT team and mold under SCM/PMT team)
COUNTER_MEASURE: making special form to manage and compiled for machine more detail as like BYD requirement
POINT_OUT_KO: 장비 원장 정보가 심각하게 부족하여 일상적인 장비 관리가 불가능합니다. 24년간의 설비대장 목록에는 설비번호만 기록되어 있으며, 설비명, 사양모델, 사용상태, 합격일자 등의 정보가 부족합니다. (예: Process Mixing A, 기계번호 C1001-C1003, Process Mixing Q, 기계번호 C1005-C1007, Process Small, Chemical, 기계번호 L1201-L1204 등, 모든 장비에는 사양모델, 장비상태, 합격일자 정보가 없습니다.) 위험: 장비 원장이 제대로 정리되지 않았으며 통합 관리가 부족합니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: The equipment ledger information is seriously lacking, and it is impossible to effectively manage the equipment on a daily basis. The equipment ledger list for 24 years only records the equipment number, and lacks information such as the equipment name, specification model, usage status, and acceptance date (for example: Process Mixing A, machine number C1001-C1003, Process Mixing Q, machine number C1005-C1007, Process Small, Chemical, machine number L1201-L1204, etc., all equipment has no specification model, equipment status, and acceptance date information). Risk: The equipment ledger is not well compiled and lacks unified management.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 设备台账信息严重缺失，无法对设备进行日常有效管理。 24年设备台账清单仅记录设备编号，缺少设备名称、规格型号、使用状态、验收日期等信息（例如：工艺混合A、机台号C1001-C1003、工艺混合Q、机台号C1005-C1007、工艺小型、化工、机台号L1201-L1204等，所有设备均无规格型号、设备状态、验收日期信息）。风险：设备台账编制不完善，缺乏统一管理。
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: BYD 요구 사항과 같이 도구, 기계 또는 장비에 관한 모든 정보를 통합할 수 있는 특별한 형식이 없습니다. 우리는 이러한 정보를 서로 다른 팀(FTT 팀의 기계, SCM/PMT 팀의 금형)에서 별도로 보유하고 있습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: We don't have special form to unify all information regarding tools, machine or equipment as like BYD requirement. We have these information separate in different team (machine under FTT team and mold under SCM/PMT team)
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: We don't have special form to unify all information regarding tools, machine or equipment as like BYD requirement.  We have these information separate in different team (machine under FTT team and mold under SCM/PMT team)
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: BYD 요구 사항과 같이 기계에 대해 더 자세한 내용을 관리하고 컴파일하기 위한 특수 형식 만들기
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: making special form to manage and compiled for machine more detail as like BYD requirement
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: making special form to manage and compiled for machine more detail as like BYD requirement

SUBJECT: 2024-BYD-01
POINT_OUT: The maintenance data has not been analyzed, and the maintenance system cannot be updated based on the analysis results. In the equipment maintenance records for 24 years, only the equipment maintenance information was recorded, and the maintenance information was not analyzed. For example, equipment number C1001 was repaired on 24.7.28 and 24.7.31 respectively), and equipment number C1003 was repaired on 24.4.15 and 24.4.18. Only the maintenance records were kept, and no statistical analysis of the maintenance information was performed, and the maintenance system was not updated using the analysis data.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: '- Maintenance activity  only follow to the check sheet list.  -.In our EZHEIMS system records and reports are limited. So it is independently managed for detailed analysis and reports by each person in charge.
COUNTER_MEASURE: MTTR and MTBF output analysis.
POINT_OUT_KO: 유지보수 데이터는 분석되지 않았으며, 분석 결과에 따라 유지보수 시스템을 업데이트할 수 없습니다. 24년 동안의 설비정비기록에는 설비정비정보만 기록되고, 정비정보는 분석되지 않았다. 예를 들어 장비번호 C1001은 각각 24.7.28과 24.7.31에 수리되었고, 장비번호 C1003은 24.4.15와 24.4.18에 수리되었습니다. 유지되었으며, 유지보수 정보에 대한 통계적 분석이 수행되지 않았으며, 분석 데이터를 사용하여 유지보수 시스템이 업데이트되지 않았습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: The maintenance data has not been analyzed, and the maintenance system cannot be updated based on the analysis results. In the equipment maintenance records for 24 years, only the equipment maintenance information was recorded, and the maintenance information was not analyzed. For example, equipment number C1001 was repaired on 24.7.28 and 24.7.31 respectively), and equipment number C1003 was repaired on 24.4.15 and 24.4.18. kept, and no statistical analysis of the maintenance information was performed, and the maintenance system was not updated using the analysis data.
POINT_OUT_ZH: The maintenance data has not been analyzed, and the maintenance system cannot be updated based on the analysis results. In the equipment maintenance records for 24 years, only the equipment maintenance information was recorded, and the maintenance information was not analyzed. For example, equipment number C1001 was repaired on 24.7.28 and 24.7.31 respectively), and equipment number C1003 was repaired on 24.4.15 and 24.4.18. Only the maintenance records were kept, and no statistical analysis of the maintenance information was performed, and the maintenance system was not updated using the analysis data.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: '- 유지보수 활동은 체크시트 목록을 따릅니다.  -.EZHEIMS 시스템에서는 기록 및 보고서가 제한됩니다. 따라서 각 담당자의 상세한 분석 및 보고를 위해 독립적으로 관리됩니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: '- Maintenance activity  only follow to the check sheet list.  -.In our EZHEIMS system records and reports are limited. So it is independently managed for detailed analysis and reports by each person in charge.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: '- 维护活动仅遵循检查表清单。  -.在我们的 EZHEIMS 系统中，记录和报告是有限的。所以是独立管理，由每个负责人进行详细的分析和报告。
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: MTTR 및 MTBF 출력 분석.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: MTTR and MTBF output analysis.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: MTTR and MTBF output analysis.

SUBJECT: 2024-BYD-01
POINT_OUT: Some equipment cannot provide calibration certificates The equipment records were checked and the calibration certificates of three equipment, TTM5, TTM4 and PLUGER BUS, were randomly checked. Among them, PLUGER BUS could not provide a calibration certificate. This equipment is used to test tire high-speed fatigue tests and there are alternative equipment. The individual risk is relatively small.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: actually the calibration already done, but the document only keeping by Calibration team. So when the audit we difficult to show that document.

The individual risk is relatively small.

ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 실제로 교정은 이미 완료되었지만 문서는 교정팀에서만 보관합니다. 그래서 감사할 때 해당 문서를 보여드리기가 어렵습니다.

COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: The certificate calibration for the testing tire tools will be uploaded and shared in the system by calibration team. So, it can be see and available any time.

SUBJECT: 2024-BYD-01
POINT_OUT: No information security training was planned and implemented. In the 24-year training plan, no information security training was planned and implemented, and no records of emergency drills for cyber attacks could be provided. In fact, the headquarters suffered a cyber attack on Monday, which caused network fluctuations in global factories, resulting in the inability of the production system to operate, and the originally scheduled Monday audit was postponed to Thursday. Risk: No information security training and emergency drills for cyber attacks were conducted, and there is a risk of network attack information leakage.

SUBJECT: 2024-BMW-F78-01
POINT_OUT: The building I/L has an abnormal width device alarm, the unqualified products are placed in the pause area, and the OP directly replaces the new Roll for production, requiring that the re-judge process is added when the production is interrupted.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: The end material N/G occurs, the building OP directly alternates the next Roll for production, and the processing process is not standardized.
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1. Modify the process NG handling process standard and specify the NG material handling process. 2. Building personnel education, NG occurrence notification to QC and L line director judgment release.

ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 최종 자재 N/G가 발생하고, 건물 OP가 다음 Roll을 직접 교체하여 생산하며, 가공 공정이 표준화되어 있지 않습니다.

COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1. 공정 NG 처리 공정 표준을 수정하고 NG 자재 처리 공정을 명시합니다. 2. 건물 인사교육, NG 발생시 QC에 통보, L라인 책임자 판단 발표.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1. Modify the process NG handling process standard and specify the NG material handling process. 2. Building personnel education, NG occurrence notification to QC and L line director judgment release.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1. Modify the process NG handling process standard and specify the NG material handling process. 2. Building personnel education, NG occurrence notification to QC and L line director judgment release.

SUBJECT: 2024-BMW-F78-01
POINT_OUT: Check the first part of the building work diary. The matters required by the work instructions are inconsistent with the work diary records. (For example: left and right deviation of 1 building Drum, the work instructions requires recording in the work diary, but the work diary does not have this item.)
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: After the factory operation diary is computerized, the non-important quality content operation diary is removed, and the field record does not conform to the operation standard requirements.
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1. The operation standard requires the records to be confirmed and reviewed. 2. Modify the operation diary and add required records to ensure consistency with standard requirements.

(For example: left and right deviation of 1 building Drum, the work instructions requires recording in the work diary, but the work diary does not have this item.)
POINT_OUT_ZH: 检查建筑工作日记的第一部分。作业指导书要求的事项与工作日记记录不一致。 （例如：1楼鼓左右偏差，作业指导书要求在工作日记中记录，但工作日记中没有此项。）
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 공장 운영 일지를 전산화한 후 중요하지 않은 품질 콘텐츠 운영 일지를 제거하고 현장 기록이 운영 표준 요구 사항을 준수하지 않습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: After the factory operation diary is computerized, the non-important quality content operation diary is removed, and the field record does not conform to the operation standard requirements.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 工厂作业日记电脑化后，剔除非重要质量内容作业日记，现场记录不符合作业标准要求。
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1. 운영기준에서는 기록의 확인 및 검토를 요구하고 있습니다. 2. 표준 요구 사항과의 일관성을 보장하기 위해 작업 일지를 수정하고 필수 기록을 추가합니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1. The operation standard requires the records to be confirmed and reviewed. 2. Modify the operation diary and add required records to ensure consistency with standard requirements.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1. The operation standard requires the records to be confirmed and reviewed. 2. Modify the operation diary and add required records to ensure consistency with standard requirements.

SUBJECT: 2024-BMW-01
POINT_OUT: Maintenance: Is a preventive maintenance plan available and is the maintenance plan complied with (incl. documentation in the machine/tool logbook)?
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 19.06.2024: - EZ Heims as software tool for maintenance mgmt - yearly planning cycle for all production machines - maintenance plan for every machine (each machine 3-4 times per year) - driven by time, not quantity - maintenance records digitally available incl. checklist - Cleaning activities not documented, only preventive maintenance - Parallel Excel sheet for maintenance data - maintenance documented in EZ Heims  Finding:  - No tracability of Calender machine maintenance in Excel sheet - No Date Control of Excel Sheet - No maintenance record of A1011 incidents on 19. and 17.06. with outages of ~200 minutes each
COUNTER_MEASURE: Action 1:  19.06.2024: Ensure correct representation of Calender Machine Maintenance in Excel file 11.07.2024: Explanation provided on calculation method of maintenance percentage --> closed  Action 2:  19.06.2024: Find solution to ensure traceability of changes in Maintenance Excel 11.07.2024: Version control through file naming --> closed   Action 3:  19.06.2024: Ensure up-to-date maintenance records in EZHeims 11.07.2024: Filled in maintenance records shown --> closed   Evidence: Screenshot of new file naming system, screenshots of filled in maintenance records
POINT_OUT_KO: Maintenance: Is a preventive maintenance plan available and is the maintenance plan complied with (incl. documentation in the machine/tool logbook)?
POINT_OUT_EN: Maintenance: Is a preventive maintenance plan available and is the maintenance plan complied with (incl. documentation in the machine/tool logbook)?
POINT_OUT_ZH: 维护：是否有预防性维护计划，并且是否遵守维护计划（包括机器/工具日志中的文档）？
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 19.06.2024: - 유지 관리 관리를 위한 소프트웨어 도구인 EZ Heims - 모든 생산 기계에 대한 연간 계획 주기 - 모든 기계에 대한 유지 관리 계획(각 기계는 연간 3-4회) - 수량이 아닌 시간 기준 - 디지털 방식으로 유지 관리 기록 제공 체크리스트 - 청소 활동은 문서화되지 않았으며 예방적 유지보수만 있음 - 유지보수 데이터에 대한 병렬 Excel 시트 - EZ Heims에 문서화된 유지보수 결과: - Excel 시트에서 캘린더 기계 유지보수 추적 불가능 - Excel 시트의 날짜 제어 없음 - 19. 및 17.06에 A1011 사고에 대한 유지보수 기록이 없음. 각각 최대 200분의 중단 발생
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: 19.06.2024: - EZ Heims as software tool for maintenance mgmt - yearly planning cycle for all production machines - maintenance plan for every machine (each machine 3-4 times per year) - driven by time, not quantity - maintenance records digitally available incl. checklist - Cleaning activities not documented, only preventive maintenance - Parallel Excel sheet for maintenance data - maintenance documented in EZ Heims  Finding:  - No tracability of Calender machine maintenance in Excel sheet - No Date Control of Excel Sheet - No maintenance record of A1011 incidents on 19. and 17.06. with outages of ~200 minutes each
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 2024 年 6 月 19 日： - EZ Heims 作为维护管理软件工具 - 所有生产机器的年度计划周期 - 每台机器的维护计划（每台机器每年 3-4 次） - 由时间驱动，而不是数量 - 数字化维护记录，包括。检查表 - 未记录清洁活动，仅进行预防性维护 - 用于维护数据的并行 Excel 表格 - 在 EZ Heims 中记录维护情况 调查结果： - Excel 表格中没有压光机维护的可追溯性 - Excel 表格没有日期控制 - 没有 19 日和 17.06 发生的 A1011 事件的维护记录。每次中断约 200 分钟
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 조치 1: 19.06.2024: Excel 파일에서 캘린더 기계 유지 관리가 올바르게 표시되는지 확인 11.07.2024: 유지 관리 비율 계산 방법에 대한 설명 제공 --> 종료 조치 2: 19.06.2024: 유지 관리 Excel의 변경 사항 추적성을 보장하는 솔루션 찾기 11.07.2024: 파일 이름 지정을 통한 버전 관리 --> 종료 조치 3: 19.06.2024: 확인 EZHeims 11.07.2024의 최신 유지 관리 기록: 채워진 유지 관리 기록 표시 --> 닫힘 증거: 새로운 파일 명명 시스템의 스크린샷, 채워진 유지 관리 기록의 스크린샷
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Action 1: 19.06.2024: Ensure correct representation of Calender Machine Maintenance in Excel file 11.07.2024: Explanation provided on calculation method of maintenance percentage --> closed Action 2: 19.06.2024: Find solution to ensure traceability of changes in Maintenance Excel 11.07.2024: Version control through file naming --> closed Action 3: 19.06.2024: Ensure up-to-date maintenance records in EZHeims 11.07.2024: Filled in maintenance records shown --> closed Evidence: Screenshot of new file naming system, screenshots of filled in maintenance records
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: Action 1:  19.06.2024: Ensure correct representation of Calender Machine Maintenance in Excel file 11.07.2024: Explanation provided on calculation method of maintenance percentage --> closed  Action 2:  19.06.2024: Find solution to ensure traceability of changes in Maintenance Excel 11.07.2024: Version control through file naming --> closed   Action 3:  19.06.2024: Ensure up-to-date maintenance records in EZHeims 11.07.2024: Filled in maintenance records shown --> closed   Evidence: Screenshot of new file naming system, screenshots of filled in maintenance records

SUBJECT: VWA Tavascan 7Sizes 2TP Audit

COUNTER_MEASURE: 1.增加一台风机，风干后胎侧表面无明显水残留 2.口型对比扫描图确认OK 3.计量秤精度点检满足

ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Cooling water remains on the surface, causing the weighing result to be too large, which does not meet the standard requirements.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 冷却水残留在 表面，导致称量结果偏大，与标准要求不符合

COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1. Add a fan and there will be no obvious water residue on the sidewall surface after air drying. 2. Compare the lip shape with the scanned image and confirm that it is OK. 3. The accuracy check of the weighing scale is satisfactory.

SUBJECT: 2024-Seres(赛力斯）Potential supplier audit-01
POINT_OUT: 常用设备 校验周期1年，这个频率是否合理需要检讨，建议频率需要进一步提高
COUNTER_MEASURE: 从工厂运营情况看 常用设备 校验周期1年 可以满足稳定运营要求，向后考虑针对重点区域传感器加强管理，调整周期1年→0.5年(例如 硫化主管道压力传感器)
POINT_OUT_KO: 일반적으로 사용되는 장비의 교정 주기는 1년입니다. 이 빈도가 합리적인지 검토가 필요합니다. 빈도를 더 높이는 것이 좋습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: Commonly used equipment has a calibration cycle of 1 year. Whether this frequency is reasonable needs to be reviewed. It is recommended that the frequency needs to be further increased.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 常用设备 校验周期1年，这个频率是否合理需要检讨，建议频率需要进一步提高
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 공장 운영 상황으로 볼 때 일반적으로 사용되는 장비의 교정 주기는 1년으로 안정적인 운영 요구 사항을 충족할 수 있습니다. 핵심 분야의 센서 관리 강화를 검토하고 주기를 1년에서 0.5년으로 조정할 예정입니다(예: 가황 처리된 주 파이프라인 압력 센서).
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Judging from the factory operation situation, the calibration cycle of commonly used equipment is 1 year, which can meet the requirements of stable operation. We will consider strengthening the management of sensors in key areas and adjust the cycle from 1 year to 0.5 years (for example, vulcanized main pipeline pressure sensor).
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 从工厂运营情况看 常用设备 校验周期1年 可以满足稳定运营要求，向后考虑针对重点区域传感器加强管理，调整周期1年→0.5年(例如 硫化主管道压力传感器)

COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: PFMEA中对设备本身的问题不做分析;本次PFMEA不变更. 设备关联时效分析 在设备管理和预防文件中体现.

SUBJECT: 2024-BMW-F78-01

POINT_OUT_ZH: Ex-warehouse rework records should be reflected in the LOT tracking.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 바코드 추적 화면 LRD808은 창고 재작업 기록 LQE898 데이터에 연결되어 있지 않습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Barcode tracing screen LRD808 is not connected to ex-warehouse rework record LQE898 data.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: Barcode tracing screen LRD808 is not connected to ex-warehouse rework record LQE898 data.
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: GMES 시스템이 개선되었습니다. LQE898 데이터가 추적 화면 LRD808에 자동으로 연결됩니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: GMES System is improved: LQE898 Data automatically links to the tracing screen LRD808.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: GMES System is improved: LQE898 Data automatically links to the tracing screen LRD808.

SUBJECT: 2024-BMW-F78-01
POINT_OUT: The tolerance of tread profile scanning instrument (0.3mm±0.3↓) is inconsistent with the requirements (1mm↓). Is it OK for a single point to move 0.5mm?
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 1.There is a gap between the table top and the material. 2.The Edge standard differs because the scanning device cannot be set (default is 0).
COUNTER_MEASURE: The material will shrink slightly during rolling, ripening and handling, and can be adjusted ±0.5mm.
POINT_OUT_KO: 트레드 프로파일 스캐닝 장치의 공차(0.3mm±0.3↓)는 요구 사항(1mm↓)과 일치하지 않습니다. 한 점이 0.5mm 움직여도 괜찮나요?
POINT_OUT_EN: The tolerance of tread profile scanning instrument (0.3mm±0.3↓) is inconsistent with the requirements (1mm↓). Is it OK for a single point to move 0.5mm?
POINT_OUT_ZH: The tolerance of tread profile scanning instrument (0.3mm±0.3↓) is inconsistent with the requirements (1mm↓). Is it OK for a single point to move 0.5mm?
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 1. 테이블 상판과 소재 사이에 틈이 있습니다. 2.스캐닝 장치를 설정할 수 없기 때문에 Edge 표준이 다릅니다(기본값은 0).
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: 1.There is a gap between the table top and the material. 2.The Edge standard differs because the scanning device cannot be set (default is 0).
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 1.There is a gap between the table top and the material. 2.The Edge standard differs because the scanning device cannot be set (default is 0).
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 롤링, 숙성, 취급 시 소재가 약간 수축되며 ±0.5mm 조정 가능합니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: The material will shrink slightly during rolling, ripening and handling, and can be adjusted ±0.5mm.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 材料在轧制、熟化、搬运过程中会略有收缩，可调节±0.5mm。

SUBJECT: 2024-Toyota-381D-01
POINT_OUT: PIS requirements are not clearly reflected in the inspection standards on site
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: The on-site standard specifies in detail the abbreviation of the defect name, which is not clearly related to the appearance requirements in PIS
COUNTER_MEASURE: Revise the "Guidelines for Appearance Inspection Operations" to clearly state the requirements for the appearance inspection of the PIS, such as "inappropriate text specification markings, CCC engraving, no damage to safety performance such as air leakage, no handwritten markings on the sidewall, and no appearance contamination"
POINT_OUT_KO: PIS 요구사항이 현장검사기준에 명확하게 반영되어 있지 않습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: PIS requirements are not clearly reflected in the inspection standards on site
POINT_OUT_ZH: PIS requirements are not clearly reflected in the inspection standards on site
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 현장 표준에서는 PIS의 외관 요구 사항과 명확하게 관련되지 않은 결함 이름의 약어를 자세히 지정합니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: The on-site standard specifies in detail the abbreviation of the defect name, which is not clearly related to the appearance requirements in PIS
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: The on-site standard specifies in detail the abbreviation of the defect name, which is not clearly related to the appearance requirements in PIS
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: Revise the "Guidelines for Appearance Inspection Operations" to clearly state the requirements for the appearance inspection of the PIS, such as "inappropriate text specification markings, CCC engraving, no damage to safety performance such as air leakage, no handwritten markings on the sidewall, and no appearance contamination"
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Revise the "Guidelines for Appearance Inspection Operations" to clearly state the requirements for the appearance inspection of the PIS, such as "inappropriate text specification markings, CCC engraving, no damage to safety performance such as air leakage, no handwritten markings on the sidewall, and no appearance contamination"
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 修订《外观检验操作指南》，明确PIS外观检验要求，如“有不当文字规范标记、CCC雕刻、无漏气等安全性能损害、侧壁无手写标记、无外观污染”等

SUBJECT: 2024-Toyota-381D-01
POINT_OUT: The standard sequence for alternating inspection of curing sizes is incomplete compared to the actual situation. Review of the content of Curing parameter settings within the control plan
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: The work standard does not match the actual operation.
COUNTER_MEASURE: ①  Improve the sequence of specification alternation operations, including relevant inspection contents on the vulcanization setting checklist, source of standard values, setting methods, and confirmation methods for measured values. ② Add the "Specification Alternation and Setting Standards Book for Curing Machines" to the management methods within the control plan
POINT_OUT_KO: 경화 크기를 교대로 검사하는 표준 순서는 실제 상황에 비해 불완전합니다. 제어 계획 내 경화 매개변수 설정 내용 검토
POINT_OUT_EN: The standard sequence for alternating inspection of curing sizes is incomplete compared to the actual situation. Review of the content of Curing parameter settings within the control plan
POINT_OUT_ZH: The standard sequence for alternating inspection of curing sizes is incomplete compared to the actual situation. Review of the content of Curing parameter settings within the control plan
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 작업표준이 실제 작업과 일치하지 않습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: The work standard does not match the actual operation.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: The work standard does not match the actual operation.
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: ① 가황설정 체크리스트 관련 점검내용, 표준값의 출처, 설정방법, 측정값의 확인방법 등 규격변경작업의 순서를 개선한다. ② 관리계획 내 관리방법에 "경화기 사양변경 및 기준설정서"를 추가합니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: ①  Improve the sequence of specification alternation operations, including relevant inspection contents on the vulcanization setting checklist, source of standard values, setting methods, and confirmation methods for measured values. ② Add the "Specification Alternation and Setting Standards Book for Curing Machines" to the management methods within the control plan
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: ①完善规格变更操作顺序，包括硫化设定检查表的相关检查内容、标准值的来源、设定方法、测量值的确认方法。 ②控制计划内的管理方法中增加“硫化机规格变更及标准制定书”

SUBJECT: 2024-Toyota-381D-01
POINT_OUT: There is no obvious warning when the cured tire EMS car descends, which poses a safety hazard
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Insufficient safety warnings
COUNTER_MEASURE: ① At present, there are light prompts for the descent of the EMS car for tire delivery on site, and there is a color distinction between the red (equipment area) and green (human operation area) areas on the ground; ② After reviewing with the equipment department, it is planned to increase the sound of a descent warning for the tire delivery car and reduce the speed.
POINT_OUT_KO: 경화된 타이어 EMS 차량이 하강할 때 명확한 경고가 없어 안전 위험이 있습니다.

POINT_OUT_ZH: There is no obvious warning when the cured tire EMS car descends, which poses a safety hazard
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 불충분한 안전 경고
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Insufficient safety warnings
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: Insufficient safety warnings
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: ① 현재 현장에는 타이어 배송을 위한 EMS 차량의 하강을 위한 조명 안내가 있으며, 지상의 빨간색(장비 영역)과 녹색(사람 작업 영역) 영역에 색상 구분이 있습니다. ② 장비부서와 검토 후 타이어 배달차의 하강 경고음을 높이고 속도를 줄일 계획이다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: ① At present, there are light prompts for the descent of the EMS car for tire delivery on site, and there is a color distinction between the red (equipment area) and green (human operation area) areas on the ground; ② After reviewing with the equipment department, it is planned to increase the sound of a descent warning for the tire delivery car and reduce the speed.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: ① At present, there are light prompts for the descent of the EMS car for tire delivery on site, and there is a color distinction between the red (equipment area) and green (human operation area) areas on the ground; ② After reviewing with the equipment department, it is planned to increase the sound of a descent warning for the tire delivery car and reduce the speed.

SUBJECT: Tesla EHS Audit
POINT_OUT: The project of the factory of the company shall be constructed by stages and organized for acceptance. In January this year, the independent acceptance of the first phase of the silent product technology upgrade project in the three plant areas was completed. The second phase of the project has completed the environmental impact assessment and is being submitted for approval. During the audit, it was found that the second phase of the glue-coated Y3003 equipment has been in trial production, and the equipment has not been installed waste gas collection facilities.；
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Not applicable.
COUNTER_MEASURE: Stop debugging the exhaust gas collection device, and then debug it after installation

SUBJECT: Tesla EHS Audit
POINT_OUT: The company is equipped with waste gas treatment equipment for smelting, vulcanization and other processes. Check the exhaust gas treatment system of the K2300/K2400 vulcanization line of the second factory. The circulating water pump of the washing tower is not turned on, and the spray pump of the plasma unit is also not turned on. Check the monitoring screen of the exhaust gas treatment system, and the fan identifier of the plasma unit is not displayed. Spot check "Factory CPP environmental protection equipment daily point inspection table", July 10 from 9:00 to 5:00 on July 11, the aforementioned waste gas treatment system of the non-circulating water pump current record, it is understood that because of the water level of the washing tower is low, the circulating water pump is not opened.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Not applicable.
COUNTER_MEASURE: Water intake improvement of washing tower

SUBJECT: Tesla EHS Audit
POINT_OUT: The construction of the company's main project was early, and the simultaneous procedures of the third sub-project in the early stage were insufficient. In June this year, the company evaluated the occupational disease hazards of the factory by current status evaluation and provided the Occupational disease Hazards Current Status Evaluation Report. Regular workplace occupational health monitoring, provide the "inspection and testing report", the monitoring found that: 1 factory 3# shaving post, 3 factory 2#5# shaving post, dry ice washing post noise exceeded the standard, currently mainly take protective measures such as wearing earplugs;
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Not applicable.
COUNTER_MEASURE: Regular testing, labor protection products wear
POINT_OUT_KO: 회사의 주요 프로젝트의 건설이 초기 단계였으며, 초기 단계의 세 번째 하위 프로젝트의 동시 절차가 미흡했습니다. 올해 6월 회사는 현황평가를 통해 공장의 직업병 유해요인을 평가하고 직업병 유해요인 현황 평가 보고서를 제공했다. 정기적인 직장 직업 건강 모니터링, "검사 및 테스트 보고서" 제공, 모니터링 결과: 공장 1개 3# 면도대, 3개 공장 2#5# 면도대, 드라이아이스 세척 후 소음이 기준을 초과했으며 현재 주로 귀마개 착용과 같은 보호 조치를 취하고 있습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: The construction of the company's main project was early, and the simultaneous procedures of the third sub-project in the early stage were insufficient. In June this year, the company evaluated the occupational disease hazards of the factory by current status evaluation and provided the Occupational disease Hazards Current Status Evaluation Report. Regular workplace occupational health monitoring, provide the "inspection and testing report", the monitoring found that: 1 factory 3# shaving post, 3 factory 2#5# shaving post, dry ice washing post noise exceeded the standard, currently mainly take protective measures such as wearing earplugs;
POINT_OUT_ZH: 公司主体工程建设较早，第三子工程前期同步手续不足。今年6月，公司对工厂职业病危害现状进行了评价，并出具了《职业病危害现状评价报告》。定期进行工作场所职业健康监测，提供《检查检测报告》，监测发现：1厂3#剃须岗、3厂2#5#剃须岗、干冰洗岗噪音超标，目前主要采取戴耳塞等防护措施；
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 해당되지 않습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Not applicable.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 不适用。
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 정기 테스트, 노동 보호 제품 착용
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Regular testing, labor protection products wear
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 定期检测劳动防护用品佩戴情况

SUBJECT: 2024 VW AVASCAN CP Audit
POINT_OUT: The drying process of calendered cord fabric must be defined and monitored. HK manages the temperature and humidity of the drying room and needs to verify the drying effect.The calendered Guage AGC shows a point out of range and needs to find the cause and fix the problem.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 1) The drying temperature of cord fabric adopts Hankook global unified standard: 115±5℃ 2) The circumference of the surface of the 3# Main Roll is partially worn, causing the thickness of one point of the material to exceed the standard (the overall thickness is within the scope of Spec).
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1) The drying temperature of cord fabric adopts Hankook global unified standard: 115±5℃ - Monitoring range is 115±5℃, over temperature alarm procedure. - Hankook has verified that the material meets the moisture content requirements under these conditions 2) 3#Main Roll is carried out  grinding
POINT_OUT_KO: 캘린더링된 코드 직물의 건조 과정을 정의하고 모니터링해야 합니다. HK에서는 건조실의 온도와 습도를 관리하고 건조 효과를 검증해야 합니다. 캘린더링된 Guage AGC는 범위를 벗어난 지점을 표시하며 원인을 찾고 문제를 해결해야 합니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: The drying process of calendered cord fabric must be defined and monitored. HK manages the temperature and humidity of the drying room and needs to verify the drying effect. The calendered Guage AGC shows a point out of range and needs to find the cause and fix the problem.
POINT_OUT_ZH: The drying process of calendered cord fabric must be defined and monitored. HK manages the temperature and humidity of the drying room and needs to verify the drying effect.The calendered Guage AGC shows a point out of range and needs to find the cause and fix the problem.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 1) 코드원단의 건조온도는 한국국제통일규격인 115±5℃를 적용한다. 2) 3# Main Roll의 표면 둘레가 일부 마모되어 소재의 한 점 두께가 기준을 초과하였다. (전체 두께는 Spec 범위 내임)
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: 1) The drying temperature of cord fabric adopts Hankook global unified standard: 115±5℃ 2) The circumference of the surface of the 3# Main Roll is partially worn, causing the thickness of one point of the material to exceed the standard (the overall thickness is within the scope of Spec).
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 1）帘子布烘干温度采用韩泰全球统一标准：115±5℃ 2）3#主辊表面圆周部分磨损，导致材料某一点厚度超标（整体厚度在Spec范围内）。
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1) 코드원단의 건조온도는 한국국제통일표준인 115±5℃를 채택하고 있습니다. - 모니터링 범위는 115±5℃이며, 과열경보 절차를 따릅니다. - 한국타이어는 이러한 조건에서 재료가 수분 함량 요구 사항을 충족하는지 확인했습니다. 2) 3#Main Roll이 연삭됩니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1) The drying temperature of cord fabric adopts Hankook global unified standard: 115±5℃ - Monitoring range is 115±5℃, over temperature alarm procedure. - Hankook has verified that the material meets the moisture content requirements under these conditions 2) 3#Main Roll is carried out grinding
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1) The drying temperature of cord fabric adopts Hankook global unified standard: 115±5℃ - Monitoring range is 115±5℃, over temperature alarm procedure. - Hankook has verified that the material meets the moisture content requirements under these conditions 2) 3#Main Roll is carried out  grinding

SUBJECT: 2024 VW AVASCAN CP Audit
POINT_OUT: The effectiveness of self-audits should be improved, and ratings of findings should not be properly matched, For example: immediate action items.Lack of understanding of VDA6.3 process audit, such as 5S, set management and other related issues can not require immediate action, immediate action refers to the problem with significant quality risks.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Lack of understanding of project requirements requiring immediate action. Those that have an impact on the semi-product or product are judged to require immediate action.
COUNTER_MEASURE: Re-educate process auditors。 Review and revise the rating of emergency measures/immediate action items in the report. In the future, when the internal process audit report is completed, the necessity of "emergency measures" will be reviewed according to the impact degree of product quality.
POINT_OUT_KO: 자체 감사의 효율성은 향상되어야 하며 결과 등급이 적절하게 일치하지 않아야 합니다(예: 즉각적인 조치 항목). 5S, 세트 관리 및 기타 관련 문제와 같은 VDA6.3 프로세스 감사에 대한 이해 부족은 즉각적인 조치가 필요할 수 없으며, 즉각적인 조치는 상당한 품질 위험이 있는 문제를 의미합니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: The effectiveness of self-audits should be improved, and ratings of findings should not be properly matched, For example: immediate action items.Lack of understanding of VDA6.3 process audit, such as 5S, set management and other related issues can not require immediate action, immediate action refers to the problem with significant quality risks.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 自审核的有效性应提高，发现的评级不应适当匹配，例如：立即行动项目。缺乏对VDA6.3过程审核的了解，如5S、设置管理等相关问题不能要求立即行动，立即行动是指存在重大质量风险的问题。
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 즉각적인 조치가 필요한 프로젝트 요구 사항에 대한 이해가 부족합니다. 반제품이나 제품에 영향을 미치는 사항은 즉각적인 조치가 필요하다고 판단됩니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Lack of understanding of project requirements requiring immediate action. Those that have an impact on the semi-product or product are judged to require immediate action.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: Lack of understanding of project requirements requiring immediate action. Those that have an impact on the semi-product or product are judged to require immediate action.
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 프로세스 감사자를 재교육합니다. 보고서 내 긴급조치/즉각조치 항목의 등급을 검토 및 수정합니다. 향후 내부 프로세스 감사 보고가 완료되면 제품 품질 영향 정도에 따라 '긴급조치' 필요성을 검토할 예정이다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Re-educate process auditors. Review and revise the rating of emergency measures/immediate action items in the report. In the future, when the internal process audit report is completed, the necessity of "emergency measures" will be reviewed according to the impact degree of product quality.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: Re-educate process auditors。 Review and revise the rating of emergency measures/immediate action items in the report. In the future, when the internal process audit report is completed, the necessity of "emergency measures" will be reviewed according to the impact degree of product quality.

SUBJECT: Benz V214 PPAP Audit
POINT_OUT: The rubber management label only has a printed ripening date, and the expiration date is reflected in the form of a stamp; Consider that the system automatically generates both the maturity date and the expiration date
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: When the system was set up, it was not considered, and the validity period was managed in the form of stamp in the factory.
COUNTER_MEASURE: Invite the Korean headquarters to add the expiration date item in the system Settings.
POINT_OUT_KO: 고무 관리 라벨에는 숙성 날짜만 인쇄되어 있으며, 유통기한은 스탬프 형태로 반영되어 있습니다. 시스템이 만기일과 만료일을 모두 자동으로 생성한다는 점을 고려하세요.

POINT_OUT_ZH: 橡胶管理标签只有印刷的成熟日期，失效日期以印章的形式体现；考虑系统自动生成到期日期和到期日期
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 시스템 구축 시 이를 고려하지 않았으며, 공장에서 스탬프 형태로 유효기간을 관리하였다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: When the system was set up, it was not considered, and the validity period was managed in the form of stamp in the factory.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 系统建立的时候没有考虑到，有效期是在工厂里以盖章的形式进行管理的。
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 한국 본사를 초대하여 시스템 설정에 만료일 항목을 추가하세요.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Invite the Korean headquarters to add the expiration date item in the system Settings.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: Invite the Korean headquarters to add the expiration date item in the system Settings.

SUBJECT: 2024 VW AVASCAN CP Audit
POINT_OUT: A 10kg weight is used for regular calibration of the Off-line metering scale of drug A, and the weight of the drug is generally 2Kg. According to the factory 5% calculation, the accuracy requirement is 10g; The current use of 10kg weight is too large, 10g weight should be added for verification.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: In the existing point check content, the weight point check of 5kg standard weight was carried out according to the standard suggested by the weighing body manufacturer, and 10g weight was not used for verification
COUNTER_MEASURE: On the basis of the 5kg standard weight point check, an additional 10g weight point check. - The point check has been started on January 22nd
POINT_OUT_KO: A약품의 오프라인 계량저울의 정기교정에는 10kg의 분동을 사용하며, 약품의 중량은 일반적으로 2Kg을 사용한다. 공장 5% 계산에 따르면 정확도 요구 사항은 10g입니다. 현재 사용중인 10kg 중량은 너무 크므로 확인을 위해 10g 중량을 추가해야 합니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: A 10kg weight is used for regular calibration of the Off-line metering scale of drug A, and the weight of the drug is generally 2Kg. According to the factory 5% calculation, the accuracy requirement is 10g; The current use of 10kg weight is too large, 10g weight should be added for verification.
POINT_OUT_ZH: A 10kg weight is used for regular calibration of the Off-line metering scale of drug A, and the weight of the drug is generally 2Kg. According to the factory 5% calculation, the accuracy requirement is 10g; The current use of 10kg weight is too large, 10g weight should be added for verification.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 기존 포인트 체크 내용에서는 계량체 제조사에서 제시하는 기준에 따라 5kg 표준분동의 중량 포인트 체크를 진행하였으며, 검증에는 10g 중량을 사용하지 않았습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: In the existing point check content, the weight point check of 5kg standard weight was carried out according to the standard suggested by the weighing body manufacturer, and 10g weight was not used for verification
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: In the existing point check content, the weight point check of 5kg standard weight was carried out according to the standard suggested by the weighing body manufacturer, and 10g weight was not used for verification
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 5kg 표준 중량점 확인을 기준으로 10g 중량점 확인을 추가로 실시합니다. - 1월 22일부터 포인트 체크가 시작되었습니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: On the basis of the 5kg standard weight point check, an additional 10g weight point check. - The point check has been started on January 22nd
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 在5kg标准重量点检查的基础上，额外增加10g重量点检查。 - 积分检查已于1月22日开始

SUBJECT: F-150, Transit PPAP Audit (DP)
POINT_OUT: Make manual to operators controlling the speed of converyor belt.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Controlling the speed of conveyor belt was followed by the capacity of each human and it is not controlled well.
COUNTER_MEASURE: All data are controlled automatically when those are in Tol. of 7%. Speed related criteria are giving information vice versa and automatically driven.

ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Controlling the speed of conveyor belt was followed by the capacity of each human and it is not controlled well.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 传送带的速度控制是根据每个人的能力来控制的，控制不好。
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 모든 데이터는 Tol에 있을 때 자동으로 제어됩니다. 7%. 속도 관련 기준은 반대로 정보를 제공하며 자동으로 구동됩니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: All data are controlled automatically when those are in Tol. of 7%. Speed related criteria are giving information vice versa and automatically driven.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 所有数据在 Tol 中时都会自动控制。 7%。与速度相关的标准提供信息，反之亦然并自动驱动。

SUBJECT: HONDA QAV-1 Audit(IP)
POINT_OUT: Honda SQM Revision are not reflected in a timely manner, there is concern that necessary quality records will not be kept.

SUBJECT: HONDA QAV-1 Audit(IP)
POINT_OUT: In the procedure for creating the process quality control chart is not specified correctly. There is a concern that the reliability of the process quality control chart will be impaired.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: When writing the control plan, it was reviewed by the author and superiors but in the end, there was a lack of awarness of the need to leave a record of the approver in the approval section.

POINT_OUT_ZH: 在创建过程质量控制图的过程中未正确指定。人们担心过程质量控制图的可靠性会受到损害。
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 관리계획서를 작성할 때 작성자와 상사의 검토를 받았으나 결국 승인란에 승인자의 기록을 남길 필요성에 대한 인식이 부족하였다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: When writing the control plan, it was reviewed by the author and superiors but in the end, there was a lack of awarness of the need to leave a record of the approver in the approval section.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: When writing the control plan, it was reviewed by the author and superiors but in the end, there was a lack of awarness of the need to leave a record of the approver in the approval section.
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 최종 cCntrol 계획에 대해 확인 및 승인되어야 하는 정보를 추가하여 제어 계획 작성 절차를 개정했습니다. 전담팀 및 품질관리팀 팀장의 승인을 받아야 하는 관리계획 개정

SUBJECT: HONDA QAV-1 Audit(IP)
POINT_OUT: We do not establish follow up and final judgement criteria for each judgement criterion. There is a concern that making incorrect decision will not lead to appropriate supplier selection.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: in practice, we follow up on each grade, but there was a lack of understanding that Red Grade follow up was reflected in the standard document and that the Green/Yellow grades were clearly reflected.
COUNTER_MEASURE: Define judgement criteria more clearly for final judgement Red, Green and Yellow by adding information about how we will follow up on new supplierin the regulations.
POINT_OUT_KO: 각 판단기준에 대해 후속조치 및 최종 판단기준을 설정하지 않습니다. 잘못된 결정으로 인해 적절한 공급업체 선정이 이루어지지 않을 것이라는 우려가 있습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: We do not establish follow up and final judgment criteria for each judgment criterion. There is a concern that making incorrect decision will not lead to appropriate supplier selection.
POINT_OUT_ZH: We do not establish follow up and final judgement criteria for each judgement criterion. There is a concern that making incorrect decision will not lead to appropriate supplier selection.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 실제로 각 등급에 대한 Follow up을 진행하고 있으나, Red Grade의 Follow up을 표준문서에 반영하고 Green/Yellow 등급을 명확하게 반영하는 것에 대한 이해가 부족했습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: in practice, we follow up on each grade, but there was a lack of understanding that Red Grade follow up was reflected in the standard document and that the Green/Yellow grades were clearly reflected.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: in practice, we follow up on each grade, but there was a lack of understanding that Red Grade follow up was reflected in the standard document and that the Green/Yellow grades were clearly reflected.
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 규정에 신규 공급업체에 대한 후속 조치 방법에 대한 정보를 추가하여 Red, Green, Yellow 최종 판단에 대한 판단 기준을 보다 명확하게 정의합니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Define judgement criteria more clearly for final judgement Red, Green and Yellow by adding information about how we will follow up on new supplierin the regulations.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 通过在法规中添加有关我们将如何跟进新供应商的信息，更明确地定义最终判定红色、绿色和黄色的判定标准。

SUBJECT: HONDA QAV-1 Audit(IP)
POINT_OUT: In Report VDA 6.3 Process Audit evaluation is not performed according to the judgement criteria setforth in attachment#8. There is a concern that it will not lead to appropriate customer evaluation.

POINT_OUT_ZH: In Report VDA 6.3 Process Audit evaluation is not performed according to the judgement criteria setforth in attachment#8. There is a concern that it will not lead to appropriate customer evaluation.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 실제로 우리는 감사 완료 후 규칙을 하향 조정하는 VDA 6.3 규칙을 포함하여 감사 기준 및 감사 방법을 공급업체에 알렸습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: In practice, we informed to supplier for audit criteria and audit method including VDA 6.3 rules about downgrading rules after finishing audit.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: In practice, we informed to supplier for audit criteria and audit method including VDA 6.3 rules about downgrading rules after finishing audit.
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 심사등급 결정기준을 표준문서 규정 및 공식 결과 공시문서에 반영하였습니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Reflected audit grade decision criteria in the standard document Regulation and official result o notification document.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: Reflected audit grade decision criteria in the standard document Regulation and official result o notification document.

SUBJECT: HONDA QAV-1 Audit(IP)
POINT_OUT: We don't leave proof that management confirmed it, there is a concern that credibility of the defect report (8D Report) itself will be lost.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: In actual, when we making 8D Report, the author and the team manager are reviewing it. However, it is necessary to have approval column to ensure if the actual review has been done.
COUNTER_MEASURE: Revised the procedure by adding information about OEM Staff is responsible for drafting the 8D report then Quality Assurance Unit Manager is finalized approval.
POINT_OUT_KO: 경영진이 확인했다는 증거를 남기지 않아, 하자신고(8D Report) 자체의 신뢰성이 상실될 우려가 있습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: We don't leave proof that management confirmed it, there is a concern that credibility of the defect report (8D Report) itself will be lost.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 我们不会留下管理层确认的证据，担心缺陷报告（8D 报告）本身的可信度会丧失。
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 실제로 8D Report를 작성할 때 작성자와 팀장이 검토를 합니다. 다만, 실제 검토가 이루어졌는지 확인하기 위해서는 승인란이 필요합니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: In actual, when we making 8D Report, the author and the team manager are reviewing it. However, it is necessary to have approval column to ensure if the actual review has been done.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: In actual, when we making 8D Report, the author and the team manager are reviewing it. However, it is necessary to have approval column to ensure if the actual review has been done.
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 8D 보고서 초안 작성을 담당하는 OEM 직원에 대한 정보를 추가하여 절차를 수정한 후 품질 보증 부서 관리자가 승인을 완료합니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Revised the procedure by adding information about OEM Staff is responsible for drafting the 8D report then Quality Assurance Unit Manager is finalized approval.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 通过添加有关 OEM 员工负责起草 8D 报告然后由质量保证部门经理最终批准的信息来修改程序。

SUBJECT: HONDA QAV-1 Audit(IP)
POINT_OUT: There is no linkage between the work standard and the process quality control table, there is risk that important control items will be ommittedand the control plan will become a more fact.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Since the attaching barcode was considered a routine task, there is only procedure for attachingbarcode in Building Process. Therefore, attaching barcode process was not reflected. Lack of awareness of the importance of the attaching barcode process
COUNTER_MEASURE: We checked once a year the actual process and compare with Control Plan, Work Instruction, Dailiy Checksheet, etc. Additional measures were created to ensure that information is not omitted when creating Control Plan.

POINT_OUT_EN: There is no linkage between the work standard and the process quality control table, there is risk that important control items will be committed and the control plan will become a more fact.
POINT_OUT_ZH: There is no linkage between the work standard and the process quality control table, there is risk that important control items will be ommittedand the control plan will become a more fact.

COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: We checked once a year the actual process and compare with Control Plan, Work Instruction, Dailiy Checksheet, etc. Additional measures were created to ensure that information is not omitted when creating Control Plan.

SUBJECT: HONDA QAV-1 Audit(IP)
POINT_OUT: The work for linking the acceptance inspection results and the manufacturing process is not described. There is a concern that the process quality control table and the quality assurance from raw materials to products will not be connected.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Since checking the packaging condition of raw and subsidiary materials was considered a routine task, there is only procedure for inspoection of raw and subsidiary material was reflected in the control plan. Checking packaging condition was not reflected.
COUNTER_MEASURE: We checked once a year the actual process and compare with Control Plan, Work Instruction, Dailiy Checksheet, etc. Additional measures were created to ensure that information is not omitted when creating Control Plan.
POINT_OUT_KO: 합격검사 결과와 제조과정을 연계하는 작업에 대해서는 기술하지 않는다. 공정 품질관리 테이블과 원자재부터 제품까지의 품질보증이 연결되지 않을 것이라는 우려가 나온다.
POINT_OUT_EN: The work for linking the acceptance inspection results and the manufacturing process is not described. There is a concern that the process quality control table and the quality assurance from raw materials to products will not be connected.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 没有描述连接验收结果和制造过程的工作。有人担心过程质量控制表和从原材料到产品的质量保证不会连接起来。
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 원부자재의 포장상태 점검이 일상적인 업무로 간주되어 관리계획에는 원부자재 검사절차만 반영하였습니다. 포장상태 확인이 반영되지 않았습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Since checking the packaging condition of raw and subsidiary materials was considered a routine task, there is only procedure for inspoection of raw and subsidiary material was reflected in the control plan. Checking packaging condition was not reflected.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 由于检查原辅材料的包装状况被视为例行任务，因此控制计划中仅反映了原辅材料的检查程序。检查包装状况未得到反映。
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1년에 1회 실제 프로세스를 점검하고 관리 계획, 작업 지시, 일일 점검표 등과 비교합니다. 관리 계획 작성 시 정보가 누락되지 않도록 추가 조치를 마련했습니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: We checked once a year the actual process and compare with Control Plan, Work Instruction, Dailiy Checksheet, etc. Additional measures were created to ensure that information is not omitted when creating Control Plan.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: We checked once a year the actual process and compare with Control Plan, Work Instruction, Dailiy Checksheet, etc. Additional measures were created to ensure that information is not omitted when creating Control Plan.

SUBJECT: HONDA QAV-1 Audit(IP)

ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Actually, visual packaging inspection of raw an auxillary material is conducted during incoming inspection. However, role and responsibility is not clearly identifiedin the document.

ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Actually, visual packaging inspection of raw an auxillary material is conducted during incoming inspection. However, role and responsibility is not clearly identified in the document.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: Actually, visual packaging inspection of raw an auxillary material is conducted during incoming inspection. However, role and responsibility is not clearly identifiedin the document.

COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Role & responsibility of incoming inspector were added in the regulation.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: Role & responsibility of incoming inspector were added in the regulation.

SUBJECT: HONDA QAV-1 Audit(IP)
POINT_OUT: The latest version of master sample is not managed. There is a concern that it will lead to erroneous judgement when using the master sample, and wiil not lead to appropriate quality judgement.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Lack of awareness of inspectors when checking to exparation of limit samples. There no clear rules of frequency for checking and control limit samples in the requlation.
COUNTER_MEASURE: Established a check sheet master sample management list as reference to inspector checking the validity and expiry date of master sample. Revised and defined additional rules in the regulation.

POINT_OUT_EN: The latest version of master sample is not managed. There is a concern that it will lead to erroneous judgment when using the master sample, and wiil not lead to appropriate quality judgment.
POINT_OUT_ZH: The latest version of master sample is not managed. There is a concern that it will lead to erroneous judgement when using the master sample, and wiil not lead to appropriate quality judgement.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 한계 샘플 검사 시 검사관의 인식 부족. 요구사항에는 한계 샘플을 확인하고 제어하기 위한 명확한 빈도 규칙이 없습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Lack of awareness of inspectors when checking to exparation of limit samples. There no clear rules of frequency for checking and control limit samples in the requlation.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: Lack of awareness of inspectors when checking to exparation of limit samples. There no clear rules of frequency for checking and control limit samples in the requlation.
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 검사관이 마스터 샘플의 유효기간과 유효기간을 확인할 수 있도록 체크시트 마스터 샘플 관리 목록을 작성하였습니다. 규정의 추가 규칙을 개정하고 정의했습니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Established a check sheet master sample management list as reference to inspector checking the validity and expiry date of master sample. Revised and defined additional rules in the regulation.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 建立检查表主样管理清单，作为检验员检查主样有效期和有效期的参考。修订并定义了法规中的附加规则。

SUBJECT: HONDA QAV-1 Audit(IP)
POINT_OUT: The skills as an inspector is not clearly defined as a requirement. There is a concern that the inspector will be certified as the wrong inspector
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: The qualification requirement for HK QAB inspectors were operated and intended but there was a possibilityof miss interpretation in the sentence. This operation did not notice this.
COUNTER_MEASURE: The QAB Inspector qualification requirement is revised to specify that there is no physical disqualification as a basic requirement and to meet at least one of the additional qualification requirement.
POINT_OUT_KO: 검사관으로서의 기술은 요구사항으로 명확하게 정의되어 있지 않습니다. 검사관이 잘못된 검사관으로 인증될 우려가 있음

POINT_OUT_ZH: The skills as an inspector is not clearly defined as a requirement. There is a concern that the inspector will be certified as the wrong inspector
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: HK QAB 검사원 자격요건을 운영하고 의도하였지만, 문장에서 잘못 해석될 가능성이 있었습니다. 이 작업에서는 이를 인식하지 못했습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: The qualification requirement for HK QAB inspectors were operated and intended but there was a possibility of miss interpretation in the sentence. This operation did not notice this.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: The qualification requirement for HK QAB inspectors were operated and intended but there was a possibilityof miss interpretation in the sentence. This operation did not notice this.
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: QAB 검사관 자격 요건은 신체적 결격이 없음을 기본 요건으로 명시하고 추가 자격 요건 중 최소 하나를 충족하도록 개정되었습니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: The QAB Inspector qualification requirement is revised to specify that there is no physical disqualification as a basic requirement and to meet at least one of the additional qualification requirement.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: The QAB Inspector qualification requirement is revised to specify that there is no physical disqualification as a basic requirement and to meet at least one of the additional qualification requirement.

ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: OJT Form don't have training identification for training categories, the OJT Forms only showed training subject and the detail of specific.
COUNTER_MEASURE: Revised the Individual OJT Plan Form by adding traning category column (basic rule, safety and quality) and OJT form added to Training regulation.

POINT_OUT_ZH: 教育和培训的基本项目没有定义。人们担心，教育项目的遗漏将无法带来有效的教育和培训。
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: OJT 양식에는 훈련 항목에 대한 훈련 ID가 없으며 OJT 양식에는 훈련 주제와 구체적인 세부 사항만 표시됩니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: OJT Form don't have training identification for training categories, the OJT Forms only showed training subject and the detail of specific.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: OJT Form don't have training identification for training categories, the OJT Forms only showed training subject and the detail of specific.
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 개인 OJT 계획서에 교육 항목 항목(기본 규칙, 안전 및 품질)을 추가하고 교육 규정에 OJT 양식을 추가하여 개정했습니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Revised the Individual OJT Plan Form by adding traning category column (basic rule, safety and quality) and OJT form added to Training regulation.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: Revised the Individual OJT Plan Form by adding traning category column (basic rule, safety and quality) and OJT form added to Training regulation.

SUBJECT: BAEV N50AB PCPA  Audit
POINT_OUT: belt拼接工序，角度尺精度为0.05°，公差要求±0.5°，角度尺精度不达标
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: -oem无要求
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1. 设备上有在线监控的角度测量仪，精度为0.01°，公差是±0.5°，满足精度要求 2. 角度尺仅用于人工补充确认，设备角度测量仪为主要测量工具。 3. 作业记录时，记录小数点后两位
POINT_OUT_KO: 벨트 접합 과정에서 각도 눈금자의 정확도는 0.05°이고 공차 요구 사항은 ±0.5°이며 각도 눈금자의 정확도는 표준에 미치지 못합니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: In the belt splicing process, the accuracy of the angle ruler is 0.05°, the tolerance requirement is ±0.5°, and the accuracy of the angle ruler is not up to standard.
POINT_OUT_ZH: belt拼接工序，角度尺精度为0.05°，公差要求±0.5°，角度尺精度不达标
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: -OEM 요구 사항 없음
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: -OEM no requirement
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: -oem无要求
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1. 장비에는 정확도 0.01°, 공차 ±0.5°의 온라인 모니터링 각도 측정 장비가 있어 정확도 요구 사항을 충족합니다. 2. 각도 눈금자는 수동 보충 확인에만 사용되며 장비 각도 측정기는 주요 측정 도구입니다. 3. 숙제를 녹음할 때 소수점 이하 두 자리까지 녹음하세요.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1. There is an online monitoring angle measuring instrument on the equipment, with an accuracy of 0.01° and a tolerance of ±0.5°, which meets the accuracy requirements. 2. The angle ruler is only used for manual supplementary confirmation, and the equipment angle measuring instrument is the main measurement tool. 3. When recording homework, record to two decimal places.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1. 设备上有在线监控的角度测量仪，精度为0.01°，公差是±0.5°，满足精度要求 2. 角度尺仅用于人工补充确认，设备角度测量仪为主要测量工具。 3. 作业记录时，记录小数点后两位

SUBJECT: Toyota Audit(JP)
POINT_OUT: It is recommended that for the important characteristics or bottleneck engineering positions, additional assessment of these positions operators, and additional qualification;

ROOT_CAUSE_EN: There are job classification, and there are upgrade assessment procedures, but only theoretical and safety examinations, no important post comprehensive skills assessment. There are no important job upgrade related skills assessment requirements in the program document.
