SUBJECT: Toyota Audit(JP)
POINT_OUT: The error prevention list is "permanent" for the preservation period of malicious parts, should set the preservation period of malicious parts "recommended 1 year / time", and carry out annual inspection of malicious parts (whether broken, dirty, etc.).
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 1）.Unreasonable retention time of malicious parts.2）.Malicious samples without clear management standards.
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1) Modify the "error prevention list" error prevention equipment sample validity period from "permanent" to "one year"; 2）.Added Malicious Samples Management Standard Document "Limit Samples and Malicious Samples Production and Management Guidelines", such as definition, frequency of spot checks and related management requirements, etc.
POINT_OUT_KO: The error prevention list is "permanent" for the preservation period of malicious parts, should set the preservation period of malicious parts "recommended 1 year / time", and carry out annual inspection of malicious parts (whether broken, dirty, etc.).
POINT_OUT_EN: The error prevention list is "permanent" for the preservation period of malicious parts, should set the preservation period of malicious parts "recommended 1 year / time", and carry out annual inspection of malicious parts (whether broken, dirty, etc.).
POINT_OUT_ZH: 防错清单对于恶意部件的保存期限是“永久”的，应设定恶意部件的保存期限“建议1年/次”，并对恶意部件进行年度检查（是否破损、脏污等）。
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 1).악성부분의 불합리한 보유시간.2).명확한 관리기준이 없는 악성샘플.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: 1).Unreasonable retention time of malicious parts.2).Malicious samples without clear management standards.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 1）.Unreasonable retention time of malicious parts.2）.Malicious samples without clear management standards.
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1) "오류 방지 목록" 오류 방지 장비 샘플 유효 기간을 "영구"에서 "1년"으로 수정합니다. 2). 정의, 불시점검 빈도, 관련 관리 요구사항 등 악성시료 관리기준 문서 "한도시료 및 악성시료 생산 및 관리 지침"을 추가하였습니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1) Modify the "error prevention list" error prevention equipment sample validity period from "permanent" to "one year"; 2). Added Malicious Samples Management Standard Document "Limit Samples and Malicious Samples Production and Management Guidelines", such as definition, frequency of spot checks and related management requirements, etc.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1) Modify the "error prevention list" error prevention equipment sample validity period from "permanent" to "one year"; 2）.Added Malicious Samples Management Standard Document "Limit Samples and Malicious Samples Production and Management Guidelines", such as definition, frequency of spot checks and related management requirements, etc.

SUBJECT: Toyota Audit(JP)
POINT_OUT: Lack of clear definition and requirements for interruptions. Suggest adding the requirement that "the current job cycle should be completed when the job is interrupted"
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Lack of standard documentation for the definition and management of normal interruptions
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1) Add the definition of interrupt operation in the "Production Plan Management Regulations" 2）.Add relevant management provisions for normal interrupted operations to each engineering operation standard, and educate all employees
POINT_OUT_KO: 중단에 대한 명확한 정의 및 요구 사항이 부족합니다. "작업이 중단되면 현재 작업주기가 완료되어야 한다"는 요구 사항 추가 제안
POINT_OUT_EN: Lack of clear definition and requirements for interruptions. Suggest adding the requirement that "the current job cycle should be completed when the job is interrupted"
POINT_OUT_ZH: 缺乏对中断的明确定义和要求。建议增加“作业中断时应完成当前作业周期”的要求
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 정상적인 중단의 정의 및 관리에 대한 표준 문서가 부족합니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Lack of standard documentation for the definition and management of normal interruptions
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 缺乏正常中断的定义和管理的标准文档
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1) "생산계획관리규정"에 중단작업 정의 추가 2) 각 엔지니어링 작업기준에 정상 중단작업 관련 관리 조항 추가 및 전 직원 교육
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1) Add the definition of interrupt operation in the "Production Plan Management Regulations" 2).Add relevant management provisions for normal interrupted operations to each engineering operation standard, and educate all employees
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1) Add the definition of interrupt operation in the "Production Plan Management Regulations" 2）.Add relevant management provisions for normal interrupted operations to each engineering operation standard, and educate all employees

SUBJECT: HONDA QAV-1 Audit(IP)
POINT_OUT: The number of days until verification in the official issued Corrective Action Request is not set to the number of days as stipulated. There is a concern that the credibility of the internal quality audit will be damaged by conveying incorrect information to the auditee.
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: In order to prevent delaysin validation, the corrective action report form (60 days) was operated for a shorter period of time that the regulations (90 days) resulting in differences between the regulations and the report.
COUNTER_MEASURE: Final validation can be completed within 90 days, so the standards for regulations and corrective action report form have been revised to be the same.
POINT_OUT_KO: 공식적으로 발행된 시정조치 요청서의 확인까지 일수가 규정된 일수로 설정되어 있지 않습니다. 피감사자에게 잘못된 정보를 전달함으로써 내부 품질감사의 신뢰성이 훼손될 우려가 있다.
POINT_OUT_EN: The number of days until verification in the official issued Corrective Action Request is not set to the number of days as stipulated. There is a concern that the credibility of the internal quality audit will be damaged by conveying incorrect information to the auditee.
POINT_OUT_ZH: The number of days until verification in the official issued Corrective Action Request is not set to the number of days as stipulated. There is a concern that the credibility of the internal quality audit will be damaged by conveying incorrect information to the auditee.
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 검증 지연을 방지하기 위해 시정조치 신고서 양식(60일)을 규정(90일)보다 단축하여 규정과 신고 내용의 차이가 발생하도록 운영하였습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: In order to prevent delaysin validation, the corrective action report form (60 days) was operated for a shorter period of time that the regulations (90 days) resulting in differences between the regulations and the report.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 为了防止验证延迟，纠正措施报告表（60天）的运行时间比法规（90天）短，导致法规和报告之间存在差异。
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 최종 검증은 90일 이내에 완료할 수 있어 규정 기준 및 시정조치 신고서 양식도 동일하게 개정되었습니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: Final validation can be completed within 90 days, so the standards for regulations and corrective action report form have been revised to be the same.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: Final validation can be completed within 90 days, so the standards for regulations and corrective action report form have been revised to be the same.

SUBJECT: SVW JP Audit
POINT_OUT: 胎圈工序钢丝张力控制为被动式机械结构，建议升级为主动式控制；
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 无
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1.钢丝卷出 利用刹车起到制动作用，再由缠绕部 把钢丝牵引出来，再缠绕。 2.由于钢丝，从钢丝桶到缠绕部 一直是 绷紧的状态即同等张力的条件。所以，测量位置的不同，不会导致张力的变化。 3.缓冲区域，不是悬空的缓冲区域，是利用滚轮物理接触着钢丝，所以也不会造成张力变化。
POINT_OUT_KO: 비드 공정의 강선 장력 제어는 수동적 기계 구조이므로 능동 제어로 업그레이드하는 것이 좋습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: The steel wire tension control in the bead process is a passive mechanical structure, and it is recommended to upgrade to active control;
POINT_OUT_ZH: 胎圈工序钢丝张力控制为被动式机械结构，建议升级为主动式控制；
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 无
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: 无
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 无
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1. 강철 와이어가 롤아웃됩니다. 브레이크는 브레이크를 사용하는데, 권선부분이 강선을 잡아당겨서 감아주는 역할을 합니다. 2. 강선은 강선 통부터 권취부까지 항상 팽팽한 상태, 즉 균등한 장력의 상태이기 때문이다. 따라서 측정 위치가 달라도 장력 변화가 발생하지 않습니다. 3. 완충지역은 정지된 완충지역이 아니다. 롤러를 사용하여 강선에 물리적으로 접촉하므로 장력 변화가 발생하지 않습니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1. The steel wire is rolled out. The brake is used to brake, and then the winding part pulls the steel wire out and then winds it. 2. Because the steel wire is always in a tight state from the steel wire barrel to the winding part, that is, the condition of equal tension. Therefore, different measurement positions will not cause changes in tension. 3. The buffer area is not a suspended buffer area. It uses rollers to physically contact the steel wire, so it will not cause tension changes.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1.钢丝卷出 利用刹车起到制动作用，再由缠绕部 把钢丝牵引出来，再缠绕。 2.由于钢丝，从钢丝桶到缠绕部 一直是 绷紧的状态即同等张力的条件。所以，测量位置的不同，不会导致张力的变化。 3.缓冲区域，不是悬空的缓冲区域，是利用滚轮物理接触着钢丝，所以也不会造成张力变化。

SUBJECT: SVW JP Audit
POINT_OUT: 钢帘压延工序在线测厚仪缺少标准样块进行标准校定；
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 钢丝/帘布 AGC，测量的直接结果是橡胶重量。再换算为测厚，标准块无法可以正确精度
COUNTER_MEASURE: 目前管理方法为，定期对于材料厚度及重量确认，设定参数调整。
POINT_OUT_KO: 강철 커튼 롤링 공정의 온라인 두께 측정기에는 표준 교정을 위한 표준 샘플 블록이 부족합니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: The online thickness gauge in the steel curtain rolling process lacks standard sample blocks for standard calibration;
POINT_OUT_ZH: 钢帘压延工序在线测厚仪缺少标准样块进行标准校定；
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 와이어/코드 AGC 측정의 직접적인 결과는 고무 무게입니다. 그런 다음 두께 측정으로 변환하면 표준 블록이 정확한 정확도를 얻을 수 없습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: Wire/Cord AGC, the direct result of the measurement is the rubber weight. Then converted to thickness measurement, the standard block cannot achieve the correct accuracy.
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 钢丝/帘布 AGC，测量的直接结果是橡胶重量。再换算为测厚，标准块无法可以正确精度
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 현재의 관리 방식은 정기적으로 자재의 두께와 무게를 확인하고 매개변수 조정을 설정하는 것입니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: The current management method is to regularly confirm the material thickness and weight and set parameter adjustments.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 目前管理方法为，定期对于材料厚度及重量确认，设定参数调整。

SUBJECT: SVW JP Audit
POINT_OUT: 胎圈压延成型工序，缺少张力检测设备对胎圈成型过程张力进行监控（目前仅对前段钢丝压延过程张力监控）；
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 无
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1.钢丝卷出 利用刹车起到制动作用，再由缠绕部 把钢丝牵引出来，再缠绕。 2.由于钢丝，从钢丝桶到缠绕部 一直是 绷紧的状态即同等张力的条件。所以，测量位置的不同，不会导致张力的变化。 3.缓冲区域，不是悬空的缓冲区域，是利用滚轮物理接触着钢丝，所以也不会造成张力变化。
POINT_OUT_KO: 비드 압연 및 성형 공정에서는 비드 성형 공정의 장력을 모니터링하는 장력 감지 장비가 부족합니다(현재는 강선 압연 공정의 앞 부분의 장력만 모니터링합니다).
POINT_OUT_EN: In the bead rolling and forming process, there is a lack of tension detection equipment to monitor the tension of the bead forming process (currently only the tension of the front section of the steel wire rolling process is monitored);
POINT_OUT_ZH: 胎圈压延成型工序，缺少张力检测设备对胎圈成型过程张力进行监控（目前仅对前段钢丝压延过程张力监控）；
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 无
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: 无
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 无
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1. 강철 와이어가 롤아웃됩니다. 브레이크는 브레이크를 사용하는데, 권선부분이 강선을 잡아당겨서 감아주는 역할을 합니다. 2. 강선은 강선 통부터 권취부까지 항상 팽팽한 상태, 즉 균등한 장력의 상태이기 때문이다. 따라서 측정 위치가 달라도 장력 변화가 발생하지 않습니다. 3. 완충지역은 정지된 완충지역이 아니다. 롤러를 사용하여 강선에 물리적으로 접촉하므로 장력 변화가 발생하지 않습니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1. The steel wire is rolled out. The brake is used to brake, and then the winding part pulls the steel wire out and then winds it. 2. Because the steel wire is always in a tight state from the steel wire barrel to the winding part, that is, the condition of equal tension. Therefore, different measurement positions will not cause changes in tension. 3. The buffer area is not a suspended buffer area. It uses rollers to physically contact the steel wire, so it will not cause tension changes.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1.钢丝卷出 利用刹车起到制动作用，再由缠绕部 把钢丝牵引出来，再缠绕。 2.由于钢丝，从钢丝桶到缠绕部 一直是 绷紧的状态即同等张力的条件。所以，测量位置的不同，不会导致张力的变化。 3.缓冲区域，不是悬空的缓冲区域，是利用滚轮物理接触着钢丝，所以也不会造成张力变化。

SUBJECT: SVW JP Audit
POINT_OUT: 成品仓库货架无法与所存放的轮胎的二维码进行绑定
ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: 现有自动仓库无此功能
COUNTER_MEASURE: 1. 产品生产线下线后人工区分规格装载到托盘或铁框中。 2. 规格数量确认后根据每个托盘和铁框编号入库到高架自动仓库保管。 3. 仓库管理软件（WMS）管理产品等级和先入先出。 4. 产品安订单要求出库时全部PDA扫描确认，确保按照要求的规格和等级交货。
POINT_OUT_KO: 완제품 창고 선반은 보관된 타이어의 QR 코드와 연결될 수 없습니다.
POINT_OUT_EN: The finished product warehouse shelves cannot be bound to the QR codes of the stored tires.
POINT_OUT_ZH: 成品仓库货架无法与所存放的轮胎的二维码进行绑定
ROOT_CAUSE_KO: 기존 자동창고에는 이 기능이 없습니다.
ROOT_CAUSE_EN: The existing automatic warehouse does not have this function
ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 现有自动仓库无此功能
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 1. 제품이 생산라인에서 나온 후, 사양을 수동으로 판별하여 팔레트나 철골에 적재합니다. 2. 규격 및 수량 확인 후 각 파렛트와 철골을 고가 자동창고에 수량에 맞게 보관 보관합니다. 3. 창고 관리 소프트웨어(WMS)는 제품 수준과 선입선출을 관리합니다. 4. 모든 PDA 스캔 및 제품 주문 확인은 필수 사양 및 등급에 따른 배송을 보장하기 위해 창고 밖으로 배송되도록 요구합니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: 1. After the product comes off the production line, the specifications are manually distinguished and loaded into pallets or iron frames. 2. After the specification and quantity are confirmed, each pallet and iron frame are stored in the elevated automatic warehouse for storage according to the number. 3. Warehouse management software (WMS) manages product levels and first-in, first-out. 4. All PDA scans and confirmations of product orders require that they be shipped out of the warehouse to ensure delivery according to the required specifications and grades.
COUNTER_MEASURE_ZH: 1. 产品生产线下线后人工区分规格装载到托盘或铁框中。 2. 规格数量确认后根据每个托盘和铁框编号入库到高架自动仓库保管。 3. 仓库管理软件（WMS）管理产品等级和先入先出。 4. 产品安订单要求出库时全部PDA扫描确认，确保按照要求的规格和等级交货。

POINT_OUT: When the BELT joint detects NG, the staff continues to work after confirming that there is no abnormality, but there is no record of the staff's confirmation action during NG, which belongs to the deficiency of the quality control process

ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: The device detection process information is not completely recorded
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 공정정보 기록을 개선하고, NG를 검출, 판단하여 직원이 수동으로 처리합니다. 자격 확인 후 버튼을 누르면 동작되며, 배경 데이터는 "Confirm OK"로 기록되어 다음 단계로 진행됩니다.

SUBJECT: Tesla model Y Product confirmation audit

POINT_OUT_EN: The use of tread color line pigments is currently subject to manual inspection. It is recommended to increase visual/quantitative monitoring of the pigments in the paint buckets.

ROOT_CAUSE_ZH: 颜料壶不透明，壶内存量不容易识别
COUNTER_MEASURE_KO: 불투명 페인트통에서 눈금이 있는 투명 페인트통으로 개선되어 시각적 관리가 용이해졌습니다.
COUNTER_MEASURE_EN: The opaque paint pot has been improved to a transparent paint pot with scales to facilitate visual management.
